macro set_font(	#id#, 	#font_id#)
	set_control_par(		#id#, 		CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 		#font_id#[		0])
	set_control_par(		#id#, 		CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON, 		#font_id#[		1])
	set_control_par(		#id#, 		CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER, 		#font_id#[		2])
	set_control_par(		#id#, 		CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER, 		#font_id#[		3])
end macro
macro check_arp_rr_count_method(	#arp#, 	#engine_num#, 	#slot_count#)
	inc(		slots_chord_subCount[		#engine_num#,		#slot_count#])
if	#arp#.note_order=	14or	#arp#.note_repeat=	0
if	slots_chord_subCount[	#engine_num#,	#slot_count#]>=	#arp#.selected_cursor
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		#slot_count#])
	slots_chord_subCount[	#engine_num#,	#slot_count#] :=	0
end if
end if
if	#arp#.note_order#	14and	#arp#.note_repeat>	0
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		#slot_count#])
end if
end macro
macro _env_on_controller(	#env#, 	#i#)
for	#i#:=	0to	100-	1
if	#env#.rhythm_A[	#i#]-	#env#.rhythm_B[	#i#]<	0
	#env#.rhythm_playback[	#i#]:=	#env#.rhythm_A[	#i#]+(((	#env#.rhythm_B[	#i#]-	#env#.rhythm_A[	#i#])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	#env#.rhythm_playback[	#i#]:=	#env#.rhythm_A[	#i#]-(((	#env#.rhythm_A[	#i#]-	#env#.rhythm_B[	#i#])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for
end macro
macro reset_fx_page_pictures()
	set_control_par_str(		get_ui_id(		fx_env_view), 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"empty_picture")

	set_control_par_str(		get_ui_id(		fx_mod_view), 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"empty_picture")
	set_control_par_str(		get_ui_id(		fx_trem_view), 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"empty_picture")
	set_control_par_str(		get_ui_id(		fx_sat_view), 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"empty_picture")
	set_control_par_str(		get_ui_id(		fx_filter_view), 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"empty_picture")
end macro
macro on_ui_fx_page(	#control#, 	#fx_slot#)
on ui_control(	#control#)

	fx_slot :=	#fx_slot#
	engine_active_slot:=	#fx_slot#+	1
call	grain_page_switcher()
call	update_visibility
call	main_subpage_manager

end on
end macro
macro btn_engine_selector.callbacks(	#n#)
on ui_control(	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1#n#)
	assign_slot_menu0 :=	#n#
	reset_cursor()
call	check_cursor_amount
call	update_assigned_instruments
end on

on ui_control(	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4#n#)
	assign_slot_menu3 :=	#n#
	reset_cursor()
call	check_cursor_amount
call	update_assigned_instruments
end on
end macro
macro reset_cursor()
	cursor :=	0
	arp1.cursor :=	0
	arp2.cursor :=	0
	arp3.cursor :=	0
	arp4.cursor :=	0
	env1.cursor :=	0
	env2.cursor :=	0
	env3.cursor :=	0
	env4.cursor :=	0
end macro
macro set_max_eighths_notes(	#arp#)
	s :=	#arp#.time_signature
	#arp#.max_eighth_notes :=	max_eight_notes_list[	s]
select	#arp#.rate
case	0
	#arp#.mf_length :=	960/	16
	#arp#.bar_limit :=	#arp#.max_eighth_notes*	8
case	1
	#arp#.mf_length :=	960/	8
	#arp#.bar_limit :=	#arp#.max_eighth_notes*	4
case	2
	#arp#.mf_length :=	960/	4
	#arp#.bar_limit :=	#arp#.max_eighth_notes*	2
case	3
	#arp#.mf_length :=	960/	2
	#arp#.bar_limit :=	#arp#.max_eighth_notes*	1
case	4
	#arp#.mf_length :=	960
	#arp#.bar_limit :=	#arp#.max_eighth_notes/	2
case	5
	#arp#.mf_length :=	960/	6
	#arp#.bar_limit :=((	#arp#.max_eighth_notes/	2)+	#arp#.max_eighth_notes)*	2
case	6
	#arp#.mf_length :=	960/	3
	#arp#.bar_limit :=(	#arp#.max_eighth_notes/	2)+	#arp#.max_eighth_notes
case	7
	#arp#.mf_length :=(	960*	2)/	3
	#arp#.bar_limit :=((	#arp#.max_eighth_notes/	2)+	#arp#.max_eighth_notes)/	2
end select
if	#arp#.bar_reset_active=	2
	#arp#.bar_limit :=	#arp#.bar_limit*	2
end if
end macro
macro update_rate_to_steps_menu(	#arp#)

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	#arp#.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	#arp#.rate>	4
	#arp#.rate :=	#arp#.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	#arp#.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	#arp#.rhythm_steps=-	1
	#arp#.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if
end macro
macro check_new_meassure_to_table(	#arp#)
	a :=(	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	#arp#.rhythm_steps),	CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
if	#arp#.rate>	4and	s<	3
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]>	#arp#.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
elseif	#arp#.rate<	5
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]>	#arp#.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
end if
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		#arp#.rhythm_steps), 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		a)
end macro
macro remote_global_timing_buttons(	#control#)
	engine_half_time:=	0
	engine_normal_time:=	0
	engine_double_time:=	0
	#control#:=	1
end macro
macro slot_selection_callback(	#n#)
on ui_control(	btn_slot_selection#n#)
	engine_active_slot :=	search(	slot_translation,	#n#)+	1
	fx_slot :=	engine_active_slot-	1
call	grain_page_switcher()

call	update_visibility
call	main_subpage_manager
end on
end macro

	UIpages()



declare	see_page :=	UIpage_MAIN
declare	page_assigns[	45,	400,	2]
declare	pageman.search_empty


declare	see_main_subpage :=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
declare	fx_slot :=	0
declare	fx_tab :=	2

end macro

macro ArpEn.on_init()
family	ArpEn
declareconst	NUM_INSTANCES :=	4

declareconst	MAX_STEPS :=	32
declareconst	NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE :=	512

declareconst	TBL_BAR_COLOR 	   :=	9667780h
declareconst	TBL_ZERO_COLOR 	   :=	9404A4Dh
declareconst	INDICATOR_BAR_COLOR  :=	9C78B27h
declareconst	INDICATOR_ZERO_COLOR :=	0x000000

declareconst	EDIT_A :=	0
declareconst	EDIT_B :=	1

declare	note_buffer[	ArpEn.NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE]
declare	cursor :=	0

declare	copy_active :=	0
declare	copy_array_A[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS]
declare	copy_array_B[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS]

declare	INSTANCE_COUNTER :=	0
end family
	literate_macro(		ArpEn.setup_instance_controls(			#l#)) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
end macro
macro ArpEn.setup_instance_controls(	#fam#)

declare	#fam#.id :=	ArpEn.INSTANCE_COUNTER
	inc(		ArpEn.INSTANCE_COUNTER)


declarepers	#fam#.latch_mode
declare	#fam#.cursor
declare	#fam#.check_id :=	0
declare	#fam#.callback_id


declareread	#fam#.rhythm_A[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS]
declareread	#fam#.rhythm_B[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS]
declare	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS]
declare	#fam#.morph_label_shift[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS,	2]

declareread	#fam#.steps
declareread	#fam#.steps_last_value
declare	#fam#.blip_note


declare	#fam#.note_buffer[	ArpEn.NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE]
declare	#fam#.ordered[	128]
declare	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	128]
declare	#fam#.last_note_ids[	ArpEn.NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE] :=(-	1)
declare	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	128] :=(-	1)
declare	#fam#.selected_cursor

declare	#fam#.a
declare	#fam#.aa
declare	#fam#.b
declare	#fam#.s
declare	#fam#.i
declare	#fam#.n
declare	#fam#.h
declare	#fam#.z
declare	#fam#.note_to_engine
declare	#fam#.instr_in_slot
declare	#fam#.loop_cursor
declare	#fam#.loop_buffer[	ArpEn.NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE]


declare	#fam#.min_note
declare	#fam#.max_note
declare	#fam#.help_buffer[	ArpEn.NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE]
declare	#fam#.step_length
declare	#fam#.note
declare	#fam#.velo
declare	#fam#.act_step
declare	#fam#.oct_cursor
declare	#fam#.swing_cursor


declare	#fam#.last_touched
declare	#fam#.shift_all_active
declare	#fam#.shift_start

declare	#fam#.humanize_hold

declare	#fam#.chord_buffer[	100]
declare	#fam#.note_id

declare	#fam#.table_bar_width_dynamic
declare	~#fam#.label_width_dynamic
declare	#fam#.label_width_indicator

declare	~#fam#.real_hold
declare	#fam#.indicator_hold
declare	#fam#.t

declareread	#fam#.mf_length


declare	#fam#.bar_count :=	0
declareread	#fam#.bar_limit

declare	#fam#.edit_active :=	ArpEn.EDIT_B


declarepers	#fam#.max_eighth_notes


declareui_table	#fam#.rhythm[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS](	2,	2,	127)
	set_table_properties(		#fam#.rhythm, 		ArpEn.TBL_BAR_COLOR, 		ArpEn.TBL_ZERO_COLOR)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.rhythm, 		173, 		300, 		505, 		100)
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rhythm), 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, -		1)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rhythm), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_BG)

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	#fam#.rhythm)-	1
	#fam#.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for

declareui_xy	?#fam#.rhythm_xy[	2]
	set_control_par(		#fam#.rhythm_xy, 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		0)
	set_control_par(		#fam#.rhythm_xy, 		$CONTROL_PAR_MOUSE_MODE, 		2)
	set_control_par_str_arr(		#fam#.rhythm_xy, 		$CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE, 		"cursor", 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.rhythm_xy, 		#fam#.rhythm->		x-		-3, 		#fam#.rhythm->		y-		-3, 		#fam#.rhythm->		width+		2*		-3-		1, 		#fam#.rhythm->		height+		2*		-3)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rhythm_xy), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_BG)

declareui_table	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS](	1,	1,	1)
	set_table_properties(		#fam#.rhythm_indicator, 		ArpEn.INDICATOR_BAR_COLOR, 		ArpEn.INDICATOR_ZERO_COLOR)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.rhythm_indicator, 		#fam#.rhythm->		x, 		402, 		#fam#.rhythm->		width, 		8)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rhythm_indicator), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_BG)

declarereadui_menu	#fam#.time_signature
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_reset_list)-	1
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.time_signature, 		arp_reset_list[		i], 		i)
end for
	set_menu_properties(		#fam#.time_signature, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.time_signature, 		175, 		275, 		50, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.time_signature), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.time_signature, 		font_main_big_array)

declarereadui_menu	#fam#.rate
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.rate, 		arp_rates_list[		i], 		i)
end for
	set_menu_properties(		#fam#.rate, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.rate, 		275, 		275, 		67, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rate), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.rate, 		font_main_big_array)

declareui_label	#fam#.note_order_label(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		#fam#.note_order_label, 		"", 		"lbl_noteorder")
	set_bounds(		#fam#.note_order_label, 		240, 		275, 		21, 		21)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.note_order_label), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Up", 		2)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Down", 		3)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Up & Down", 		4)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Down & Up", 		5)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"--------------", 		99)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Zig-Zag Up", 		6)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Zig-Zag Down", 		7)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Zig-Zag Up/Down", 		8)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Zig-Zag Down/Up", 		9)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"--------------", 		99)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Move In", 		10)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Move Out", 		11)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Move In & Out", 		12)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"Move Out & In", 		13)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"--------------", 		99)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_order, 		"All (Chord)", 		14)
	set_menu_properties(		#fam#.note_order, 		"btn_dropdownbig")
	#fam#.note_order->	textpos_y:=	400
	set_bounds(		#fam#.note_order, 		240, 		275, 		36, 		21)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.note_order), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declarepers	#fam#.last_note_order :=	#fam#.note_order

declarereadui_menu	#fam#.bar_reset_active
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.bar_reset_active, 		"Reset: None", 		0)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.bar_reset_active, 		"Reset: 1 bar", 		1)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.bar_reset_active, 		"Reset: 2 bars", 		2)
	set_menu_properties(		#fam#.bar_reset_active, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.bar_reset_active, 		440, 		275, 		100, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.bar_reset_active), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.bar_reset_active, 		font_main_big_array)

declarereadui_menu	#fam#.note_selection
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	note_selection_list)-	1
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_selection, 		note_selection_list[		i], 		note_selection_values[		i])
end for
	set_menu_properties(		#fam#.note_selection, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.note_selection, 		350, 		275, 		79, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.note_selection), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.note_selection, 		font_main_big_array)

declareread	#fam#.note_selection_hold

declarereadui_menu	#fam#.note_repeat
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"Repeat: 0x", 		0)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"Repeat: 1x", 		1)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"Repeat: 2x", 		2)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"Repeat: 3x", 		3)
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"Repeat: 4x", 		4)
	set_menu_properties(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		550, 		275, 		88, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.note_repeat), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		font_main_big_array)

declareread	#fam#.repeat_max :=	#fam#.note_repeat

declarereadui_menu	#fam#.rhythm_steps
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	add_menu_item(		#fam#.rhythm_steps, 		_rhythm_steps_list[		i], 		i)
end for
	set_menu_properties(		#fam#.rhythm_steps, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.rhythm_steps, 		235, 		410, 		45, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rhythm_steps), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.rhythm_steps, 		font_main_big_array)

declareui_label	#fam#.steps_label(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		#fam#.steps_label, 		"Steps:", 		"empty_picture", 		0, 		font_main_big_white, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.steps_label, 		175, 		410, 		56, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.steps_label), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declarereadui_button	#fam#.rhythm_skip
	set_button_properties(		#fam#.rhythm_skip, 		"Skip", 		"empty_picture", 		1, 		font_main_big_grey, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.rhythm_skip, 		270, 		410, 		50, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rhythm_skip), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.rhythm_skip, 		font_main_big_array)
	#fam#.rhythm_skip->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

declarereadui_slider	#fam#.transpose(-	12,	12)
	set_slider_properties(		#fam#.transpose, 		0, 		"lbl_transp_slider", -		400)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.transpose, 		320, 		410, 		90, 		25)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.transpose), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	set_bounds(		#fam#.transpose_label, 		320, 		410, 		90, 		25)

	set_slider_properties(		#fam#.octave, 		0, 		"lbl_oct_slider", -		400)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.octave, 		410, 		410, 		60, 		25)

	set_font(		#fam#.rhythm_copy, 		font_main_big_array)
	#fam#.rhythm_copy->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

declareui_button	#fam#.rhythm_A_edit
	set_button_properties(		#fam#.rhythm_A_edit, 		"A", 		"btn_a-b", 		1, 		font_main_big_grey, 		3)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.rhythm_A_edit, 		175+		500+		20, 		338, 		37, 		25)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.rhythm_A_edit), 		UIpage_#fam#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	#fam#.rhythm_B_edit->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

declareui_label	#fam#.indicator_mirror(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		#fam#.indicator_mirror, 		"", 		"lbl_brighten")
	set_bounds(		#fam#.indicator_mirror, 		198, 		335+(		30*		#fam#.id), 		232, 		19)
	set_control_par(		#fam#.indicator_mirror, 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		0)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.indicator_mirror), 		UIpage_MAIN, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end macro
macro ArpEn.on_note()
	literate_macro(		ArpEn.on_note_per_instance(			#l#)) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
end macro
macro ArpEn.on_note_per_instance(	#fam#)
if	#fam#.latch_mode#	0
	#fam#.note_buffer[	#fam#.cursor] :=	EVENT_NOTE
	inc(		#fam#.cursor)

if	#fam#.cursor<	2and	#fam#.check_id=	0
	#fam#.check_id :=	EVENT_ID
	#fam#.aa :=	0
	#fam#.s :=	0
	#fam#.n :=	0
	#fam#.t :=	0
	#fam#.act_step :=	0
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
	#fam#.swing_cursor :=	0
	#fam#.bar_count :=	0
	#fam#.blip_note :=	play_note(	0,	1,	0,	1)
	change_vol(		#fam#.blip_note, -		64000, 		0)
end if
end if
end macro
macro ArpEn.on_release()
	literate_macro(		ArpEn.on_release_per_instance(			#l#)) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
end macro
macro ArpEn.on_release_per_instance(	#fam#)
if	#fam#.latch_mode#	0
	#fam#.a :=	0
	#fam#.b :=	#fam#.cursor
	#fam#.cursor :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.b)
if(	EVENT_NOTE#	#fam#.note_buffer[	#fam#.a])
	#fam#.note_buffer[	#fam#.cursor] :=	#fam#.note_buffer[	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.cursor)
end if
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
end if
end macro
macro ArpEn.catch_blip_notes()
	literate_macro(		ArpEn.catch_blip_note_per_instance(			#l#)) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
end macro
macro ArpEn.catch_blip_note_per_instance(	#fam#)
if	EVENT_ID=	#fam#.blip_note
	run_#fam#()
end if
end macro
macro ArpEn.on_sus_pedal()
for	i :=	0to	ArpEn.NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE-	1
	literate_macro(		#l#.note_buffer[		i] :=		0) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
end for
	literate_macro(		#l#.cursor :=		0) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
for	i :=	0to	127
if	KEY_DOWN[	i]=	1
	literate_macro(		ArpEn.refill_note_buffer_per_instance(			#l#)) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
end if
end for
end macro
macro ArpEn.refill_note_buffer_per_instance(	#fam#)
if	#fam#.latch_mode=	1
	#fam#.note_buffer[	#fam#.cursor] :=	i
	inc(		#fam#.cursor)
end if
end macro
macro ArpEn.check_cursor_amount()
	literate_macro(call		#l#.check_cursor_amount) on 		arp1,		arp2,		arp3,		arp4
end macro
macro ArpEn.on_controller_per_instance(	#fam#)
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
if	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i]-	#fam#.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	#fam#.rhythm_B[	i]-	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i]-	#fam#.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for
end macro
macro ArpEn.setup_instance_functions(	#fam#)
on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm_xy)
if	#fam#.edit_active=	ArpEn.EDIT_A
	on_ui_arp_xy(		#fam#, 		#fam#.rhythm_A)
elseif	#fam#.edit_active=	ArpEn.EDIT_B
	on_ui_arp_xy(		#fam#, 		#fam#.rhythm_B)
end if
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.time_signature)
	update_rate_to_steps_menu(		#fam#)
	check_new_meassure_to_table(		#fam#)
call	#fam#.update_shown_table
	set_max_eighths_notes(		#fam#)
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm_steps)
	#fam#.steps :=	#fam#.rhythm_steps
	update_inactive_steps(		#fam#, 		#fam#.rhythm_A)
	update_inactive_steps(		#fam#, 		#fam#.rhythm_B)
call	#fam#.update_shown_table
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm)
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS
if	#fam#.rhythm[	i]#	0
	tb_idx :=	i
if	#fam#.edit_active=	ArpEn.EDIT_A
	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i] :=	#fam#.rhythm[	i]
elseif	#fam#.edit_active=	ArpEn.EDIT_B
	#fam#.rhythm_B[	i] :=	#fam#.rhythm[	i]
end if
	_arp_on_input(		#fam#)
	specific_table_update(		#fam#)
	#fam#.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end if
end for
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.bar_reset_active)
	set_max_eighths_notes(		#fam#)
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.note_order)
if	#fam#.note_order#	99
	#fam#.last_note_order :=	#fam#.note_order
call	update_order_label
else
	#fam#.note_order :=	#fam#.last_note_order
end if
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm_A_edit)
	#fam#.rhythm_A_edit :=	1
	#fam#.rhythm_B_edit :=	0
	#fam#.edit_active :=	ArpEn.EDIT_A
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm_B_edit)
	#fam#.rhythm_B_edit :=	1
	#fam#.rhythm_A_edit :=	0
	#fam#.edit_active :=	ArpEn.EDIT_B
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rate)
	update_rate_to_steps_menu(		#fam#)
call	#fam#.update_shown_table
	set_max_eighths_notes(		#fam#)
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.note_selection)
call	update_note_selection
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.transpose)
	#fam#.transpose_label->	text:=	"Transp: "&	#fam#.transpose

end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.octave)
	#fam#.octave_label->	text:=	"Oct: "&	#fam#.octave

end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.note_repeat)
	#fam#.repeat_max :=	#fam#.note_repeat
	set_current_control(		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"", 		#fam#.note_repeat, 		"")
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm_skip)
if	#fam#.rhythm_skip=	1
	set_font(		#fam#.rhythm_skip, 		font_main_big_array)
else
	set_font(		#fam#.rhythm_skip, 		font_deactivated_big_array)
end if
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm_copy)
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
	ArpEn.copy_array_A[	i] :=	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i]
	ArpEn.copy_array_B[	i] :=	#fam#.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
	ArpEn.copy_active :=	1
	wait(		500)
	#fam#.rhythm_copy :=	0
end on

on ui_control(	#fam#.rhythm_paste)
if	ArpEn.copy_active=	1
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
	#fam#.rhythm_A[	i] :=	ArpEn.copy_array_A[	i]
	#fam#.rhythm_B[	i] :=	ArpEn.copy_array_B[	i]
end for
	#fam#.rhythm_A_edit:=	0
	#fam#.rhythm_B_edit:=	1
	#fam#.edit_active :=	ArpEn.EDIT_B
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_table
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	_on_controller
	wait(		500)
end if
	#fam#.rhythm_paste :=	0
end on

function	#fam#.update_shown_table
if	#fam#.rate>	4
	#fam#.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	#fam#.time_signature]
else
	#fam#.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	#fam#.time_signature]
end if
	#fam#.steps :=	#fam#.rhythm_steps

if	#fam#.steps<=	#fam#.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		#fam#.rhythm, 		#fam#.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		#fam#.rhythm_indicator, 		#fam#.h)
	#fam#.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	500))/(	int_to_real(	#fam#.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	#fam#.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	#fam#.steps))
	#fam#.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	500)-	int_to_real(	#fam#.h))/	int_to_real(	#fam#.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		#fam#.rhythm, 		#fam#.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		#fam#.rhythm_indicator, 		#fam#.steps)
	#fam#.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	505)/	#fam#.steps
	#fam#.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	500)-	int_to_real(	#fam#.steps))/	int_to_real(	#fam#.steps)
end if

	#fam#.z :=	0

for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
end for

for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1

	#fam#.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	#fam#.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	#fam#.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

if	i<	#fam#.stepsor	#fam#.steps<	#fam#.hand	i<	#fam#.h
if	#fam#.label_width_indicator>	#fam#.z
	#fam#.z :=	#fam#.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	#fam#.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	#fam#.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	#fam#.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4

end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	#fam#.steps<	#fam#.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	#fam#.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	#fam#.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	#fam#.rhythm->	x+	#fam#.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	#fam#.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end function

function	#fam#.check_cursor_amount
if	#fam#.cursor=	0
if	#fam#.note_order=	14
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	#fam#.chord_buffer)-	1
if	#fam#.chord_buffer[	i]#	0
	note_off(		#fam#.chord_buffer[		i])
	#fam#.chord_buffer[	i] :=	0
end if
end for
else
	note_off(		#fam#.note_id)
end if
	stop_wait(		#fam#.callback_id, 		0)
	#fam#.bar_count :=	0
for	i:=	0to	31
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	hide:=	HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer)-	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	0
end for
end if
end function
end macro
macro on_ui_arp_xy(	#arp#, 	#array#)
	xy_cursor_pos_x:=	#arp#.rhythm_xy->	x+	real_to_int(	#arp#.rhythm_xy[	0]*(	int_to_real(	#arp#.rhythm_xy->	width)))
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
if	tb_idx_borders[	i]<=	xy_cursor_pos_xand	tb_idx_borders[	i+	1]>	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	i
elseif	tb_idx_borders[	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1]<=	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
end if
end for

if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	#arp#.rhythm_xy),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	#arp#.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	#arp#.last_touched>	300
	#arp#.shift_all_active :=	1
	#arp#.shift_start :=	real_to_int(	#arp#.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
	shift_buffer[	i] :=	#array#[	i]
end for
else
for	tb_idx:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-(	#arp#.shift_start-	real_to_int(	#arp#.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127)))
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	#array#[	tb_idx] :=	h
	_arp_on_input(		#arp#)
	specific_table_update(		#arp#)
end if
end for
end if
	#arp#.last_touched :=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else
	#arp#.shift_all_active :=	0
	#array#[	tb_idx]:=	real_to_int(	#arp#.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
	_arp_on_input(		#arp#)
	specific_table_update(		#arp#)
end if
	update_inactive_steps(		#arp#, 		#array#)
call	#arp#.update_shown_table
end macro

declare	#fam#.callback_id

declare	#fam#.note_check

declare	#fam#.last_note_ids[	4,	128] :=(	0)
declareread	#fam#.latch_mode
declare	#fam#.cursor
declare	#fam#.selected_cursor

declare	#fam#.act_step

declare	#fam#.b

end macro
macro on_ui_env_table(	#env#)
	tablequery_idx :=	NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
if	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNor	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPor	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
	tablequery_min :=	tablequery_idx-	10
	tablequery_max :=	tablequery_idx+	10
if	tablequery_min<	0
	tablequery_min :=	0
end if
if	tablequery_max>	99
	tablequery_max :=	99
end if
else
	tablequery_min :=	0
	tablequery_max :=	99
end if
if	#env#.mode_menu=	0
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	#env#.rhythm),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	#env#.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	#env#.last_touched>	300
	#env#.shift_all_active :=	1
for	tb_idx:=	0to	100-	1
if	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	#env#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	#env#.rhythm[	tb_idx]
	shift_buffer[	tb_idx] :=	#env#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]
elseif	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	#env#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	#env#.rhythm[	tb_idx]
	shift_buffer[	tb_idx] :=	#env#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]
end if
	_arp_on_input(		#env#)
	specific_table_update(		#env#)
end for
else
	#env#.shift_diff :=	shift_buffer[	tablequery_idx]-	#env#.rhythm[	tablequery_idx]
for	tb_idx:=	0to	100-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-	#env#.shift_diff
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	#env#.rhythm[	tb_idx] :=	h
if	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	#env#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	#env#.rhythm[	tb_idx]
elseif	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	#env#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	#env#.rhythm[	tb_idx]
end if
	_arp_on_input(		#env#)
	specific_table_update(		#env#)
end if
end for
end if
	#env#.last_touched:=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else
	#env#.shift_all_active :=	0
for	i:=	tablequery_minto	tablequery_max
	tb_idx :=	i
if	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	#env#.rhythm_A[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm[	i]
elseif	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	#env#.rhythm_B[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm[	i]
end if
	_arp_on_input(		#env#)
	specific_table_update(		#env#)
end for
end if
else
for	i:=	tablequery_minto	tablequery_max
if	#env#.rhythm[	i]#	0
	tb_idx :=	i
if	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	#env#.rhythm_A[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm[	i]
elseif	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	#env#.rhythm_B[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm[	i]
end if
	_arp_on_input(		#env#)
	specific_table_update(		#env#)
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end if
end for
end if
end macro
macro on_ui_env_xy(	#env#, 	#array#)
	xy_cursor_pos_x:=	#env#.rhythm_xy->	x+	real_to_int(	#env#.rhythm_xy[	0]*(	int_to_real(	#env#.rhythm_xy->	width)))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
if	tb_idx_borders[	i]<=	xy_cursor_pos_xand	tb_idx_borders[	i+	1]>	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	i
elseif	tb_idx_borders[	32-	1]<=	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	32-	1
end if
end for
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	#env#.rhythm_xy),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	#env#.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	#env#.last_touched>	300
	#env#.shift_all_active :=	1
	#env#.shift_start :=	real_to_int(	#env#.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
	shift_buffer[	i] :=	#array#[	i]
end for
else
for	tb_idx:=	0to	32-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-(	#env#.shift_start-	real_to_int(	#env#.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127)))
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	#array#[	tb_idx] :=	h
	_arp_on_input(		#env#)
	specific_table_update(		#env#)
end if
end for
end if
	#env#.last_touched :=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else
	#array#[	tb_idx]:=	real_to_int(	#env#.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
	_arp_on_input(		#env#)
	specific_table_update(		#env#)
end if
	update_inactive_steps(		#env#, 		#array#)
	update_shown_envelope(		#env#)
end macro
macro update_shown_envelope(	#env#)
if	#env#.mode_menu=	0
	#env#.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	#env#.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	#env#.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		#env#.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		#env#.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	#env#.mode_menu=	1
if	#env#.rate>	4
	#env#.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	#env#.time_signature]
else
	#env#.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	#env#.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	#env#.steps :=	#env#.rhythm_steps
if	#env#.steps<=	#env#.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		#env#.rhythm, 		#env#.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		#env#.rhythm_indicator, 		#env#.h)
	#env#.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	#env#.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	#env#.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	#env#.steps))
	#env#.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	#env#.h))/	int_to_real(	#env#.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		#env#.rhythm, 		#env#.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		#env#.rhythm_indicator, 		#env#.steps)
	#env#.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	#env#.steps
	#env#.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	#env#.steps))/	int_to_real(	#env#.steps)
end if
end if

	#env#.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	#env#.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	#env#.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	#env#.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	#env#.stepsor	#env#.steps<	#env#.hand	i<	#env#.hand	#env#.mode_menu=	1
if	#env#.steps>	32
if	#env#.label_width_indicator>	#env#.z
	#env#.z :=	#env#.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	#env#.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	#env#.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	#env#.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	#env#.label_width_indicator>	#env#.z
	#env#.z :=	#env#.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	#env#.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	#env#.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	#env#.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	#env#.steps<	#env#.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	#env#.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	#env#.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	#env#.rhythm->	x+	#env#.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	#env#.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if
end macro
macro on_ui_edit_active(	#control#, 	#counter_control#, 	#arp#, 	#edit_active#, 	#array#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	#control# :=	1
	#counter_control# :=	0
	#arp#.edit_active :=	#edit_active#
if	#arp#.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	#arp#.rhythm[	i] :=	#array#[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on
end macro
macro set_eight_notes_bar_amount(	#env#)
select	#env#.time_signature
case	0
	#env#.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	8
case	1
	#env#.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	2
	#env#.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	3
	#env#.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	5
case	4
	#env#.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	7
end select
end macro
macro on_ui_time_signature(	#env#)
if	#env#.mode_menu=	0
	set_eight_notes_bar_amount(		#env#)
elseif	#env#.mode_menu=	1
	update_rate_to_steps_menu(		#env#)
if	NI_CALLBACK_ID#	preset.load_cb
	check_new_meassure_to_table(		#env#)
end if
end if
	update_shown_envelope(		#env#)

end macro
macro set_env_mode(	#env#)
select	#env#.mode_menu
case	0
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#env#.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	#env#.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#env#.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
if	#env#.last_mode#	#env#.mode_menuand	#env#.last_mode#-	1
	#env#.rate:=	96
if	#env#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	#env#.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
end if
	#env#.last_mode :=	0
case	1
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#env#.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	#env#.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		#env#.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
if	#env#.last_mode#	#env#.mode_menuand	#env#.last_mode#-	1
	#env#.rate:=	3
for	i:=	0to	99
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
end if
	update_rate_to_steps_menu(		#env#)
	#env#.last_mode :=	1
end select
if	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_INITand	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDand	preset.is_loading#	1
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_envelope_target
end if
end macro
macro on_ui_table_copy(	#env#)
on ui_control(	#env#.table_copy)
for	i:=	0to	99
	env_copy_array_A[	i]:=	#env#.rhythm_A[	i]
	env_copy_array_B[	i]:=	#env#.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
	env_copy_active :=	1
	wait(		500)
	#env#.table_copy :=	0
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_table_paste(	#env#)
on ui_control(	#env#.table_paste)
if	env_copy_active=	1
for	i:=	0to	99
if	#env#.mode_menu=	0
	#env#.rhythm[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
end if
	#env#.rhythm_A[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
	#env#.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env_copy_array_B[	i]
end for


	#env#.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	_on_controller
	wait(		500)
end if
	#env#.table_paste :=	0
end on
end macro
macro declare_grain_vars_singletons()


declare	GRAIN.instance_slots[] :=(	1,	2)
declareconst	MAX_NOTE_INPUT :=	30
declareconst	MAX_VOICES_PER_SLOT :=	1
const	EVENT_STATE
	INPUT_NOTE 	:=	50
	ATTACK     	:=	51
	DECAY 		:=	52
	SUSTAIN 	:=	53
	RELEASE 	:=	54
	ENDED 		:=	55
end const

const	POS_MOVE
	BACKWARD :=-	1
	FORWARD  :=	1
end const


declare	!SYNC_NAMES[] :=(	"2",	"1",	"1/2",	"1/4",	"1/4t",	"1/8",	"1/8t",	"1/16",	"1/16t",	"1/32",	"1/64")


declare	grain_zone_id
declare	grain_zone_event_id
declare	grain_zone_i
declare	grain_zone_n
declare	grain_zone_not_purged
declareread	zone_id_group[	NUM_INSTRUMENT_ENTRIES]
declarepers	zone_length_array[	NUM_INSTRUMENT_ENTRIES] :=(-	1)

declareread	grain_load_pos_A[	NUM_INSTRUMENT_ENTRIES] :=(	0)
declareread	grain_load_pos_B[	NUM_INSTRUMENT_ENTRIES] :=(	1000)


	load_array(		zone_id_group, 		2)
	load_array(		zone_length_array, 		2)
	load_array(		grain_load_pos_A, 		2)
	load_array(		grain_load_pos_B, 		2)






end macro
macro GRAIN.init_instance_vars(	#l#)

declare	#l#.zone_id

	set_bounds(		#l#.lbl_grain_release_value, 		#l#.knb_grain_release->		x-		6, 		180, 		#l#.knb_grain_release->		width+		12, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#l#.lbl_grain_release_value), 		UIpage_#l#, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

declareread	#l#.slices :=	0
declare	#l#.slice_positions[	60] :=(-	1)

declareconst	#l#.ID :=	M
declareconst	#l#.BLIP_ID :=-	1-	#l#.ID
declare	#l#.slot :=	GRAIN.instance_slots[	#l#.ID]
declare	#l#.trg_id

declare	#l#.dur
declare	#l#.vol
declarepolyphonic	#l#.cur_vol
declarepolyphonic	#l#.att_vol
declare	#l#.g_id
declare	#l#.left_clip
declare	#l#.right_clip


declarepersui_knob	#l#.Len(	5,	300,	1)
	set_knob_properties(		#l#.Len, 		"Length", 		5)

	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#l#.Len), 		UIpage_#l#, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

declarereadui_knob	#l#.Detune_knob(	0,	500000,	1)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#l#.Detune_Knob), 		UIpage_#l#, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
	set_text(		#l#.Detune_knob, 		"Detune")
declare	#l#.detune
	update_detune_for_fam(		#l#)

declarepersui_knob	#l#.Rand_Pan(	0,	1000,	10)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#l#.Rand_Pan), 		UIpage_#l#, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
	set_text(		#l#.Rand_Pan, 		"Pan")



	declare_adsr_ctrl(		#l#, 		ATT, 		0, 		4000, 		1000, 		" sec", 		700, 		135, 		UIpage_#l#, 		700-		12, 		110, 		ATK)
	declare_adsr_ctrl(		#l#, 		DEC, 		1, 		8000, 		1000, 		" sec", 		780, 		135, 		UIpage_#l#, 		780-		12, 		110, 		DEC)
	declare_adsr_ctrl(		#l#, 		SUS, -		64000, 		0, 		1000, 		" dB", 		700, 		205, 		UIpage_#l#, 		700-		12, 		180, 		SUS)
	declare_adsr_ctrl(		#l#, 		REL, 		1, 		8000, 		1000, 		" sec", 		780, 		205, 		UIpage_#l#, 		780-		12, 		180, 		REL)

declare	#l#.adsr_ctrl_ids[	4] :=(-	1)

	#l#.adsr_ctrl_ids[	0] :=	get_ui_id(	#l#.ATT)
	#l#.adsr_ctrl_ids[	1] :=	get_ui_id(	#l#.DEC)
	#l#.adsr_ctrl_ids[	2] :=	get_ui_id(	#l#.SUS)
	#l#.adsr_ctrl_ids[	3] :=	get_ui_id(	#l#.REL)





declareread	#l#.active :=	1

declarepersui_menu	#l#.group
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#l#.group), 		UIpage_#l#, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
for	#l#.g_id :=	0to	3-	1
	add_menu_item(		#l#.group, 		group_name(		#l#.g_id), 		#l#.g_id)
end for
end macro
macro declare_adsr_ctrl(	#fam#, 	#name#, 	#min#, 	#max#, 	#dis_div#, 	#unit#, 	#x#, 	#y#, 	#page#, 	#lbl_x#, 	#lbl_y#, 	#screen_name#)
declarereadui_slider	#fam#.#name#(	#min#,	#max#)
declareconst	#fam#.#name#_dis_div :=	#dis_div#
declare	@#fam#.#name#.unit :=	#unit#
	set_slider_properties(		#fam#.#name#, 		10000, 		"knob_uni", -		800)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.#name#, 		#x#, 		#y#, 		40, 		33)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.#name#), 		#page#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	link_control_to_ep(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.#name#), 		0, -		1, -		1, 		0)

declareui_label	#fam#.#name#_value_label(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		#fam#.#name#_value_label, 		"#screen_name#", 		"", 		1, 		font_value_label, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.#name#_value_label, 		#lbl_x#, 		#lbl_y#, 		#fam#.#name#->		width+		24, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.#name#_value_label), 		#page#, 		HIDE_PART_BG)
end macro
macro adsr_callback(	#var#, 	#txt#)
on ui_control(	#var#)

	set_current_control(		#var#, 		#var#/		#var#_dis_div&		"."&(		abs(		#var#)mod		#var#_dis_div)/(		#var#_dis_div/		10)&(		abs(		#var#)mod(		#var#_dis_div/		10))/(		#var#_dis_div/		100)&		#var#.unit, 		#var#_value_label, 		"#txt#")
	#var#->	label :=	#var#/	#var#_dis_div&	"."&(	abs(	#var#)mod	#var#_dis_div)/(	#var#_dis_div/	10)&(	abs(	#var#)mod(	#var#_dis_div/	10))/(	#var#_dis_div/	100)&	#var#.unit
end on
end macro
macro adsr_callback_scaled(	#var#, 	#txt#)
on ui_control(	#var#)
	h :=	vol_compensation(	#var#)

	set_current_control(		#var#, 		#var#/		#var#_dis_div&		"."&(		abs(		h)mod		#var#_dis_div)/(		#var#_dis_div/		10)&(		abs(		h)mod(		#var#_dis_div/		10))/(		#var#_dis_div/		100)&		#var#.unit, 		#var#_value_label, 		"#txt#")
	#var#->	label :=	#var#/	#var#_dis_div&	"."&(	abs(	h)mod	#var#_dis_div)/(	#var#_dis_div/	10)&(	abs(	h)mod(	#var#_dis_div/	10))/(	#var#_dis_div/	100)&	#var#.unit
end on
end macro
macro create_adsr_callbacks(	#l#)
	adsr_callback(		#l#.ATT, 		ATK)
	adsr_callback(		#l#.DEC, 		DEC)
	adsr_callback_scaled(		#l#.SUS, 		SUS)
	adsr_callback(		#l#.REL, 		REL)
end macro
macro update_grain_density(	#grain#)
if	#grain#.density_sync=	1
	#grain#.density :=(	#grain#.density_knob-	20)/(	70/	SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
	#grain#.density_knob->	label :=	SYNC_NAMES[	#grain#.density]
else
	#grain#.density :=	#grain#.density_knob ->	value
	#grain#.density_knob->	label :=	#grain#.density
end if

	set_current_control(		#grain#.density_knob, 		"", 		#grain#.density_value_label, 		"Density")
end macro
macro update_detune_for_fam(	#l#)
	#l#.detune :=	real_to_int(	pow((	int_to_real(	#l#.detune_knob)/	DETUNE_RANGE.0),	3.0)*	DETUNE_RANGE.0)
	#l#.detune_knob ->	label :=	#l#.detune/	10000&	"."&(	#l#.detunemod	10000)/	1000&(	#l#.detunemod	1000)/	100&	" ct"
end macro
macro fetch_slice_data(	#l#)
	#l#.slices :=	num_slices_zone(	zone_id_group[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]])
for	i :=	0to	num_elements(	#l#.slice_positions)-	1
if	i<	#l#.slices
	#l#.slice_positions[	i] :=	zone_slice_start(	zone_id_group[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]],	i)
else
	#l#.slice_positions[	i] :=-	1
end if
end for
end macro
macro get_grain_load_pos(	#l#)
if	btn_grain_load_setting=	1
	#l#.position_A :=	grain_load_pos_A[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]
	#l#.position_B :=	grain_load_pos_B[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]
else
	#l#.position_A :=	0
	#l#.position_B :=	1000
end if
	set_current_control(		#l#.position_A, 		"%", 		#l#.pos_A_value_label, 		"Pos A")
	set_current_control(		#l#.position_B, 		"%", 		#l#.pos_B_value_label, 		"Pos B")
call	set_pos_label_position
end macro
macro create_grain_callbacks(	#l#)











on ui_control(	#l#.position_A)
	set_current_control(		#l#.position_A, 		"%", 		#l#.pos_A_value_label, 		"Pos A")
call	set_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(	#l#.position_B)
	set_current_control(		#l#.position_B, 		"%", 		#l#.pos_B_value_label, 		"Pos B")
call	set_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(	#l#.pos_rand_knob)
	#l#.pos_rand :=	#l#.pos_rand_knob ->	value
	#l#.pos_rand_knob->	label :=	#l#.pos_rand_knob->	value/	10&	" %"
	set_current_control(		#l#.pos_rand_knob, 		"%", 		#l#.pos_rand_value_label, 		"Rand Pos")
end on

on ui_control(	#l#.density_knob)
	update_grain_density(		#l#)
end on

on ui_control(	#l#.density_sync)
	update_grain_density(		#l#)
end on

on ui_control(	#l#.knb_grain_attack)
	set_current_control(		#l#.knb_grain_attack, 		"ms", 		#l#.lbl_grain_attack_value, 		"Attack")
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, 		#l#.knb_grain_attack, 		grain1.group, 		0, -		1)
end on

on ui_control(	#l#.knb_grain_release)
	set_current_control(		#l#.knb_grain_release, 		"ms", 		#l#.lbl_grain_release_value, 		"Release")
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 		#l#.knb_grain_release, 		grain1.group, 		0, -		1)
end on

on ui_control(	#l#.position_choice)
call	check_env_latch_mode
end on






on ui_control(	#l#.Detune_knob)
	update_detune_for_fam(		grain1)
end on

on ui_control(	#l#.group)
	attach_zone(		#l#.wave_display, 		zone_id_group[		#l#.group], 		0)
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, 		grain1.knb_grain_attack, 		grain1.group, 		0, -		1)
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 		grain1.knb_grain_release, 		grain1.group, 		0, -		1)




end on

on ui_control(	#l#.xy_control)
if	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN
	click.x :=	grain_pos_to_px(	#l#.xy_control[	0])
if	in_range(	click.x,	#l#.pos_A_label->	x,	#l#.pos_A_label->	x+	#l#.pos_A_label->	width)
	grain.selected_label :=	0
elseif	in_range(	click.x,	#l#.pos_B_label->	x,	#l#.pos_B_label->	x+	#l#.pos_B_label->	width)
	grain.selected_label :=	1
end if
elseif	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
if	grain.selected_label=	0
	#l#.position_A :=	real_to_int(	#l#.xy_control[	0]*	1000.0)
elseif	grain.selected_label=	1
	#l#.position_B :=	real_to_int(	#l#.xy_control[	0]*	1000.0)
end if
call	set_pos_label_position()
else
	grain.selected_label :=-	1

end if
end on

end macro

	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.retrigger), 		UIpage_#page#, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

declareui_label	#fam#.retrigger_label(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		#fam#.retrigger_label, 		"Retrigger", 		"empty_picture", 		0, 		font_main_big_white, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.retrigger_label, 		446, 		324, 		70, 		23)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.retrigger_label), 		UIpage_#page#, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)











declareui_button	#fam#.table_copy
	set_button_properties(		#fam#.table_copy, 		"Copy", 		"btn_bevel", 		1, 		font_main_big_grey, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.table_copy, 		475, 		410, 		94, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.table_copy), 		UIpage_#page#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.table_copy, 		font_main_big_array)
	#fam#.table_copy->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

declareui_button	#fam#.table_paste
	set_button_properties(		#fam#.table_paste, 		"Paste", 		"btn_bevel", 		1, 		font_main_big_grey, 		0)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.table_paste, 		575, 		410, 		94, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.table_paste), 		UIpage_#page#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.table_paste, 		font_main_big_array)
	#fam#.table_paste->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

declareui_button	#fam#.envelope_A_edit
	set_button_properties(		#fam#.envelope_A_edit, 		"A", 		"btn_a-b", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		3)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.envelope_A_edit, 		175+		500+		20, 		338, 		37, 		25)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.envelope_A_edit), 		UIpage_#page#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.envelope_A_edit, 		font_main_big_array)
	#fam#.envelope_A_edit->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

declareui_button	#fam#.envelope_B_edit
	set_button_properties(		#fam#.envelope_B_edit, 		"B", 		"btn_a-b", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		3)
	set_bounds(		#fam#.envelope_B_edit, 		175+		500+		20+		37, 		338, 		37, 		25)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		#fam#.envelope_B_edit), 		UIpage_#page#, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		#fam#.envelope_B_edit, 		font_main_big_array)
	#fam#.envelope_B_edit->	disable_text_shifting :=	1







declareread	#fam#.rhythm_A[	100]
declareread	#fam#.rhythm_B[	100]
declare	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	100]
declare	#fam#.morph_label_shift[	100,	2]

end macro
macro transfer_slice_pos(	#i#, 	#n#, 	#grenv#, 	#AB#)
	#n# :=	0
	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=-	1
	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=-	1
	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=-	1

while	#n#<	num_elements(	#grenv#.slices_in_table)and	#grenv#.slices_in_table[	#n#]#-	1
if	#grenv#.rhythm_#AB#[	#i#]<=	#grenv#.slices_in_table[	#n#]
	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	#grenv#.slices_in_table[	#n#]-	#grenv#.rhythm_#AB#[	#i#]
else
	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	#grenv#.rhythm_#AB#[	#i#]-	#grenv#.slices_in_table[	#n#]
end if

if	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	1]=-	1or	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	2]<	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	1]
	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=	#grenv#.slices_in_table[	#n#]
	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	2]
end if
	inc(		#n#)
end while

if	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	0]#-	1
	#grenv#.rhythm_#AB#[	#i#] :=	#grenv#.hold_slice_calc[	0]
end if
end macro
macro set_up_global_arp_controls()

declareui_label	rhythm_morph_indicators[	100](	1,	1)
for	i :=	0to	num_elements(	rhythm_morph_indicators)-	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	z_layer:=	1
	set_label_properties(		rhythm_morph_indicators[		i], 		"", 		"lbl_engine_morphindicator")
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	picture_state :=	0
	assign_to_page(		rhythm_morph_indicators[		i], 		UIpage_Main, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end for

declareui_label	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	100](	1,	1)
for	i :=	0to	num_elements(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators)-	1
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	z_layer:=	0
	set_label_properties(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		i], 		"", 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	assign_to_page(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		i], 		UIpage_Main, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end for



declareui_label	engine_grey_out(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		engine_grey_out, 		"", 		"lbl_darken")
	set_bounds(		engine_grey_out, 		198, 		300, 		232, 		100)
	set_control_par(		engine_grey_out, 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		engine_grey_out), 		UIpage_MAIN, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
	engine_grey_out->	picture_state:=	0

	set_bounds(		rhythm_swing, 		130, 		473, 		120, 		36)

declareread	humanize_max





declare	!engine_active_texts[]:=(	"1",	"2",	"3",	"4")
declare	engine_active_slot

declare	xy_cursor_pos_x
declare	tb_idx_borders[	100]
declare	update_specific :=	0
declare	label_pos_y_A
declare	label_pos_y_B
declare	~height_per_value
declare	tablequery_min
declare	tablequery_max
declare	tablequery_idx
declare	step_value_diff
declare	shift_buffer[	100]
declare	morph_label_shift[	100,	2]
