macro _arp_on_input(	#arp#)
if	#arp#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	#arp#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	#arp#.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	#arp#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	#arp#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	#arp#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	#arp#.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	#arp#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	#arp#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	#arp#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end macro
macro specific_table_update(	#arp#)
	label_pos_y_A:=(	#arp#.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	#arp#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	#arp#.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	#arp#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	#arp#.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	#arp#.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	#arp#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	#arp#.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	#arp#.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	#arp#.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	#arp#.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	#arp#.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	#arp#.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	#arp#.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	#arp#.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	#arp#.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	#arp#.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if
end macro
macro update_inactive_steps(	#engine#, 	#array#)
for	i:=	#engine#.stepsto	num_elements(	#array#)-	1
	#array#[	i] :=	#array#[	imod	#engine#.steps]
	#engine#.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	#engine#.rhythm_playback[	imod	#engine#.steps]
end for
end macro
macro set_up_arp(	#fam#)
function	run_#fam#
	#fam#.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	#fam#.latch_mode#	0
	#fam#.a :=	0

if	#fam#.cursor#	0
call	#fam#_sort_fill_buffer
end if

if	#fam#.bar_reset_active#	0
if	#fam#.bar_count>=	#fam#.bar_limit
	#fam#.aa :=	0
	#fam#.bar_count :=	0
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
	#fam#.n :=	0
	#fam#.s :=	0

end if
end if



if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_#fam#and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	#fam#.i :=	0to	31
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	#fam#.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	#fam#.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	#fam#.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	#fam#.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]#	0
if	#fam#.loop_cursor#	0
if(	#fam#.note_order=	14)
for	s:=	0to	#fam#.i
	note_off(		#fam#.chord_buffer[		s])
	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	s] :=-	1
end for
	#fam#.i :=	0
while(	#fam#.i<	#fam#.loop_cursor)
if	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]#	0
	#fam#.velo :=	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]
end if
if(	#fam#.velo>	127)
	#fam#.velo :=	127
end if
if(	#fam#.velo<	1)
	#fam#.velo :=	1
end if

	#fam#.note :=	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.i]
	#fam#.note :=	#fam#.note+	#fam#.oct_cursor*	12
	#fam#.note :=	#fam#.note+	#fam#.transpose


if	#fam#.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	#fam#.i] :=	#fam#.note_to_engine
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	#fam#.i] :=	#fam#.note_to_engine
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
end if
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	#fam#.i] :=	#fam#.note_to_engine
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
end if
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	#fam#.i] :=	#fam#.note_to_engine
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	#fam#.i]#-	1
if	in_range(	#fam#.chord_last_notes[	#fam#.i],	instr_min_key[	#fam#.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	#fam#.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	#fam#.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	#fam#.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		#fam#.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		#fam#.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	#fam#.a] :=	midi_pos[	#fam#.a]+	1
end if
end if
end if

	#fam#.chord_buffer[	#fam#.i] :=	#fam#.note_id
	inc(		#fam#.i)
end while

if	#fam#.note_repeat=	0
	#fam#.aa :=	#fam#.loop_cursor
else
	inc(		#fam#.aa)
if(	#fam#.aa>	#fam#.note_repeat)
	#fam#.aa :=	0
if(	#fam#.octave>	0)
	inc(		#fam#.oct_cursor)
if(	#fam#.oct_cursor>	#fam#.octave)
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	#fam#.octave<	0)
	dec(		#fam#.oct_cursor)
if(	#fam#.oct_cursor<	#fam#.octave)
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

if	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]#	0
	#fam#.velo :=	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]
end if
if(	#fam#.velo>	127)
	#fam#.velo :=	127
end if
if(	#fam#.velo<	1)
	#fam#.velo :=	1
end if

if	#fam#.note_repeat#	0
	#fam#.note :=	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.s]
	inc(		#fam#.n)
if	#fam#.n>	#fam#.repeat_max
	#fam#.n :=	0
	inc(		#fam#.s)
	#fam#.aa :=	#fam#.s
end if
else
	#fam#.note :=	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.aa]
	inc(		#fam#.aa)
end if
	#fam#.note :=	#fam#.note+	#fam#.oct_cursor*	12
	#fam#.note :=	#fam#.note+	#fam#.transpose

for	#fam#.a :=	0to	4-	1
if	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.a]#-	1
	note_off(		#fam#.last_note_ids[		#fam#.a])
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.a] :=-	1
end if
end for

if	#fam#.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.note_id
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.note_id
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
end if
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.note_id
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
end if
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	#fam#.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]>	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	#fam#.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.a]*	12)
if	#fam#.note_to_engine<	0
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	#fam#.note_to_engine>	127
	#fam#.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.note_id
	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	#fam#.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		#fam#.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	in_range(	#fam#.note_to_engine,	instr_min_key[	#fam#.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	#fam#.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	#fam#.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	#fam#.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	#fam#.note_to_engine,	#fam#.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		#fam#.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		#fam#.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	#fam#.a] :=	midi_pos[	#fam#.a]+	1
end if
end if


if	#fam#.s>=	#fam#.loop_cursor
	#fam#.s :=	0
	#fam#.aa :=	0
if(	#fam#.octave>	0)
	inc(		#fam#.oct_cursor)
if(	#fam#.oct_cursor>	#fam#.octave)
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	#fam#.octave<	0)
	dec(		#fam#.oct_cursor)
if(	#fam#.oct_cursor<	#fam#.octave)
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseif	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]=	0
if	#fam#.rhythm_skip=	1
if	#fam#.note_repeat#	0
if	#fam#.act_step=	0
	dec(		#fam#.n)
if	#fam#.n<	0
	#fam#.n :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	#fam#.act_step=	0
	dec(		#fam#.aa)
end if
if	#fam#.aa<	0
	#fam#.aa :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	#fam#.note_repeat#	0
	inc(		#fam#.n)
if	#fam#.note_order=	14
	inc(		#fam#.aa)
end if
else
	inc(		#fam#.aa)
end if

end if
if	#fam#.note_order#	14
if	#fam#.n>	#fam#.repeat_max
	#fam#.n :=	0

	#fam#.aa :=	#fam#.s
end if
end if
end if

if	#fam#.bar_reset_active#	0
	inc(		#fam#.bar_count)
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	#fam#.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	#fam#.real_hold*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	#fam#.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1)))
if	#fam#.act_step=	0
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
if	#fam#.indicator_hold>	#fam#.t
	#fam#.t :=	#fam#.indicator_hold
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	#fam#.real_hold)+	1
else
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	#fam#.real_hold)
end if



if	#fam#.note_repeat=	0
if(	#fam#.aa>=	#fam#.loop_cursor)
	#fam#.aa :=	0
if(	#fam#.octave>	0)
	inc(		#fam#.oct_cursor)
if(	#fam#.oct_cursor>	#fam#.octave)
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	#fam#.octave<	0)
	dec(		#fam#.oct_cursor)
if(	#fam#.oct_cursor<	#fam#.octave)
	#fam#.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
	inc(		#fam#.act_step)
if(	#fam#.act_step>=	#fam#.steps)
	#fam#.act_step :=	0
	#fam#.t :=	0
end if

select	#fam#.rate
case	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

if	engine_half_time=	1
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length/	2
end if

if(	#fam#.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length+(	#fam#.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length+(	#fam#.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		#fam#.swing_cursor)

if	#fam#.humanize_hold#	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length-	abs(	#fam#.humanize_hold)
end if
	#fam#.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length+	#fam#.humanize_hold





if	#fam#.cursor#	0
	wait(		#fam#.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_#fam#_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	#fam#.cursor-	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	#fam#.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	#fam#.note_selection#	0and	#fam#.cursor#	0
	sort(		#fam#.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	#fam#.note_selection_hold
case	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	1]
if	#fam#.cursor>	1
if	#fam#.cursor=	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	2]
end if
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor/	2]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	#fam#.cursor>	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	#fam#.cursor=	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	#fam#.cursor>	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	#fam#.cursor=	1
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	#fam#.note_selection=	0and	#fam#.cursor#	0
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	#fam#.cursor
end if
end function

function	#fam#_sort_fill_buffer
call	set_#fam#_note_selection
while(	#fam#.a<	128)
if(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor)
	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.a]
else
	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a] :=	0
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.a] :=	0
end if
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	sort(		#fam#.ordered, 		1)
	#fam#.min_note :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	1]
	#fam#.max_note :=	#fam#.ordered[	0]

select(	#fam#.note_order)
case	2
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	1-	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
case	3
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
case	4
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	1-	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor>	2)
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=(	#fam#.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a+	#fam#.selected_cursor] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a+	1]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
end if
case	5
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor>	2)
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=(	#fam#.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a+	#fam#.selected_cursor] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2-	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
end if
case	6
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	1)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.max_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	3)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.ordered[	2]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	0]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	2] :=	#fam#.ordered[	1]
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor>	3)
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	#fam#.a-	1]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	#fam#.a-	3]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=(	2*	#fam#.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	7
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	1)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.max_note
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	3)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.ordered[	0]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	2]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	2] :=	#fam#.ordered[	1]
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor>	3)
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a+	2]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=(	2*	#fam#.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	8
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	1)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.max_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	3)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.ordered[	2]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	0]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	2] :=	#fam#.ordered[	1]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	3] :=	#fam#.ordered[	0]
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor>	3)
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	#fam#.a-	1]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	#fam#.a-	3]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	3)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+((	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a+	2]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+((	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a+	1]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=(	4*	#fam#.selected_cursor)-	10
end if
case	9
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	1)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.max_note
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.min_note
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor=	3)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.ordered[	0]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	2]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	2] :=	#fam#.ordered[	1]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	3] :=	#fam#.ordered[	2]
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	#fam#.selected_cursor>	3)
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a+	2]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	3)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+((	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	#fam#.a-	3]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+((	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	#fam#.a-	2]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=(	4*	#fam#.selected_cursor)-	10
end if

case	10to	13
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor
	#fam#.a :=	0
while((	#fam#.a*	2)<	#fam#.selected_cursor)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	1-	#fam#.a]
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a*	2)+	1] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor
if(	#fam#.note_order=	11or	#fam#.note_order=	13)
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.loop_cursor)
	#fam#.help_buffer[	#fam#.loop_cursor-	#fam#.a-	1] :=	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.loop_cursor)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.help_buffer[	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
end if
if((	#fam#.note_order=	12or	#fam#.note_order=	13)and	#fam#.selected_cursor>	2)
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[(	#fam#.a)+(	#fam#.selected_cursor)] :=	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.selected_cursor-	2-	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor*	2-	2
end if
case	14
	#fam#.loop_cursor :=	#fam#.selected_cursor
	#fam#.a :=	0
while(	#fam#.a<	#fam#.selected_cursor)
	#fam#.loop_buffer[	#fam#.a] :=	#fam#.ordered[	#fam#.a]
	inc(		#fam#.a)
end while
end select
end function
end macro
macro set_up_env(	#fam#)
function	run_#fam#
	#fam#.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	#fam#.latch_mode#	0

call	set_#fam#_note_selection

if	#fam#.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	#fam#.i :=	0
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	#fam#.i :=	1
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	#fam#.i :=	2
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	#fam#.i :=	3
end if

if	assigned_instruments[	2,	#fam#.i]#	0

	#fam#.instr_in_slot :=	loaded_instruments[	#fam#.i]
	mf_insert_event(		#fam#.i, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		transport_stamp-		ms_to_ticks(		12000), 		MIDI_COMMAND_CC, 		dyn_cc_num, 		#fam#.rhythm_playback[		#fam#.act_step])
for	#fam#.a :=	0to	#fam#.selected_cursor-	1
	#fam#.engine_note_hold :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.a]
if	#fam#.active_notes[	0,	#fam#.engine_note_hold]=	1and	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.engine_note_hold]=	0
	#fam#.octaved_note :=	#fam#.engine_note_hold+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#fam#.i]*	12)
if	#fam#.octaved_note<	0
	#fam#.octaved_note :=	0
elseif	#fam#.octaved_note>	127
	#fam#.octaved_note :=	127
end if
	#fam#.note_id :=	play_note(	#fam#.octaved_note,	50,	0,-	1)
	#fam#.current_engine_notes[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.engine_note_hold] :=	#fam#.octaved_note
	#fam#.active_notes[	1,	#fam#.engine_note_hold] :=	1
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.engine_note_hold] :=	#fam#.note_id
	_allow_groups(		2, 		#fam#.note_id, 		#fam#.i)

	midi_ids[	#fam#.i] :=	mf_insert_event(	#fam#.i,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	12000),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	#fam#.octaved_note,	100)
	#fam#.mf_note_ids[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.engine_note_hold] :=	midi_ids[	#fam#.i]
	#fam#.note_entry_time[	#fam#.engine_note_hold] :=	NI_SONG_POSITION
	midi_pos[	#fam#.i] :=	midi_pos[	#fam#.i]+	1
end if
end for
end if

if	#fam#.note_selection>	0
if	#fam#.cursor>	#fam#.selected_cursor
for	#fam#.a:=	0to	127
if	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.a]#	0
	#fam#.note_check :=	1
for	#fam#.m:=	0to	#fam#.selected_cursor-	1
if	#fam#.a=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.m]
	#fam#.note_check :=	0
end if
end for
if	#fam#.note_check=	1
	mf_set_event_par(		#fam#.mf_note_ids[		#fam#.i,		#fam#.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		#fam#.note_entry_time[		#fam#.a])
	note_off(		#fam#.last_note_ids[		#fam#.i,		#fam#.a])
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.a] :=	0
	#fam#.active_notes[	1,	#fam#.a] :=	0
	#fam#.current_engine_notes[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.a] :=	0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_#fam#and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	#fam#.i:=	0to	99
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	#fam#.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	#fam#.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	#fam#.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	#fam#.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	#fam#.mode_menu=	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	#fam#.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	#fam#.rate)
case	95
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length/	2
case	97
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	2
case	98
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	3
case	99
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	4
end select
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length/	100
elseif	#fam#.mode_menu=	1
select(	#fam#.rate)
case	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	#fam#.step_length<	5000)
	#fam#.step_length :=	5000
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	#fam#.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	#fam#.real_hold*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	#fam#.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1)))
if	#fam#.act_step=	0
	#fam#.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	#fam#.real_hold*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	#fam#.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1)))
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
if	#fam#.mode_menu=	0
if	#fam#.act_stepmod	2=	0
	#fam#.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	#fam#.real_hold*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	#fam#.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1)))
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
else
	#fam#.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	#fam#.real_hold*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	#fam#.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	#fam#.act_step+	1)))
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
end if
if	#fam#.indicator_hold>	#fam#.t
	#fam#.t :=	#fam#.indicator_hold
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	#fam#.real_hold)+	1
else
	#fam#.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	#fam#.real_hold)
end if


if	engine_half_time=	1
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length/	2
end if

if	#fam#.mode_menu=	1
if(	#fam#.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length+(	#fam#.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length+(	#fam#.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		#fam#.swing_cursor)

if	#fam#.humanize_hold>	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length-	#fam#.humanize_hold
elseif	#fam#.humanize_hold<	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length+	#fam#.humanize_hold
end if
	#fam#.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length+	#fam#.humanize_hold
end if

if	#fam#.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	set_controller(		102, 		#fam#.rhythm_playback[		#fam#.act_step])
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	set_controller(		103, 		#fam#.rhythm_playback[		#fam#.act_step])
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	set_controller(		104, 		#fam#.rhythm_playback[		#fam#.act_step])
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	set_controller(		105, 		#fam#.rhythm_playback[		#fam#.act_step])
end if

	inc(		#fam#.act_step)
if(	#fam#.act_step>=	#fam#.steps)
	#fam#.act_step :=	0
	#fam#.t :=	0
if	#fam#.retrigger=	1
for	#fam#.i :=	0to	4-	1
for	#fam#.a :=	0to	127
if	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.a]#	0
	note_off(		#fam#.last_note_ids[		#fam#.i,		#fam#.a])
	#fam#.last_note_ids[	#fam#.i,	#fam#.a] :=	0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
if	#fam#.cursor#	0
	wait(		#fam#.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_#fam#_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	#fam#.cursor-	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	#fam#.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	#fam#.note_selection#	0and	#fam#.cursor#	0
	sort(		#fam#.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	#fam#.note_selection
case	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	1]
if	#fam#.cursor>	1
if	#fam#.cursor=	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	2]
end if
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor/	2]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	#fam#.cursor>	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	#fam#.cursor=	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	#fam#.cursor>	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	#fam#.cursor=	1
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	#fam#.note_selection=	0and	#fam#.cursor#	0
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	#fam#.cursor
end if
end function

end macro
macro GRAIN.on_note_instance(	#l#)
	message(		"Cauhgt Grain On Note. ACTIVE: "&		#l#.active)
if	#l#.active=	1and	in_range(	EVENT_NOTE+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#l#.slot]*	12),	instr_min_key[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]],	instr_max_key[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]])
	#l#.trg_id :=	play_note(	EVENT_NOTE+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	#l#.slot]*	12),	EVENT_VELOCITY,	0,	1)



	_allow_groups(		3, 		#l#.trg_id, 		#l#.slot)
	change_vol(		#l#.trg_id, -		64000, 		0)
	set_event_par_arr(		#l#.trg_id, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		#l#.BLIP_ID, 		5)
	set_event_par(		#l#.trg_id, 		EVENT_PAR_1, 		EVENT_ID)
	set_event_par(		#l#.trg_id, 		EVENT_PAR_2, 		ENGINE_UPTIME)
	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		#l#.trg_id, 		14+		#l#.ID)
	message(		"zone id of group is "&		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		#l#.slot]])
if	zone_id_group[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]>=	0
	attach_zone(		#l#.wave_display, 		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		#l#.slot]], 		UI_WAVEFORM_TABLE_IS_BIPOLAR)
end if
end if
end macro
macro GRAIN.on_note()
	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		EVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE, 		5)
	literate_macro(		GRAIN.on_note_instance(			#l#)) on 		grain1,		grain2
end macro
macro GRAIN.on_release_instance(	#l#)
select	get_event_par_arr(	EVENT_ID,	EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,	5)

case	#l#.BLIP_ID
	message(		"Caught Grain Blip. EVENT_STATE: "&		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		5)&		"; G ACTIVE: "&		#l#.active)
while	get_event_par_arr(	EVENT_ID,	EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,	5)<	EVENT_STATE.ENDEDand	#l#.active=	1
	#l#.dur :=	ENGINE_UPTIME-	get_event_par(	EVENT_ID,	EVENT_PAR_2)




if	get_event_par_arr(	EVENT_ID,	EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,	5)=	EVENT_STATE.RELEASE
	#l#.vol :=	#l#.cur_vol-	64000*(	ENGINE_UPTIME-	get_event_par(	EVENT_ID,	EVENT_PAR_3))/	#l#.Rel
if	#l#.vol<-	64000
	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		EVENT_STATE.ENDED, 		5)
end if


elseif	#l#.dur<=	#l#.Att
	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		EVENT_STATE.ATTACK, 		5)
if	#l#.Att<=	#l#.density_knob
	#l#.cur_vol :=	0
else
	#l#.cur_vol :=-	64000+	#l#.dur*	64000/	#l#.Att
if	#l#.cur_vol>	0
	#l#.cur_vol :=	0
end if
end if
	#l#.att_vol :=	#l#.cur_vol
	#l#.vol :=	#l#.cur_vol


elseif	#l#.dur<=	#l#.Att+	#l#.Decand	#l#.att_vol>	#l#.Sus
	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		EVENT_STATE.DECAY, 		5)
	#l#.cur_vol :=	#l#.att_vol-(	#l#.att_vol-	#l#.Sus)*(	#l#.dur-	#l#.Att)/	#l#.Dec
	#l#.vol :=	#l#.cur_vol


else
	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		EVENT_STATE.SUSTAIN, 		5)
	#l#.cur_vol :=	#l#.Sus
	#l#.vol :=	#l#.cur_vol
end if



if	zone_length_array[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]>	0









if	#l#.position_A<=	#l#.position_B
	#l#.left_clip :=	zone_length_array[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]/	1000*	#l#.position_A
	#l#.right_clip :=	zone_length_array[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]/	1000*	#l#.position_B
else
	#l#.left_clip :=	zone_length_array[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]/	1000*	#l#.position_B
	#l#.right_clip :=	zone_length_array[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]/	1000*	#l#.position_A
end if

	#l#.play_pos :=(	zone_length_array[	loaded_instruments[	#l#.slot]]/	1000)*	#l#.pos


if	#l#.mnu_pos_rand_mode=	0
	#l#.play_pos :=	#l#.play_pos+	random(-	#l#.pos_rand_knob,	#l#.pos_rand_knob)*	300
if	#l#.play_pos<	#l#.left_clip
	#l#.play_pos :=	#l#.left_clip
end if
if	#l#.play_pos>	#l#.right_clip
	#l#.play_pos :=	#l#.right_clip
end if
elseif	#l#.mnu_pos_rand_mode=	1

	#l#.left_clip  :=	#l#.play_pos-((	#l#.play_pos-	#l#.left_clip)/	1000)*	#l#.pos_rand_knob
	#l#.right_clip :=	#l#.play_pos+((	#l#.right_clip-	#l#.play_pos)/	1000)*	#l#.pos_rand_knob
	#l#.play_pos :=(	#l#.play_pos+	get_event_par_arr(	EVENT_ID,	EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,	6))+((	300*	500)*	#l#.sample_pos_move_direction)

if	#l#.play_pos<	#l#.left_clip
	#l#.play_pos :=	#l#.left_clip
	#l#.sample_pos_move_direction :=	POS_MOVE.FORWARD
end if
if	#l#.play_pos>	#l#.right_clip
	#l#.play_pos :=	#l#.right_clip
	#l#.sample_pos_move_direction :=	POS_MOVE.BACKWARD
end if
	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		#l#.play_pos-((		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		#l#.slot]]/		1000)*		#l#.pos), 		6)
end if


end if

	#l#.g_id :=	play_note(	EVENT_NOTE,	EVENT_VELOCITY,	#l#.play_pos,	#l#.Len*	1000)



	_allow_groups(		3, 		#l#.g_id, 		#l#.slot)
	change_tune(		#l#.g_id, 		random(-		#l#.detune,		#l#.detune), 		0)
	change_pan(		#l#.g_id, 		random(-		#l#.Rand_Pan,		#l#.Rand_Pan), 		0)
	#l#.vol :=	vol_compensation(	#l#.vol)

	change_vol(		#l#.g_id, 		#l#.vol, 		0)
	set_ui_wf_property(		#l#.wave_display, 		UI_WF_PROP_PLAY_CURSOR, 		0, 		#l#.play_pos)

if	#l#.density_sync=	0

	#l#.repetition_time :=	1000000/(	#l#.density/	2)

else
select(	#l#.density)
case	0
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_QUARTER*	8
case	1
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_QUARTER*	4
case	2
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_QUARTER*	2
case	3
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	4
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
case	5
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	6
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	8
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	9
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	10
	#l#.repetition_time :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
end select
end if

	wait(		#l#.repetition_time)

end while

case	EVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE

if	get_event_par_arr(	EVENT_ID,	EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,	14+	#l#.ID)#	0
	set_event_par(		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		14+		#l#.ID), 		EVENT_PAR_3, 		ENGINE_UPTIME)
	set_event_par_arr(		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		14+		#l#.ID), 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		EVENT_STATE.RELEASE, 		5)
end if
end select
end macro
macro GRAIN.on_release()
	literate_macro(		GRAIN.on_release_instance(			#l#)) on 		grain1,		grain2
end macro
macro set_up_grenv(	#fam#, 	#rel#, 	#slot_id#)
function	run_#fam#
	#fam#.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	search(	KEY_DOWN,	1)#-	1and	#fam#.latch_mode#	0

if	#fam#.callback_id=	grenv1.callback_id
	#fam#.i :=	0
elseif	#fam#.callback_id=	grenv2.callback_id
	#fam#.i :=	1






end if


if	see_page=	UIpage_#rel#and	loaded_instruments[	#slot_id#]#-	1
if	btn_engine_page_engine=	1
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
end if
for	#fam#.i:=	0to	99
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	#fam#.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	#fam#.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	#fam#.rhythm_indicator[	#fam#.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	#fam#.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	#fam#.mode_menu=	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	#fam#.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	#fam#.rate)
case	95
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length/	2
case	97
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	2
case	98
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	3
case	99
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	4
case	100
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	6
case	101
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length*	8
end select
	#fam#.step_length :=	#fam#.step_length/	100
elseif	#fam#.mode_menu=	1
select(	#fam#.rate)
case	0
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	#fam#.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	#fam#.step_length<	5000)
	#fam#.step_length :=	5000
end if



























if	#rel#.position_choice=	2
if	#rel#.position_A<=	#rel#.position_B
	#rel#.pos :=	#rel#.position_A+	real_to_int((	int_to_real(	#rel#.position_B-	#rel#.position_A)/	127.0)*	int_to_real(	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]))
else
	#rel#.pos :=	#rel#.position_A-	real_to_int((	int_to_real(	#rel#.position_A-	#rel#.position_B)/	127.0)*	int_to_real(	#fam#.rhythm_playback[	#fam#.act_step]))
end if
	#rel#.pos_knob :=	1000-	real_to_int(	1000.00/	int_to_real(	#rel#.position_B-	#rel#.position_A)*	int_to_real(	#rel#.position_B-	#rel#.pos))
end if









	inc(		#fam#.act_step)
if(	#fam#.act_step>=	#fam#.steps)
	#fam#.act_step :=	0










end if
if	search(	KEY_DOWN,	1)#-	1
	wait(		#fam#.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_#fam#_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	#fam#.cursor-	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	#fam#.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	#fam#.note_selection#	0and	#fam#.cursor#	0
	sort(		#fam#.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	#fam#.note_selection
case	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	1]
if	#fam#.cursor>	1
if	#fam#.cursor=	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor-	2]
end if
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	#fam#.cursor/	2]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	#fam#.cursor>	1
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	#fam#.cursor=	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	#fam#.cursor>	2
	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	#fam#.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	#fam#.cursor=	1
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	#fam#.note_selection=	0and	#fam#.cursor#	0
	#fam#.selected_cursor :=	#fam#.cursor
end if
end function

end macro

macro fill_assign_menu(	#menu#, 	#slot#)
for	i:=	0to	assign_slot_list.SIZE-	1
if	static_slot_list_exceptions[	#slot#,	i]#	0
	add_menu_item(		#menu#, 		assign_slot_list[		i], 		i)
end if
end for
end macro
macro set_up_instr_browser()
family	instr_browser




















declare	instr_ids[] :=(	1,	2,	3,	133,	25,	5,	20,	31,	18,	6,	132,	9,	10,	11,	12,	13,	14,	15,	16,	17,	19,	134,	21,	34,	32,	7,	8,	22,	4,	23,	24,	33,	131,	26,	27,	28,	29,	30,-	1,	49,	37,	38,	39,	40,	41,	42,	43,	44,	48,	45,	50,	46,	68,	35,	54,	56,	36,	58,	59,	61,	62,	63,	64,	65,	67,	47,-	1,	69,	70,	71,	72,	73,	74,	75,	51,	52,	53,	76,	77,	55,	57,	78,	79,	80,	81,	60,	82,	83,	84,	66,	85,	86,-	1,	144,	87,	88,	89,	135,	143,	142,	138,	90,	91,	139,	136,	146,	147,	137,	145,	140,	92,	93,	141,-	1,	96,	97,	148,	149,	98,	94,	103,	99,	100,	102,	101,	95,-	1,	104,	105,	130,	129,	107,	108,	106,	109,-	1,	110,	111,	112,	113,	114,	115,	116,	117,	118,	119,	120,	121,	122,	123,	124,	125,	126,	127,	128,-	1)



declare	new_instr_ids[	71] :=(	0)
declare	instr_id_on_button[	7,	300] :=(-	1)
	s :=	0
	n :=	0
for	i :=	0to	7-	1
while	instr_browser.instr_ids[	s]#-	1
	instr_browser.instr_id_on_button[	i,	n] :=	instr_browser.instr_ids[	s]
	inc(		n)
	inc(		s)
end while
	n :=	0
	inc(		s)
end for

declareui_switch	empty
	set_button_properties(		instr_browser.empty, 		"Empty Slot", 		"empty_picture", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		0)
	set_bounds(		instr_browser.empty, 		248, 		313, 		110, 		27)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		instr_browser.empty), 		UIpage_INSTR_BROWSER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_font(		get_ui_id(		instr_browser.empty), 		font_main_instr_labels_array)
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		instr_browser.empty), 		CONTROL_PAR_ALLOW_AUTOMATION, 		0)
	instr_browser.empty->	disable_text_shifting :=	1


declare	!cat_names[] :=(	"Tonal",	"Tonal Effects",	"Non-Tonal Effects",	"Percussive",	"Hits",	"Particles",	"Sustains")

	set_button_properties(		instr_browser.btn_cat[		i], 		!instr_browser.cat_names[		i], 		"btn_a-b", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		0)
	set_bounds(		instr_browser.btn_cat[		i], 		263, 		157+(		21*		i), 		115, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		instr_browser.btn_cat[		i], 		UIpage_INSTR_BROWSER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	instr_browser.btn_cat[	i]->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
end for



declareui_button	instr[	7]

for	i:=	0to	6
	set_button_properties(		instr_browser.instr[		i], 		"", 		"btn_a-b", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		0)
	set_bounds(		instr_browser.instr[		i], 		386, 		157+(		21*		i), 		160, 		20)

	instr_browser.instr[	i]->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	instr_browser.instr_button_ids[	i] :=	instr_browser.instr[	i]

declareui_slider	scroll_handle(	0,	1000)
	set_slider_properties(		instr_browser.scroll_handle, 		1000, 		"lbl_scroll_slider", -		2500)

	set_label_properties(		instr_browser.scroll_handle_label, 		"", 		"lbl_scrollbar")
	set_bounds(		instr_browser.scroll_handle_label, 		555, 		157, 		2, 		147)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		instr_browser.scroll_handle_label), 		UIpage_INSTR_BROWSER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		instr_browser.scroll_handle_label), 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		0)

declare	current_instr_button_states[	2,	7]

macro on_ui_character_button(	#btn_idx#)
call	remote_character_buttons
	instr_browser.btn_cat[	#btn_idx#] ->	value :=	1
	instr_browser.current_character_selection :=	#btn_idx#
call	show_instr_button
call	build_instrument_scroll_menu
	instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=	1
call	update_scroll
	instr_browser.scrollstep_is_set :=	0
call	update_instrument_buttons
end macro
macro on_ui_instr_button(	#button#, 	#num#)
if	instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[	1,	#num#]=	0
	loaded_instruments[	instr_browser.active_instr_slot] :=	instr_browser.current_instr_button_states[	0,	#num#]
	slots_rrCount[	instr_browser.active_instr_slot] :=	0
	update_purge()

call	update_instr_labels
call	update_engine_visibility
call	update_assigned_instruments
call	load_grain_data
call	update_solo
call	update_instrument_buttons
call	update_fx_controls
call	update_key_colors
end if
call	double_click
	#button#:=	1
end macro
macro set_up_mixer()

family	mixer

declarereadui_switch	solo[	4]
declarereadui_switch	mute[	4]
declare	solo_hold[	4] :=(	1)
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_button_properties(		mixer.solo[		i], 		"", 		"btn_solo")
	set_switch_properties(		mixer.mute[		i], 		"", 		"btn_mute")
	set_bounds(		mixer.solo[		i], 		0, 		0, 		22, 		22)
	set_bounds(		mixer.mute[		i], 		0, 		0, 		22, 		22)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.solo[		i], 		UIpage_NONE, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.mute[		i], 		UIpage_NONE, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	set_control_par(		mixer.solo[		i], 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)
	set_control_par(		mixer.mute[		i], 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)
end for



declarereadui_slider	vol[	4](	0,	629800)
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_slider_properties(		mixer.vol[		i], 		397100, 		"slider_mixer", -		2000)
	set_bounds(		mixer.vol[		i], 		12+		110+		151*		slot_translation[		i], 		273, 		19, 		83)
	link_control_to_ep(		mixer.vol[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		5, 		i, 		0)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.vol[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
end for



declareui_label	vol_value[	4](	1,	1)
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_label_properties(		mixer.vol_value[		i], 		"LEVEL", 		"", 		1, 		font_value_label, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.vol_value[		i], 		12+		75+(		151*		slot_translation[		i]), 		250, 		83, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.vol_value[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_BG)
end for


declarereadui_slider	pan[	4](	0,	1000000)
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_slider_properties(		mixer.pan[		i], 		500000, 		"knob_bipolar", -		800)
	set_bounds(		mixer.pan[		i], 		38+		151*		slot_translation[		i], 		380, 		40, 		33)
	link_control_to_ep(		mixer.pan[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_PAN, -		1, -		1, 		0)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.pan[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
end for

declareui_label	pan_value[	4](	1,	1)
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_label_properties(		mixer.pan_value[		i], 		"PAN", 		"", 		1, 		font_value_label, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.pan_value[		i], 		23+(		151*		slot_translation[		i]), 		360, 		70, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.pan_value[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_BG)
end for


declarereadui_slider	senddel[	4](	0,	630000)
declarereadui_slider	senddel_min[	4](	0,	630000)
declarereadui_slider	senddel_max[	4](	0,	630000)
declarereadui_button	senddel_motion[	4]
declarereadui_button	senddel_motion_invert[	4]
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_slider_properties(		mixer.senddel[		i], 		320000, 		"knob_uni", -		800)
	set_slider_properties(		mixer.senddel_min[		i], 		0, 		"lbl_motion_slider", -		800)
	set_slider_properties(		mixer.senddel_max[		i], 		630000, 		"lbl_motion_slider", -		800)
	set_button_properties(		mixer.senddel_motion[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion")
	set_button_properties(		mixer.senddel_motion_invert[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion-invert")


	set_bounds(		mixer.senddel[		i], 		70+		151*		slot_translation[		i], 		171+		slot_position_offset[		i], 		40, 		33)
	set_bounds(		mixer.senddel_min[		i], 		70+		-50+		151*		slot_translation[		i], 		171+		6+		slot_position_offset[		i], 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		mixer.senddel_max[		i], 		70+		40+		151*		slot_translation[		i], 		171+		6+		slot_position_offset[		i], 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		mixer.senddel_motion[		i], 		70+		-22+		151*		slot_translation[		i], 		171+		42+		slot_position_offset[		i], 		53, 		14)
	set_bounds(		mixer.senddel_motion_invert[		i], 		70+		45+		151*		slot_translation[		i], 		171+		41+		slot_position_offset[		i], 		16, 		14)

	link_control_to_ep(		mixer.senddel[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, 		7, 		i, 		0)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.senddel[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.senddel_min[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.senddel_max[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.senddel_motion[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.senddel_motion_invert[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
end for

declareui_label	del_value[	4](	1,	1)
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_label_properties(		mixer.del_value[		i], 		"DELAY", 		"", 		1, 		font_value_label, 		0)

declarereadui_menu	output_menus[	4]
declare	!output_names[	6] :=(	"Default",	"Output 1",	"Output 2",	"Output 3",	"Output 4",	"Output 5")
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_menu_properties(		mixer.output_menus[		i], 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.output_menus[		i], 		12+(		151-		94)/		2+(		151*		slot_translation[		i])+		3, 		440, 		94, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.output_menus[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	set_control_par(		mixer.output_menus[		i], 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)
end for
	fill_output_menu(		mixer.output_menus0)
	fill_output_menu(		mixer.output_menus1)
	fill_output_menu(		mixer.output_menus2)
	fill_output_menu(		mixer.output_menus3)

declareui_label	rev_predelay_value_label(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		mixer.rev_predelay_value_label, 		"PRE-DLY", 		"", 		1, 		font_value_label, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_predelay_value_label, 		655-		18, 		350+		30+		30, 		70, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_predelay_value_label), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_BG)

declarereadui_slider	rev_time(	0,	1000000)
	set_slider_properties(		mixer.rev_time, 		0, 		"knob_uni", -		800)
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_time, 		710, 		350+		50+		30, 		40, 		33)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_time), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	link_control_to_ep(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_time), 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_TIME, 		0, 		0, 		0)

declareui_label	rev_time_value_label(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		mixer.rev_time_value_label, 		"TIME", 		"", 		1, 		font_value_label, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_time_value_label, 		710-		18, 		350+		30+		30, 		70, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_time_value_label), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_BG)

declarereadui_slider	rev_return(	0,	500000)
	set_slider_properties(		mixer.rev_return, 		397000, 		"knob_uni", -		800)
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_return, 		765, 		350+		50+		30, 		40, 		33)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_return), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	link_control_to_ep(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_return), 		ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		0, 		0, 		0)

declareui_label	rev_return_value_label(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		mixer.rev_return_value_label, 		"RETURN", 		"", 		1, 		font_value_label, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_return_value_label, 		765-		18, 		350+		30+		30, 		70, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_return_value_label), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_BG)

declare	!ir_names[] :=(	"1s Distorted",	"2s Bright Plate",	"4s Distorted Slap",	"4s Fast Slap",	"4s Rich",	"6s Bright Slaps",	"8s Distorted",	"9s Distorted Delay",	"10s Saturated",	"10s Panning Plate",	"13s Clean",	"14s Clean")
declarereadui_menu	ir_menu
	set_menu_properties(		mixer.ir_menu, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_grey, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.ir_menu, 		625+		30+		3, 		350+		30, 		150, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.ir_menu), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mixer.ir_names)-	1
	add_menu_item(		mixer.ir_menu, 		mixer.ir_names[		i], 		i)
end for
	set_font(		get_ui_id(		mixer.ir_menu), 		font_main_big_array)
	load_ir_sample(		mixer.ir_names[		mixer.ir_menu], 		0, 		0)

declareui_label	rev_ir_bg(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		mixer.rev_ir_bg, 		"", 		"lbl_mod_behind")
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_ir_bg, 		mixer.ir_menu->		x, 		mixer.ir_menu->		y, 		mixer.ir_menu->		width, 		mixer.ir_menu->		height)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_ir_bg), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declarereadui_menu	rev_preset_menu
	set_menu_properties(		mixer.rev_preset_menu, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_grey, 		0, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_preset_menu, 		625+		22, 		350+		30, 		130, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_preset_menu), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	rev_preset_names)-	1
	add_menu_item(		mixer.rev_preset_menu, 		rev_preset_names[		i], 		i)
end for
	set_font(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_preset_menu), 		font_main_big_array)

declareui_label	rev_preset_bg(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		mixer.rev_preset_bg, 		"", 		"lbl_mod_behind")
	set_bounds(		mixer.rev_preset_bg, 		mixer.rev_preset_menu->		x, 		mixer.rev_preset_menu->		y, 		mixer.rev_preset_menu->		width, 		mixer.rev_preset_menu->		height)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.rev_preset_bg), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declare	rev_preset_array[	100]




	add_level_meter(		vol1_meter_l, 		127+		151*		2, 		0, 		0)
	add_level_meter(		vol1_meter_r, 		130+		151*		2, 		0, 		1)
	add_level_meter(		vol2_meter_l, 		127+		151*		0, 		1, 		2)
	add_level_meter(		vol2_meter_r, 		130+		151*		0, 		1, 		3)
	add_level_meter(		vol3_meter_l, 		127+		151*		1, 		2, 		4)
	add_level_meter(		vol3_meter_r, 		130+		151*		1, 		2, 		5)
	add_level_meter(		vol4_meter_l, 		127+		151*		3, 		3, 		6)
	add_level_meter(		vol4_meter_r, 		130+		151*		3, 		3, 		7)
declare	level_meter_on_color



declareui_label	instr_labels[	4](	1,	1)
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_label_properties(		mixer.instr_labels[		i], 		"", 		"empty_picture", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		0)
	set_bounds(		mixer.instr_labels[		i], 		12+(		151*		slot_translation[		i]), 		75+		slot_position_offset[		i], 		151, 		22)
	assign_to_page(		mixer.instr_labels[		i], 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
end for

end family
end macro
macro add_level_meter(	#control#, 	#posX#, 	#bus#, 	#idx#)
declareui_level_meter	#control#
	mixer.#control#->	width:=	1
	mixer.#control#->	height:=	139
	mixer.#control#->	pos_x :=	#posX#
	mixer.#control#->	pos_y :=	279
	mixer.#control#->	z_layer :=-	1
	set_level_meter_properties(		mixer.#control#, 		0x23262b, 		0x23262b, 		0xBBDAFC, 		0xCC3B01)
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		mixer.#control#), 		CONTROL_PAR_VERTICAL, 		1)
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		mixer.#control#), 		CONTROL_PAR_PEAK_COLOR, 		0xC19A3E)
	attach_level_meter(		get_ui_id(		mixer.#control#), -		1, -		1, 		#idx#mod		2, 		#bus#)
	mixer.#control#->	hide:=	HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		mixer.#control#), 		UIpage_MIXER, 		HIDE_PART_BG)
end macro
macro fill_output_menu(	#menu#)
	add_menu_item(		#menu#, 		"Default", -		1)
for	i:=	0to	NUM_OUTPUT_CHANNELS-	1
	add_menu_item(		#menu#, 		output_channel_name(		i), 		i)
end for
end macro
macro on_output_menu(	#n#)
on ui_control(	mixer.output_menus#n#)
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, 		mixer.output_menus#n#, -		1, -		1, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#n#)
end on
end macro
macro update_delay_preset()
	load_id :=	load_array_str(	mixer.del_preset_array,	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&	del_preset_names[	mixer.delay_preset_menu->	value]&	".nka")
while	load_id>	0
	wait(		100)
end while
if	load_id=-	1
	preset.n :=	0
	load_del_preset(		mixer.del_preset_array)
end if
if	load_id=	0
	message(		"Delay Preset Array Not Found: "&		del_preset_names[		mixer.delay_preset_menu->		value])
end if
end macro
macro update_rev_preset()
	load_id :=	load_array_str(	mixer.rev_preset_array,	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&	rev_preset_names[	mixer.rev_preset_menu->	value]&	".nka")
while	load_id>	0
	wait(		100)
end while
if	load_id=-	1
	preset.n :=	0
	load_rev_preset(		mixer.rev_preset_array)
end if
if	load_id=	0
	message(		"Reverb Preset Array Not Found: "&		rev_preset_names[		mixer.rev_preset_menu->		value])
end if
end macro
macro save_del_preset(	#array#)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_sync)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_time)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_feedback)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_hicut)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_return)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_LOWCUT,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_PINGPONG,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-		1,		1,		0))
if	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_MODERN
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION,-		1,		1,		0))
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_ANALOGUE
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_BBDTYPE,-		1,		1,		0))
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_TAPE
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_NOISE,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TAPEAGE,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_FLUTTER,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION,-		1,		1,		0))
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_VINTAGE
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_QUALITY,-		1,		1,		0))
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_DIFFUSION
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DENSE,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_AMOUNT,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SIZE,-		1,		1,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_MODULATION,-		1,		1,		0))
end if
end macro
macro load_del_preset(	#array#)
	visible_deny :=	1
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_sync)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_time)
call	update_delay_time
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_feedback)
	set_current_control(		mixer.delay_feedback, 		" %", 		mixer.delay_feedback, 		"")
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_hicut)
	set_current_control(		mixer.delay_hicut, 		" Hz", 		mixer.delay_hicut, 		"")
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.delay_return)
	set_current_control(		mixer.delay_return, 		" dB", 		mixer.delay_return, 		"")
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_LOWCUT, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_PINGPONG, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE, 		1, 		0)
if	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_MODERN
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION, 		1, 		0)
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_ANALOGUE
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_BBDTYPE, 		1, 		0)
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_TAPE
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_NOISE, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TAPEAGE, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_FLUTTER, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SATURATION, 		1, 		0)
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_VINTAGE
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_STEREO, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DEPTH, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_RATE, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_QUALITY, 		1, 		0)
elseif	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TYPE,-	1,	1,	0)=	NI_REPLIKA_TYPE_DIFFUSION
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_DENSE, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_AMOUNT, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_SIZE, 		1, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RDL_MODULATION, 		1, 		0)
end if
	visible_deny :=	0
end macro
macro save_rev_preset(	#array#)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.rev_type)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.rev_return)
if	mixer.rev_type=	0
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.ir_menu)

else
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.rev_predelay)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		mixer.rev_time)
end if
if	mixer.rev_type=	1or	mixer.rev_type=	2
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_MOD,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_SIZE,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_STEREO,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_LOWSHELF,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DAMPING,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_HIGHCUT,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DIFF,-		1,		0,		0))
end if
if	mixer.rev_type=	3
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_PR_LOWSHELF,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_PR_HIDAMP,-		1,		0,		0))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_PR_STEREO,-		1,		0,		0))
end if
end macro
macro load_rev_preset(	#array#)
	mixer.rev_type :=	#array#[	preset.n]
call	update_rev_type
	visible_deny :=	1
	inc(		preset.n)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.rev_return)
	set_current_control(		mixer.rev_return, 		" dB", 		mixer.rev_return, 		"")
if	mixer.rev_type=	0
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.ir_menu)
call	update_ir
else
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.rev_predelay)
	set_current_control(		mixer.rev_predelay, 		" ms", 		mixer.rev_predelay, 		"")
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		mixer.rev_time)
	set_current_control(		mixer.rev_time, 		" ms", 		mixer.rev_time, 		"")
end if

if	mixer.rev_type=	1or	mixer.rev_type=	2
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_MOD, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_SIZE, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_STEREO, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_LOWSHELF, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DAMPING, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_HIGHCUT, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_RV2_DIFF, 		0, 		0)
end if
if	mixer.rev_type=	3
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_PR_LOWSHELF, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_PR_HIDAMP, 		0, 		0)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_PR_STEREO, 		0, 		0)
end if
	visible_deny :=	0
end macro
macro declare_presetSystem()
	preset_system.init()
	preset_system.declare_variables()
	preset_system.declare_arrays()
	preset_io.load_arrays()
	preset_system.declare_fonts()

	preset_io.declare_devSaveControls()
	preset_system.declare_presetStrip()

	preset_system.init_gui()


	preset_system.declare_ui_panels()
	preset_system.set_up_position_matrices()


	preset_system.declare_browser_controls()
	preset_io.declare_save_controls()
	preset_io.declare_scan_controls()

	update.preset_situation()
	preset_system.browser_help_texts()
end macro
macro preset_system.init()


const	preset
	VERSION_IDX()
	DELETED_IDX()
	TAGS_IDX()
	NUMBER_IDX()
	CONTENT_IDX()
end const





declare	NORDIC_SPHERES_PRESET_VERSION :=	1
declare	NORDIC_SPHERES_MAIN_VERSION :=	1
declare	NORDIC_SPHERES_SIDE_VERSION :=	0








declare	category_elements[	6] :=(	4,	2,	2,	3,	15,	1)


const	filter
	SUBTRACTIVE()
	ADDITIVE()
	TOGGLE()
end const


declare	filtermethodPerCategory[	6] :=(	filter.ADDITIVE,	filter.TOGGLE,	filter.TOGGLE,	filter.TOGGLE,	filter.SUBTRACTIVE,	filter.SUBTRACTIVE)


declare	NUM_PRESETS
declare	NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS
declare	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS :=	NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS
declare	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS_OLD
declare	NUM_USER_PRESETS


end macro
macro preset_system.init_gui()



declare	btn_tag_height :=	20

declare	btn_tag_width_perCategory[	6] :=(	100,	100,	100,	100,	100,	250-	12)



declare	handle_size :=	310/(	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS/	15)


declare	tag_matrix_coord[	2] :=(	12,	157-	7-	14)

declare	columns_POS_X[	4] :=(	30,	30+	150,	30+	150+	150,	550)

declare	preset_matrix_coord[	2]
	preset_matrix_coord[	0] :=	columns_POS_X[	4-	1]
	preset_matrix_coord[	1] :=	tag_matrix_coord[	1]


declare	row1_POS_Y[	4] :=(	0,	0,	0,	0)
declare	row2_POS_Y[	4] :=(	100,	100,	0,	0)

declare	row1_NUM_ROWS[	4] :=(	4,	2,	15,	1)
declare	row2_NUM_ROWS[	4] :=(	2,	3,	0,	0)

declare	category_title_offset[	6] :=(-	26,-	26,-	26,-	26,-	26,-	26)

end macro
macro preset_system.declare_fonts()


declare	menu_fonts[	6]

	menu_fonts[	1] :=	get_font_id(	"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-white-presetfriendly")
	menu_fonts[	2] :=	get_font_id(	"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-blue60-presetfriendly")
	menu_fonts[	3] :=	get_font_id(	"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-white-presetfriendly")
	menu_fonts[	4] :=	get_font_id(	"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-blue60-presetfriendly")
	menu_fonts[	5] :=	get_font_id(	"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-white-presetfriendly")
family	fonts

	START_INC(		N, , )
		fonts.base_font[		0] :=		get_font_id(		"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-blue-presetfriendly")
		fonts.base_font[		1] :=		get_font_id(		"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-white-presetfriendly")
		fonts.base_font[		2] :=		get_font_id(		"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-blue60-presetfriendly")
		fonts.base_font[		3] :=		get_font_id(		"font_fira-sans-regular-13.5-white-presetfriendly")

END_INC

macro preset_system.set_up_position_matrices()

declare	%btn_preset_grid_y[	15]
declare	btn_tag_grid_y[	27]
declare	btn_tag_grid_x[	27]

	i :=	0
	ii :=	0
while	i<	num_elements(	%btn_preset_grid_y)
	%btn_preset_grid_y[	i] :=	preset_matrix_coord[	1]+(	ii*	20)+(	ii*	1)
	inc(		i)
	inc(		ii)
end while

	i :=	0
	ii :=	0
	iii :=	0
while	i<	27
	btn_tag_grid_y[	i] :=	tag_matrix_coord[	1]+	ii*	btn_tag_height+	ii*	1
if	in_range(	ii,	0,	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii]-	1)
	btn_tag_grid_y[	i] :=	btn_tag_grid_y[	i]+	row1_POS_Y[	iii]
elseif	in_range(	ii,	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii],	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	iii]-	1)
	btn_tag_grid_y[	i] :=	btn_tag_grid_y[	i]+	row2_POS_Y[	iii]
end if
	inc(		ii)
if	ii=	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	iii]
	ii :=	0
	inc(		iii)
end if
	inc(		i)
end while

	i :=	0
	ii :=	0
	iii :=	0
while	i<	27
if	in_range(	iii,	0,	row1_NUM_ROWS[	ii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	ii])
	btn_tag_grid_x[	i] :=	tag_matrix_coord[	0]+	columns_POS_X[	ii]
end if
	inc(		i)
	inc(		iii)
if	iii=	row1_NUM_ROWS[	ii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	ii]
	inc(		ii)
	iii :=	0
end if
end while

end macro

macro btn_tags(	#n#)
declareui_button	btn_tag#n#
if	#n#<	27

	set_button_properties(		btn_tag#n#, 		""&		!tag_names_array[		#n#-		1], 		"alpha", 		0, 		0, 		1)
for	u:=	0to	num_elements(	font_types)-	1
	set_control_par(		btn_tag#n#, 		font_types[		u], 		fonts.base_font[		u])
end for
	set_bounds(		btn_tag#n#, 		btn_tag_grid_x[		#n#-		1], 		btn_tag_grid_y[		#n#-		1], 		0, 		btn_tag_height)
	btn_tag#n# ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_tag_buttons)
else
	set_button_properties(		btn_tag#n#, 		"", 		"btn_favorite", 		0, 		0, 		5)
	set_bounds(		btn_tag#n#, 		preset_matrix_coord[		0], 		tag_matrix_coord[		1]+		category_title_offset[		6-		1], 		15, 		btn_tag_height)
	btn_tag#n# ->	z_layer :=	0
	btn_tag#n# ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)
end if
	btn_tag#n# ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	tag_button_array[	#n#-	1] :=	get_ui_id(	btn_tag#n#)
end macro
macro preset_system.declare_browser_controls()

declareui_button	btn_presetBrowserDC
	set_button_properties(		btn_presetBrowserDC, 		"", 		"alpha")
	btn_presetBrowserDC ->	hide :=	HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
	btn_presetBrowserDC ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declareui_switch	btn_double_click
	set_switch_properties(		btn_double_click, 		"", 		"empty_picture")
	set_bounds(		btn_double_click, 		0, 		0, 		250-		25, 		20)
	btn_double_click->	hide:=	HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
	btn_double_click ->	z_layer :=	1
	btn_double_click->	allow_automation :=	0

declareui_slider	sli_scrollbar(	0,	1000000)
	set_slider_properties(		sli_scrollbar, 		1000000, 		"alpha_scroll_slider", -		3500)
	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_X :=	preset_matrix_coord[	0]+	250+	1-	1
	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_Y :=	preset_matrix_coord[	1]-	10+	12
	sli_scrollbar ->	width :=	21
	sli_scrollbar ->	height :=	310

	sli_scrollbar ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declareui_label	lbl_scrollhandle(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_scrollhandle, 		"", 		"scrollbar")
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	POS_X :=	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_X+	1
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	POS_Y :=	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_Y
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	height :=	handle_size
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	z_layer :=-	1
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declareui_label	lbl_scrollBG(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_scrollBG, 		"", 		"scrollbar_bg")
	set_bounds(		lbl_scrollBG, 		sli_scrollbar ->		x, 		sli_scrollbar ->		y-		2, 		5, 		310+		2+		1)
	lbl_scrollBG ->	z_layer :=-	1
	lbl_scrollBG ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declare	category_active[	6] :=(	0)
declareui_button	lbl_categories[	6]
declareui_label	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6](	1,	1)
for	i :=	0to	6-	1
	lbl_categories[	i] ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	set_button_properties(		lbl_categories[		i], 		!category_titles[		i], 		"alpha", 		0, 		fonts.category_font[		0])
	set_bounds(		lbl_categories[		i], 		btn_tag_grid_x[		category_accum[		i]]-		1, 		btn_tag_grid_y[		category_accum[		i]]+		category_title_offset[		i], 		btn_tag_width_perCategory[		i], 		22)
if	i#	num_elements(	lbl_categories)-	1
	lbl_categories[	i] ->	z_layer :=	0
end if
	lbl_categories[	i] ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_categories)

	set_label_properties(		lbl_categoriesSeparation[		i], 		"", 		"lbl_separation")
	set_bounds(		lbl_categoriesSeparation[		i], 		lbl_categories[		i]->		x+		2, 		lbl_categories[		i]->		y+		20, 		lbl_categories[		i]->		width, 		2)
	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	i] ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_categories)
end for
	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1] ->	x :=	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1]->	x-	12
	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1] ->	width :=	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1]->	width+	17

	lbl_categories[	6-	1] ->	x :=	preset_matrix_coord[	0]+	23





declare	tag_button_array[	27] :=(	0)
	iterate_macro(		btn_tags()) on		1 to 		27 step 		1
declare	tag_mask_array[	27] :=(-	1)


	ii :=	0
	iii :=	0
for	i :=	0to	27-	1-	1
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	width :=	btn_tag_width_perCategory[	iii]
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	z_layer :=	0
	inc(		ii)
if	ii=	category_elements[	iii]
	ii :=	0
	inc(		iii)
end if
end for

declareui_button	btn_preset_button[	15]
declareui_button	btn_preset_favorite[	15]


for	i :=	0to	15-	1
	set_button_properties(		btn_preset_button[		i], 		"      "&		final_preset_title_array[		i], 		"alpha", 		0, 		0, 		1)
	set_bounds(		btn_preset_button[		i], 		preset_matrix_coord[		0], 		btn_preset_grid_y[		i], 		250, 		20)
	btn_preset_button[	i] ->	z_layer :=-	1
for	u:=	0to	num_elements(	font_types)-	1
	set_control_par(		btn_preset_button[		i], 		font_types[		u], 		fonts.base_font[		u])
end for
	btn_preset_button[	i] ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	btn_preset_button[	i] ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_buttons)

	set_button_properties(		btn_preset_favorite[		i], 		"", 		"btn_favorite_small")
	set_bounds(		btn_preset_favorite[		i], 		preset_matrix_coord[		0]+		3, 		btn_preset_grid_y[		i]+		3, 		15, 		20)
	btn_preset_favorite[	i] ->	z_layer :=	0
	btn_preset_favorite[	i] ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_buttons)
	btn_preset_favorite[	i] ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1






end for

declareui_button	btn_exit
	set_button_properties(		btn_exit, 		"", 		"btn_close")
	set_bounds(		btn_exit, 		789, 		77, 		38, 		38)

	set_bounds(		lbl_presetcount, 		850-		270-		14, 		btn_tag_grid_y[		category_accum[		6-		1]]+		category_title_offset[		6-		1]-		4, 		250, 		22)

macro on_ui_control_btn_tag(	#n#)
on ui_control(	btn_tag#n#)

if	tag_mask_array[	#n#-	1]=-	1
if	tag_button_array[	#n#-	1] ->	value=	1
	tag_active :=	#n#
else
	tag_active :=	0
end if
call	filter.toggle_tag_buttons()
if	tag_button_array[	#n#-	1] ->	key_control=	1
for	i :=	0to	27-	1
if	i#	#n#-	1
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	value :=	0
else
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	value :=	1
end if
end for
end if
end if

if	saving_preset=	0
if	tag_mask_array[	#n#-	1]=-	1
call	on_button_tag()






else
	btn_tags_state[	#n#-	1] :=	0
	tag_button_array[	#n#-	1]->	value :=	0
end if
call	update.btn_active_status()

else
for	i :=	0to	num_elements(	tag_button_array)-	1
if	in_range(	i,	category_accum[	0],	category_accum[	1]-	1)
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	value :=	0
end if
if	tag_button_array[	i] ->	value=	1or	i=	3
	tag_mask_array[	i] :=-	1
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	value :=	1
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	font_type :=	fonts.base_font[	1]
else
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	value :=	0
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	font_type :=	fonts.base_font[	0]
end if
end for
end if
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_control_btn_favorite_tag(	#n#)
on ui_control(	btn_tag#n#)
if	search(	final_favorite_presets_array,	1)#-	1or	btn_tags_state[	#n#-	1]=	1
call	on_button_tag()
else
	tag_button_array[	#n#-	1] ->	value :=	0
end if
call	update.btn_active_status()
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_control_favorite_buttons(	#n#)
on ui_control(	btn_preset_favorite#n#)
	final_favorite_presets_array[	scroll.up+	#n#] :=	btn_preset_favorite#n# ->	value
	favorite_presets_array[	final_preset_numbers_array[	#n#+	scroll.up]] :=	btn_preset_favorite#n# ->	value
	save.favorite_array()
if	final_preset_numbers_array[	#n#+	scroll.up]=	preset.idx
	btn_current_favorite ->	value :=	btn_preset_favorite#n# ->	value
end if
call	update.btn_active_status()
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_control_preset_buttons(	#n#)
on ui_control(	btn_preset_button#n#)
	doubleclick_start(		btn_preset_button#n#, 		btn_presetBrowserDC)

if	preset.idx#-	1and	preset_numbers_array[	search(	preset_numbers_array,	preset.idx)]=	final_preset_numbers_array[	scroll.up+	#n#]
	btn_preset_button#n# :=	1
else
	btn_preset_onoff[	scroll.up+	#n#] :=	btn_preset_button#n# ->	value
end if


for	i :=	0to	15-	1
if	i#	#n#
	btn_preset_button[	i] ->	value :=	0

end if
end for
for	i :=	0to	NUM_SHOWN_PRESETS-	1
if	i#	scroll.up+	#n#
	btn_preset_onoff[	i] :=	0
else
if	btn_preset_button#n# ->	value=	1
	preset.idx :=	final_preset_numbers_array[	i]
else
	preset.idx :=-	1
end if
end if
end for

call	update.btn_active_status()

	doubleclick_check(		btn_presetBrowserDC)

	browser.load_preset()

end on
end macro
macro preset_io.load_arrays()


declareconst	LOAD_FROM_RC :=	2

declareread	favorite_presets_array[	1499]
	load_array(		favorite_presets_array, 		1)
declare	final_favorite_presets_array[	1499]
	array.copy(		favorite_presets_array, 		final_favorite_presets_array)

declareread	btn_preset_onoff[	1499]

declare	!tag_names_array[	27]
	load_array(		tag_names_array, 		LOAD_FROM_RC)

declare	!preset_title_array[	1499]
	load_array(		preset_title_array, 		LOAD_FROM_RC)
declare	!final_preset_title_array[	1499]
for	i :=	0to	1499-	1
	final_preset_title_array[	i] :=	preset_title_array[	i]
end for

declare	%preset_tags[	1499]
	load_array(		preset_tags, 		LOAD_FROM_RC)

for	i :=	0to	num_elements(	preset_tags)-	1
if	preset_tags[	i]=	0and	i#	0
	NUM_FACTORY_PRESETS :=	i
	i :=	num_elements(	preset_tags)-	1
end if
end for

declare	end_of_presets_array[	1499+	15] :=(-	1)


declare	preset_numbers_array[	1499]
	load_array(		preset_numbers_array, 		LOAD_FROM_RC)
declare	final_preset_numbers_array[	1499]
for	i :=	0to	1499-	1
	final_preset_numbers_array[	i] :=	preset_numbers_array[	i]
end for

declare	!preset_info[	1499]
	load_array(		!preset_info, 		LOAD_FROM_RC)
declare	!final_preset_info[	1499]

declare	!category_titles[	6]
	load_array(		!category_titles, 		LOAD_FROM_RC)

declare	!file_name_array[	1499]
	load_array(		file_name_array, 		LOAD_FROM_RC)

declare	btn_tags_state[	27]
declare	FS_btn_tags_state[	27]
declare	tag_history_clean[	27]
declare	activeTagsPerCategory[	27]

declare	%user_preset_tags[	500]
	load_array(		user_preset_tags, 		1)

declare	!user_preset_titles[	500]
	load_array(		user_preset_titles, 		1)

declare	%user_deleted_presets[	500]
	load_array(		user_deleted_presets, 		1)

declare	user_preset_numbers[	500]
	load_array(		user_preset_numbers, 		1)

declare	!user_preset_info[	500]
	load_array(		user_preset_info, 		1)

declare	@presetpath
declare	@basepath
declare	@file_path

	@presetpath :=	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/resources/data/"
	@basepath :=	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"User Data/"
	@file_path :=	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"User Data/--START--.nka"

end macro
macro preset_io.declare_save_controls()

declareui_button	btn_edit_tags
	set_button_properties(		btn_edit_tags, 		"", 		"btn_edit2", 		0, 		fonts.base_font[		1], 		1)
	set_bounds(		btn_edit_tags, 		51+		4+		20, 		433-		5+		2, 		30, 		25)
	btn_edit_tags ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	btn_edit_tags ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declareui_button	btn_delete_preset
	set_button_properties(		btn_delete_preset, 		"", 		"btn_delete", 		0, 		fonts.base_font[		1], 		1)
	set_bounds(		btn_delete_preset, 		90+		4+		20, 		433-		5+		2, 		30, 		25)
	btn_delete_preset ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	btn_delete_preset ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declare	saving_disabled :=	1

	set_label_properties(		lbl_save_dialog, 		"", 		"alpha")
	set_bounds(		lbl_save_dialog, 		lbl_preset->		x, 		lbl_preset->		y, 		lbl_preset ->		width, 		18)

	lbl_save_dialog ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_presetStrip)

	set_button_properties(		btn_save_confirm, 		"", 		"btn_confirm_small", 		1, 		0, 		5)
	set_bounds(		btn_save_confirm, 		542+		5, 		77-		4, 		btn_tag_height, 		btn_tag_height)

	set_bounds(		btn_save_cancel, 		561+		5, 		77-		4, 		btn_tag_height, 		btn_tag_height)

	btn_overwrite ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

	@txt_presetname ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_presetStrip)

	@txt_presetname ->	hide :=	hide_state[	0]
	lbl_save_dialog ->	hide :=	hide_state[	0]
