macro preset_add_param(	#array#, 	#param#)
	#array#[	preset.n] :=	#param#
	inc(		preset.n)
end macro
macro preset_add_control(	#array#, 	#param#)
	#array#[	preset.n] :=	#param#->	value
	inc(		preset.n)
end macro
macro preset_load_control(	#array#, 	#control#)
	#control#->	value :=	#array#[	preset.n]
	inc(		preset.n)
end macro
macro preset_load_param(	#array#, 	#param#, 	#slot#, 	#generic#)
	set_engine_par(		#param#, 		#array#[		preset.n], -		1, 		#slot#, 		#generic#)
	inc(		preset.n)
end macro
macro preset_add_controlArray(	#array#, 	#control#)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#0)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#1)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#2)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#3)
end macro
macro preset_load_controlArray(	#array#, 	#control#)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#0)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#1)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#2)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#3)
end macro
macro preset_add_motion_controlArray(	#array#, 	#control#)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#0)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#1)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#2)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#3)

	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_min0)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_min1)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_min2)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_min3)

	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_max0)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_max1)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_max2)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_max3)

	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion0)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion1)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion2)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion3)

	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert0)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert1)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert2)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert3)
end macro
macro preset_load_motion_controlArray(	#array#, 	#control#)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#0)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#1)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#2)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#3)

	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_min3)

	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_max1)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_max2)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_max3)

	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion0)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion1)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion2)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion3)

	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert0)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert1)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert2)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		#control#_motion_invert3)
end macro
macro add_grain_to_array(	#array#, 	#fam#)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.position_A)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.position_B)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.pos_rand_knob)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.mnu_pos_rand_mode)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.density_knob)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.density_sync)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.Att)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.Dec)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.Sus)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.Rel)
end macro

end macro

	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.rate)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		#fam#.mode_menu)

	inc(		preset.n)
end for

	inc(		preset.n)
end for
end macro

end for

end for
end macro

macro add_panengine_to_array(	#array#, 	#fam#)
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_active[		#fam#])
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.knb_steps[		#fam#])
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.mnu_rate[		#fam#])
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		0])
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		1])
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		2])
	preset_add_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		3])
for	i :=	0to	63
	#array#[	preset.n] :=	get_control_par_arr(	PanEn.tbl_panstep[	#fam#],	CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,	i)
	inc(		preset.n)
end for
end macro
macro load_panengine_from_array(	#array#, 	#fam#)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_active[		#fam#])
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.knb_steps[		#fam#])
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.mnu_rate[		#fam#])
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		0])
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		1])
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		2])
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		#fam#,		3])
for	i :=	0to	63
	set_control_par_arr(		PanEn.tbl_panstep[		#fam#], 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		#array#[		preset.n], 		i)
	inc(		preset.n)
end for
end macro
macro preset_system.browser_help_texts()

	btn_presetBrowser->	help:=	"Open the preset browser"
for	i :=	0to	15-	1
	btn_preset_button[	i] ->	help :=	"Press to choose this preset."
	btn_preset_favorite[	i] ->	help :=	"Press to mark this preset as a favourite."
end for
	sli_scrollbar ->	help :=	"Move to scroll up and down the shown presets."
	btn_save ->	help :=	"Open the save dialogue for User Presets."
for	i :=	0to	27-	1
	tag_button_array[	i] ->	help :=	"Press to add this tag to your filter selection."
end for
	btn_clear_tags ->	help :=	"Clear your tag selection."

	btn_current_favorite ->	help :=	"Add the current preset to your favorites list."
	btn_prevPreset ->	help :=	"Skip to the previous preset of your filtered selection."
	btn_nextPreset ->	help :=	"Skip to the next preset of your filtered selection."

	btn_scan_presets ->	help :=	"Scan your preset directory for newly added presets or recover deleted ones."
	btn_exit ->	help :=	"Close the current window."

	btn_delete_preset ->	help :=	"Remove the current User Preset from the browser."
	btn_edit_tags ->	help :=	"Edit the tags for the selected User Preset."

end macro
macro declare_libraryFeatures()

declare	@___print_string

declare	___M.Seed

declare	lib.i
declare	lib.ii

	midi_notes()
declare	font_types[	6] :=(	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE,	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON,	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_PRESSED,	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_PRESSED,	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_OFF_HOVER,	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE_ON_HOVER)

end macro
macro print_array(	#array#)
	@___print_string :=	"#array#["&	num_elements(	#array#)&	"]: "
for	lib.i :=	0to	num_elements(	#array#)-	1
	___print_string :=	___print_string&	#array#[	lib.i]&	", "
end for
	message(		___print_string)
end macro
macro print_array_part(	#array#, 	start_idx, 	end_idx)
	@___print_string :=	"#array#: "
for	lib.i :=	start_idxto	end_idx
	___print_string :=	___print_string&	#array#[	lib.i]&	", "
end for
	message(		___print_string)
end macro
macro print_var(	#var#)
	message(		"#var#: "&		#var#)
end macro
macro print_var2(	#var1#, 	#var2#)
	message(		"#var1#: "&		#var1#&		", #var2#: "&		#var2#)
end macro
macro print_var3(	#var1#, 	#var2#, 	#var3#)
	message(		"#var1#: "&		#var1#&		", #var2#: "&		#var2#&		", #var3#: "&		#var3#)
end macro
macro print_binary(	#decimal#, 	size)
	@___print_string :=	"#decimal#: "
for	lib.i :=	0to	size-	1
	___print_string :=	___print_string&	isBitSet(	#decimal#,	size-	1-	lib.i)&	", "
end for
	message(		___print_string)
end macro

macro init_library_info()
	show_library_tab()
	set_control_par_str(		INST_LIB_PIC_ONE_ID, 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"AboutIconLibrary")
	set_control_par_str(		INST_LIB_PIC_TWO_ID, 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"AboutIconLibAuthor")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_COPYRIGHT_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, 		"Copyright 2023")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, 		"Nordic Spheres")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Developed by Sonuscore and Pole Position Production")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Product Concept and Design: Mats Lundgren, Amina Hocine, Tilman Sillescu, Nico Dilz")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Project Lead: Nico Dilz, Mats Lundgren")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Sound Design: Mats Lundgren, Amina Hocine, Eric Thorsell, Niklas Olsson")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Preset Design: Mats Lundgren, Amina Hocine, Jonas Schüsselin, Tilman Sillescu, Simon Schrenk, Nico Dilz, Matthias Meeh")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Preset Naming: Mats Lundgren, Amina Hocine, Jonas Schüsselin, Nico Dilz, Matthias Meeh")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"KONTAKT Scripting: Nico Dilz, Jonas Meyer, Mathias Vatter")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Sample Editing: Mats Lundgren, Amina Hocine")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"User Interface Design: Jannic Böhme")
	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Quality Assurance: Mats Lundgren, Nico Dilz, Tilman Sillescu, Simon Schrenk, Jonas Meyer, Jonas Schüsselin")

	set_control_par_str(		$INST_LIB_DESCRIPTION_ID, 		$CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, 		"Videos: Jannic Böhme, Nadja Demmler")
end macro
macro init_help_texts()


	main_page_button->	help:=	"Show the main page"
	mixer_page_button->	help:=	"Show the mixer page"
	pan_page_button->	help:=	"Show the pan engine"
	settings_page->	help:=	"Open the settings page"
	mainsub_exit_button->	help:=	"Go back to main page"
	btn_next_slot->	help:=	"Open the next slot"
	btn_prev_slot->	help:=	"Open the previous slot"
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[	0]->	help:=	"Deactivate all engines for this slot."
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[	1]->	help:=	"Activate the arpeggiator for this slot."
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot1[	2]->	help:=	"Activate the envelope for this slot."
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[	0]->	help:=	"Deactivate all engines for this slot."
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[	1]->	help:=	"Activate the arpeggiator for this slot."
	btn_engine_selector.interact_slot4[	2]->	help:=	"Activate the envelope for this slot."


for	i:=	0to	4
	mixer.solo[	i]->	help:=	"Solo this slot"
	mixer.mute[	i]->	help:=	"Mute this slot"
	instr_slot_button[	i]->	help:=	"Open the instrument browser for this slot"
	octave_shift_menu[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the octave shift for this slot"
	assign_slot_menu[	i]->	help:=	"Choose a sequencing mode for this slot"
	fx_page_button[	i]->	help:=	"Open the instrument page for this slot"
end for



	instr_browser.empty->	help:=	"Empty the currently selected instrument slot"
	instr_browser.scroll_handle->	help:=	"Scroll through the instruments"
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	instr_browser.instr)-	1
	instr_browser.instr[	i]->	help:=	"Select this instrument"
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	instr_browser.btn_cat)-	1
	instr_browser.btn_cat[	i]->	help:=	"Select this category"
end for


	dyn_cc_menu->	help:=	"Chose the MIDI CC that controls the instrument dynamics"
	motion_cc->	help:=	"Choose the MIDI CC that controls the motion engine"
	btn_grain_load_setting ->	help:=	"Load grain instruments with the preset morph positions or full length"
	btn_animation_setting ->	help:=	"Turn the animations On/Off"

	arp_help_texts(		arp1)
	arp_help_texts(		arp2)
	arp_help_texts(		arp3)
	arp_help_texts(		arp4)
	env_help_texts(		env1)
	env_help_texts(		env2)
	env_help_texts(		env3)
	env_help_texts(		env4)
	env_help_texts(		grenv1)
	env_help_texts(		grenv2)
	grain_help_texts(		grain1)
	grain_help_texts(		grain2)

	fx_env_view->	help:=	"Navigate to the envelope or grain size settings for the selected slot"
	fx_filter_view->	help:=	"Navigate to the EQ settings for the selected slot"
	fx_mod_view->	help:=	"Navigate to the chorus settings for the selected slot"
	fx_sat_view->	help:=	"Navigate to the saturation settings for the selected slot"
	fx_trem_view->	help:=	"Navigate to the tremolo settings for the selected slot"

for	i:=	0to	4-	1

	attack[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the attack or grain attack of the selected instrument"
	attack_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	attack_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	attack_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	attack_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"

	decay[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the decay or grain decay of the selected instrument"
	decay_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	decay_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	decay_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	decay_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"

	filter_bypass[	i]->	help:=	"Turn the EQ on or off for the selected slot"

	mnu_lc_order[	i]->	help:=	"Set the slope of the cutoff"
	sli_lc_freq[	i]->	help:=	"Set the frequency of the low cut filter"
	sli_lc_freq_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	sli_lc_freq_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	sli_lc_freq_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	sli_lc_freq_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
	sli_lc_resonance[	i]->	help:=	"Set the resonance of the low cut filter"

	sli_bell_q[	i]->	help:=	"Set the slope of the bell curve"
	sli_bell_freq[	i]->	help:=	"Set the frequency band to boost or cut"
	sli_bell_freq_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	sli_bell_freq_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	sli_bell_freq_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	sli_bell_freq_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
	sli_bell_gain[	i]->	help:=	"Set the gain for the selected frequency"

	mnu_hc_order[	i]->	help:=	"Set the slope of the cutoff"
	sli_hc_freq[	i]->	help:=	"Set the frequency of the high cut filter"
	sli_hc_freq_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	sli_hc_freq_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	sli_hc_freq_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	sli_hc_freq_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
	sli_hc_resonance[	i]->	help:=	"Set the resonance of the high cut filter"

	sat_bypass[	i]->	help:=	"Turn the saturation on or off for the selected slot"
	sat_menu[	i]->	help:=	"Select a saturation or distortion effect for the selected slot"
	sat_gain[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the saturation amount"
	sat_gain_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	sat_gain_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	sat_gain_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	sat_gain_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"

	mod_bypass[	i]->	help:=	"Turn the chorus effect on or off for the selected slot"
	mod_depth[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the depth of the chorus effect"
	mod_freq[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the speed of the chorus effect"
	mod_freq_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	mod_freq_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	mod_freq_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	mod_freq_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
	mod_phase[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the phase offset of the effect"
	mod_mix[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the mix of the effect"
	mod_mix_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	mod_mix_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	mod_mix_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	mod_mix_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"

	trem_bypass[	i]->	help:=	"Turn the tremolo effect on or off for the selected slot"
	trem_freq[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the speed of the tremolo effect"
	trem_freq_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	trem_freq_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	trem_freq_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	trem_freq_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
	trem_depth[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the depth of the tremolo effect"
	trem_depth_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	trem_depth_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	trem_depth_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	trem_depth_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
end for


	iterate_macro(		pan_help_texts(			#n#)) on		0 to 		2-		1 step 		1
for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	mixer.vol[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the volume for this slot"
	mixer.pan[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the panorama for this slot. Does not work with a pan engine linked to this slot. The control will show ENGINE in this case."
	mixer.senddel[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the delay send level for this slot"
	mixer.senddel_min[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the minimum motion morph value of the corresponding control"
	mixer.senddel_max[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the maximum motion morph value of the corresponding control "
	mixer.senddel_motion[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to add the corresponding control to the motion engine"
	mixer.senddel_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
	mixer.sendrev[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the reverb send level for this slot"
	mixer.output_menus[	i]->	help:=	"Select an output channel for this slot"
end for

	mixer.comp_bypass->	help:=	"Turn the global compressor on or off"
	mixer.comp_threshold->	help:=	"Adjust the threshold of the compressor"
	mixer.comp_makeup->	help:=	"Adjust the make up gain of the compressor"
	mixer.delay_bypass->	help:=	"Turn the global delay on or off"
	mixer.delay_sync->	help:=	"Turn the synchronization to host tempo on or off"
	mixer.delay_time->	help:=	"Choose the delay time"
	mixer.delay_feedback->	help:=	"Adjust the feedback amount"
	mixer.delay_hicut->	help:=	"Adjust the delay high cut filter"
	mixer.delay_return->	help:=	"Adjust the delay return level"
	mixer.delay_preset_menu->	help:=	"Open the delay preset menu"
	mixer.rev_bypass->	help:=	"Turn the global reverb on or off"
	mixer.rev_type->	help:=	"Open the reverb type menu"
	mixer.rev_predelay->	help:=	"Adjust the pre delay time"
	mixer.rev_time->	help:=	"Adjust the reverb time"
	mixer.rev_return->	help:=	"Adjust the reverb return level"
	mixer.ir_menu->	help:=	"Show the impulse response menu"
	mixer.rev_preset_menu->	help:=	"Show the reverb preset menu"

end macro
macro arp_help_texts(	#arp#)
	#arp#.rhythm_xy->	help:=	"Set the rhythm values of the selected layer. Hold the alt-key to drag all the values up and down at the same time."
	#arp#.time_signature->	help:=	"Adjust the time signature of the sequencer"
	#arp#.rate->	help:=	"Adjust the step duration of the sequencer"
	#arp#.note_order->	help:=	"Adjust the note order of the sequencer"
	#arp#.bar_reset_active->	help:=	"Adjust the bar reset of the sequencer"
	#arp#.note_selection->	help:=	"Set note selection from the midi input of the sequencer"
	#arp#.note_repeat->	help:=	"Set the number of repetitions"
	#arp#.rhythm_steps->	help:=	"Set the step count of the sequencer"
	#arp#.rhythm_skip->	help:=	"Turn the rhythm skip function on to skip steps with values of 0. That way the note is not left out and the order of the notes played by the sequencer stays the same."
	#arp#.transpose->	help:=	"Adjust the transpose setting of the selected sequencer"
	#arp#.octave->	help:=	"Adjust the octave setting of the selected sequencer"
	#arp#.rhythm_copy->	help:=	"Copy the rhythm values"
	#arp#.rhythm_paste->	help:=	"Paste the rhythm values"
	#arp#.rhythm_A_edit->	help:=	"Switch to rhythm layer A. To morph between the two layers, adjust the modwheel."
	#arp#.rhythm_B_edit->	help:=	"Switch to rhythm layer B. To morph between the two layers, adjust the modwheel."
end macro
macro env_help_texts(	#env#)
	#env#.rhythm->	help:=	"Set the rhythm values of the selected layer. Hold the alt-key to drag all the values up and down at the same time."
	#env#.rhythm_xy->	help:=	"Set the rhythm values of the selected layer. Hold the alt-key to drag all the values up and down at the same time."
	#env#.table_cover->	help:=	"Set the rhythm values of the selected layer. Hold the alt-key to drag all the values up and down at the same time."
	#env#.time_signature->	help:=	"Adjust the time signature of the sequencer"
	#env#.rate->	help:=	"Adjust the length of the envelope or the duration of each stutter step"
	#env#.note_selection->	help:=	"Set note selection from the midi input of the envelope generator"
	#env#.mode_menu->	help:=	"Switch between envelope and stutter functionality"
	#env#.rhythm_steps->	help:=	"Set the step count for the stutter sequencer"
	#env#.retrigger->	help:=	"Turn the retrigger function on or off"
	#env#.table_copy->	help:=	"Copy the envelope values"
	#env#.table_paste->	help:=	"Paste the envelope values"
	#env#.envelope_A_edit->	help:=	"Switch to rhythm layer A. To morph between the two layers, adjust the modwheel."
	#env#.envelope_B_edit->	help:=	"Switch to rhythm layer B. To morph between the two layers, adjust the modwheel."
end macro
macro pan_help_texts(	#pan#)
	PanEn.btn_active[	#pan#]	->	help:=	"Turn this pan engine on or off"
	PanEn.mnu_rate[	#pan#]	->	help:=	"Set the step duration of the respective pan engine"
	PanEn.tbl_panstep[	#pan#]	->	help:=	"Set the pan values of this engine"
	PanEn.knb_steps[	#pan#]	->	help:=	"Set the step count of the respective pan engine"
	PanEn.btn_slot_active[	#pan#,	0]	->	help:=	"Link the panning of the corresponding instrument slot to this pan engine. You can not link both pan engines to the same instrument slot."
	PanEn.btn_slot_active[	#pan#,	1]	->	help:=	"Link the panning of the corresponding instrument slot to this pan engine. You can not link both pan engines to the same instrument slot."
	PanEn.btn_slot_active[	#pan#,	2]	->	help:=	"Link the panning of the corresponding instrument slot to this pan engine. You can not link both pan engines to the same instrument slot."
	PanEn.btn_slot_active[	#pan#,	3]	->	help:=	"Link the panning of the corresponding instrument slot to this pan engine. You can not link both pan engines to the same instrument slot."
	PanEn.btn_copy[	#pan#]	->	help:=	"Copy the pan engine values"
	PanEn.btn_paste[	#pan#]	->	help:=	"Paste the pan engine values"
end macro
macro grain_help_texts(	#grain#)
	?#grain#.xy_control ->	help :=	"Adjust the morph positions of this grain engine. The red flag marks the lowest value within the sequencer and the blue flag marks the highest value within the sequencer."
	#grain#.density_sync->	help :=	"Turn the synchronization to host tempo on or off"
	#grain#.density_knob->	help:=	"Set the grain density"
	#grain#.pos_rand_knob->	help:=	"Randomize the playback position. Higher values prevent maschine gun effect"
	#grain#.ATT->	help:=	"Set the attack of the ADSR curve for the current slot"
	#grain#.DEC->	help:=	"Set the decay of the ADSR curve for the current slot"
	#grain#.SUS->	help:=	"Set the sustain of the ADSR curve for the current slot"
	#grain#.REL->	help:=	"Set the release of the ADSR curve for the current slot"
end macro
macro set_up_settings_page()

declareui_label	lbl_dyn_cc_menu(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_dyn_cc_menu, 		"DYNAMICS:", 		"empty_picture", 		0, 		font_main_big_white)
	set_bounds(		lbl_dyn_cc_menu, 		345, 		220-		22, 		80, 		22)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		lbl_dyn_cc_menu), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declarereadui_menu	dyn_cc_menu
	add_menu_item(		dyn_cc_menu, 		"CC 1", 		1)
	add_menu_item(		dyn_cc_menu, 		"CC 2", 		2)
	add_menu_item(		dyn_cc_menu, 		"CC 11", 		11)
	set_menu_properties(		dyn_cc_menu, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		1, 		0)
	set_bounds(		dyn_cc_menu, 		425, 		220-		22, 		75, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		dyn_cc_menu), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	set_font(		dyn_cc_menu, 		font_main_big_array)

declareread	dyn_cc_num
	dyn_cc_num :=	get_menu_item_value(	get_ui_id(	dyn_cc_menu),	dyn_cc_menu->	value)

declareui_label	lbl_motion_cc(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_motion_cc, 		"MOTION:", 		"empty_picture", 		0, 		font_main_big_white)
	set_bounds(		lbl_motion_cc, 		345, 		250-		22, 		80, 		22)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		lbl_motion_cc), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declarereadui_menu	motion_cc
	add_menu_item(		motion_cc, 		"CC 1", 		1)
	add_menu_item(		motion_cc, 		"CC 2", 		2)
	add_menu_item(		motion_cc, 		"CC 11", 		11)
	set_menu_properties(		motion_cc, 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_white, 		1, 		0)
	set_bounds(		motion_cc, 		425, 		250-		22, 		75, 		20)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		motion_cc), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	set_font(		motion_cc, 		font_main_big_array)

declareread	motion_cc_num
	motion_cc_num :=	get_menu_item_value(	get_ui_id(	motion_cc),	motion_cc->	value)

declareui_label	lbl_grain_load_setting(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_grain_load_setting, 		"LOAD GRAIN POS:", 		"empty_picture", 		0, 		font_main_big_white)
	set_bounds(		lbl_grain_load_setting, 		345, 		260, 		120, 		22)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		lbl_grain_load_setting), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declareui_button	btn_grain_load_setting
	set_bounds(		btn_grain_load_setting, 		500-		24, 		260, 		14, 		14)
	set_button_properties(		btn_grain_load_setting, 		"", 		"btn_on-off")
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		btn_grain_load_setting), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declareui_label	lbl_animation_setting(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_animation_setting, 		"ANIMATIONS:", 		"empty_picture", 		0, 		font_main_big_white)
	set_bounds(		lbl_animation_setting, 		345, 		290, 		120, 		22)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		lbl_animation_setting), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

declareui_button	btn_animation_setting
	set_bounds(		btn_animation_setting, 		500-		24, 		290, 		14, 		14)
	set_button_properties(		btn_animation_setting, 		"", 		"btn_on-off")
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		btn_animation_setting), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)





declare	bg_offset
declare	!gui_prefix[	2]
	!gui_prefix[	0] :=	"e1_"
	!gui_prefix[	1] :=	"e2_"









declare	settings_load_id[	2]
declare	grain_load_setting_nsp[	1]
declare	animation_setting_nsp[	1]
	settings_load_id[	0] :=	load_array(	animation_setting_nsp,	1)
	settings_load_id[	1] :=	load_array(	grain_load_setting_nsp,	1)
declareui_label	version_label(	1,	1)
	set_bounds(		version_label, (		850-		50)/		2, 		380, 		50, 		20)
	set_label_properties(		version_label, 		"v 1.0", 		"empty_picture", 		1, 		font_main_big_blue)
	assign_to_page(		get_ui_id(		version_label), 		UIpage_SETTINGS, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)


end macro

macro PanEn.on_init()


declare	PanEnInit.i
declare	PanEnInit.n
declare	PanEnInit.b

declare	PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET :=(	850-	375)/	2
declare	PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET :=	53



declare	PanEn.CCs[] :=(	107,	108)
declare	!PanEn.mod_names[] :=(	"mod_107",	"mod_108")
declare	PanEn.INSTANCE_COUNTER :=	0


declareconst	PanEn.MIN_STEPS :=	3
declareconst	PanEn.MAX_STEPS :=	64

declareconst	PanEn.TBL_BAR_COLOR 	   :=	9667780h
declareconst	PanEn.TBL_ZERO_COLOR 	   :=	9404A4Dh
declareconst	PanEn.INDICATOR_BAR_COLOR  :=	9C78B27h
declareconst	PanEn.INDICATOR_ZERO_COLOR :=	0x000000


declare	PanEn.inputevents[	128] :=(	0)
declare	PanEn.inputcheck :=	0


declare	PanEn.copy_array[	PanEn.MAX_STEPS]
declare	PanEn.copy_active :=	0


declare	!PanEn.rates_list[] :=(	"1/64",	"1/32",	"1/16",	"1/8",	"1/4",	"1/16 T",	"1/8 T",	"1/4 T")



declare	PanEn.i
declare	PanEn.n
declare	PanEn.s

declare	PanEn.step_length[	2]
declare	PanEn.rate[	2]
declare	PanEn.steps[	2]

declare	PanEn.blip_note[	2]
declare	PanEn.state[	2] :=(	0)
declare	PanEn.is_running[	2]
declare	PanEn.act_step[	2]

declare	PanEn.ctrl_instance


declare	PanEnInst.i[	2]



declarereadui_menu	PanEn.mnu_rate[	2]
declarereadui_table	PanEn.tbl_panstep[	2][	PanEn.MAX_STEPS](	2,	2,-	127)
declareui_table	PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[	2][	PanEn.MAX_STEPS](	1,	1,	1)
declarereadui_slider	PanEn.knb_steps[	2](	PanEn.MIN_STEPS,	PanEn.MAX_STEPS)
declareui_label	PanEn.lbl_steps[	2](	1,	1)
declarereadui_button	PanEn.btn_active[	2]
declarereadui_label	PanEn.lbl_headline[	2](	1,	1)
declareui_button	PanEn.btn_copy[	2]
declareui_button	PanEn.btn_paste[	2]
declarereadui_button	PanEn.btn_slot_active[	2,	4]

for	PanEnInit.n :=	0to	num_elements(	PanEn.rates_list)-	1
	iterate_macro(		add_menu_item(			PanEn.mnu_rate#n#, 			PanEn.rates_list[			PanEnInit.n], 			PanEnInit.n)) on		0 to 		2-		1 step 		1
end for

for	PanEnInit.i :=	0to	2-	1

	PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET :=	PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET+(	190*	PanEnInit.i)



	assign_to_page(		PanEn.mnu_rate[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.tbl_panstep[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_BG)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_BG)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.knb_steps[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.lbl_steps[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_BG)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.btn_active[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.lbl_headline[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.btn_copy[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.btn_paste[		PanEnInit.i], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	set_bounds(		PanEn.tbl_panstep[		PanEnInit.i], 		4+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		64+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		375, 		86)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[		PanEnInit.i], 		4+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		151+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		375, 		10)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.mnu_rate[		PanEnInit.i], 		162+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		165+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		62, 		20)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.knb_steps[		PanEnInit.i], 		35+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		163+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		60, 		26)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.lbl_steps[		PanEnInit.i], 		35+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		163+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		80, 		26)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.btn_active[		PanEnInit.i], -		140+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		100+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		23, 		23)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.lbl_headline[		PanEnInit.i], -		120+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		100+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		100, 		30)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.btn_copy[		PanEnInit.i], 		395+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		85+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		50, 		20)
	set_bounds(		PanEn.btn_paste[		PanEnInit.i], 		395+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		115+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		50, 		20)

	set_menu_properties(		PanEn.mnu_rate[		PanEnInit.i], 		"btn_dropdownbig", 		font_main_big_blue, 		0, 		0)
	set_table_properties(		PanEn.tbl_panstep[		PanEnInit.i], 		PanEn.TBL_BAR_COLOR, 		PanEn.TBL_ZERO_COLOR)
	set_table_properties(		PanEn.tbl_step_indicator[		PanEnInit.i], 		PanEn.INDICATOR_BAR_COLOR, 		PanEn.INDICATOR_ZERO_COLOR)
	set_slider_properties(		PanEn.knb_steps[		PanEnInit.i], 		3, 		"lbl_oct_slider", -		800)
	set_label_properties(		PanEn.lbl_steps[		PanEnInit.i], 		"Steps:", 		"", 		0, 		font_main_big_blue, 		0)
	set_button_properties(		PanEn.btn_active[		PanEnInit.i], 		"", 		"btn_on-off")
	set_label_properties(		PanEn.lbl_headline[		PanEnInit.i], 		pan_engine_names[		PanEnInit.i], 		"empty_picture", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		0)
	set_button_properties(		PanEn.btn_copy[		PanEnInit.i], 		"Copy", 		"btn_bevel", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		1)
	set_button_properties(		PanEn.btn_paste[		PanEnInit.i], 		"Paste", 		"btn_bevel", 		1, 		font_main_big_white, 		1)


	set_font(		PanEn.btn_copy[		PanEnInit.i], 		font_main_big_array)
	set_font(		PanEn.btn_paste[		PanEnInit.i], 		font_main_big_array)

	PanEn.btn_copy[	PanEnInit.i]	->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	PanEn.btn_paste[	PanEnInit.i] ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1

declare	PanEnInit.SlotTranslation[] :=(	2,	0,	1,	3)

for	PanEnInit.n :=	0to	4-	1
	set_bounds(		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		PanEnInit.i,		PanEnInit.n], 		295+(		PanEnInit.SlotTranslation[		PanEnInit.n]mod		2)*		18+		PanEnInit.UI_X_OFFSET, 		162+		PanEnInit.SlotTranslation[		PanEnInit.n]/		2*		18+		PanEnInit.UI_Y_OFFSET, 		18, 		18)
	set_button_properties(		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		PanEnInit.i,		PanEnInit.n], 		"", 		"btn_on-off")
	assign_to_page(		PanEn.btn_slot_active[		PanEnInit.i,		PanEnInit.n], 		UIpage_PAN, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
end for
end for
end macro
macro PanEn.on_note()
	message(		"PanEn.on_note")
	PanEn.inputevents[	EVENT_NOTE] :=	1
	PanEn.inputcheck :=	search(	PanEn.inputevents,	1)
for	PanEn.i :=	0to	2-	1
if	PanEn.state[	PanEn.i]#	1
	PanEn.state[	PanEn.i] :=	1
	PanEn.blip_note[	PanEn.i] :=	play_note(	0,	1,	0,	1)
	change_vol(		PanEn.blip_note[		PanEn.i], -		64000, 		0)
end if
end for
end macro
macro PanEn.on_release()
	message(		"PanEn.on_release")
	PanEn.inputevents[	EVENT_NOTE] :=	0
	PanEn.inputcheck :=	search(	PanEn.inputevents,	1)

if(	CC[	64]<	10)
if	PanEn.inputcheck=-	1
call	PanEn.stop_all_engines
end if
end if
end macro
macro PanEn.catch_blip_notes()
	message(		"PanEn.catch_blip_notes")
	PanEn.s :=	search(	PanEn.blip_note,	EVENT_ID)
if	PanEn.s=	0and	PanEn.is_running[	PanEn.s]=	0
	PanEn.run(		0)
elseif	PanEn.s=	1and	PanEn.is_running[	PanEn.s]=	0
	PanEn.run(		1)
end if
end macro
macro PanEn.on_controller()
if	PanEn.inputcheck=-	1
call	PanEn.stop_all_engines
end if
end macro
macro PanEn.update_all_engines()
call	PanEn.update_step_settings
call	PanEn.reset_all_mods
call	PanEn.update_bypass
call	PanEn.set_step_lbl_text
call	PanEn.update_head_labels
end macro
macro PanEn.setup_control_functions(	#id#)

function	PanEn.panstep_setting#id#
	set_table_steps_shown(		PanEn.tbl_panstep#id#, 		PanEn.knb_steps#id#)
	set_table_steps_shown(		PanEn.tbl_step_indicator#id#, 		PanEn.knb_steps#id#)
	PanEn.steps[	#id#] :=	PanEn.knb_steps#id#
	set_control_par(		PanEn.lbl_steps[		#id#], 		CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, 		PanEn.knb_steps#id#)
end function


on ui_control(	PanEn.btn_active#id#)
	PanEn.ctrl_instance :=	#id#
	PanEn.panstep_bypass(		PanEn.ctrl_instance)
	PanEn.update_head_label(		PanEn.ctrl_instance)
end on

on ui_control(	PanEn.knb_steps#id#)
call	PanEn.panstep_setting#id#
	set_text(		PanEn.lbl_steps#id#, 		"Steps: "&		PanEn.knb_steps#id#)
end on

on ui_control(	PanEn.mnu_rate#id#)
call	PanEn.panstep_setting#id#
end on

on ui_control(	PanEn.btn_copy#id#)
	PanEn.copy_active :=	1
for	PanEn.i :=	0to	PanEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
	PanEn.copy_array[	PanEn.i] :=	get_control_par_arr(	PanEn.tbl_panstep[	#id#],	CONTROL_PAR_VALUE,	PanEn.i)
end for
end on

on ui_control(	PanEn.btn_paste#id#)
for	PanEn.i :=	0to	PanEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
	set_control_par_arr(		PanEn.tbl_panstep[		#id#], 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		PanEn.copy_array[		PanEn.i], 		PanEn.i)
end for
end on

	iterate_macro(		PanEn.on_btn_slot_active(			#id#, 			#n#)) on(		#id#*		4) to (		#id#*		4)+		4-		1 step 		1
end macro
macro PanEn.on_btn_slot_active(	#id#, 	#inst#)
on ui_control(	_PanEn.btn_slot_active#inst#)
if	_PanEn.btn_slot_active#inst#=	1
for	PanEn.i :=	0to	2-	1
if	PanEn.i#	#id#
	PanEn.btn_slot_active[	PanEn.i,	#inst#-(	#id#*	4)] ->	value :=	0
end if
end for
end if
call	PanEn.update_bypass
end on
end macro

macro set_up_fx_controls()


declare	sat_types[] :=(	EFFECT_TYPE_SHAPER,	EFFECT_TYPE_DISTORTION,	EFFECT_TYPE_VAN51,	EFFECT_TYPE_CAT,	EFFECT_TYPE_DSTORTION,	EFFECT_TYPE_LOFI)
declare	!sat_types_str[] :=(	"Saturation",	"Distortion",	"Crunch",	"Cat",	"DStortion",	"Bitcrush")
declare	!sat_preset_names[] :=(	"Saturation",	"Distortion",	"Crunch",	"Cat",	"DStortion",	"LoFi")
declare	sat_type_links[	6,	2] :=(-	1,	ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE,-	1,	ENGINE_PAR_DRIVE,-	1,	ENGINE_PAR_V5_PREGAINRHYTHM,	ENGINE_PAR_CT_TONE,	ENGINE_PAR_CT_DISTORTION,	ENGINE_PAR_DS_TONE,	ENGINE_PAR_DS_DRIVE,	ENGINE_PAR_FREQUENCY,	ENGINE_PAR_BITS)

declare	visible_deny :=	0

declare	sat_preset_array[	50]







declarereadui_slider	attack0(	0,	1000000)
declarereadui_slider	attack1(	90342,	696774)
declarereadui_slider	attack2(	90342,	696774)
declarereadui_slider	attack3(	0,	1000000)

declarereadui_slider	attack_min0(	0,	1000000)
declarereadui_slider	attack_min1(	90342,	696774)
declarereadui_slider	attack_min2(	90342,	696774)
declarereadui_slider	attack_min3(	0,	1000000)

declarereadui_slider	attack_max0(	0,	1000000)
declarereadui_slider	attack_max1(	90342,	696774)
declarereadui_slider	attack_max2(	90342,	696774)
declarereadui_slider	attack_max3(	0,	1000000)

declare	attack[	4] :=(	get_ui_id(	attack0),	get_ui_id(	attack1),	get_ui_id(	attack2),	get_ui_id(	attack3))
declare	attack_min[	4] :=(	get_ui_id(	attack_min0),	get_ui_id(	attack_min1),	get_ui_id(	attack_min2),	get_ui_id(	attack_min3))
declare	attack_max[	4] :=(	get_ui_id(	attack_max0),	get_ui_id(	attack_max1),	get_ui_id(	attack_max2),	get_ui_id(	attack_max3))

declarereadui_button	attack_motion[	4]
declarereadui_button	attack_motion_invert[	4]


declarereadui_slider	decay0(	0,	1000000)
declarereadui_slider	decay1(	10000,	700000)
declarereadui_slider	decay2(	10000,	700000)
declarereadui_slider	decay3(	0,	1000000)

declarereadui_slider	decay_min0(	0,	1000000)
declarereadui_slider	decay_min1(	10000,	700000)
declarereadui_slider	decay_min2(	10000,	700000)
declarereadui_slider	decay_min3(	0,	1000000)

declarereadui_slider	decay_max0(	0,	1000000)
declarereadui_slider	decay_max1(	10000,	700000)
declarereadui_slider	decay_max2(	10000,	700000)
declarereadui_slider	decay_max3(	0,	1000000)

declare	decay[	4] :=(	get_ui_id(	decay0),	get_ui_id(	decay1),	get_ui_id(	decay2),	get_ui_id(	decay3))
declare	decay_min[	4] :=(	get_ui_id(	decay_min0),	get_ui_id(	decay_min1),	get_ui_id(	decay_min2),	get_ui_id(	decay_min3))
declare	decay_max[	4] :=(	get_ui_id(	decay_max0),	get_ui_id(	decay_max1),	get_ui_id(	decay_max2),	get_ui_id(	decay_max3))

declarereadui_button	decay_motion[	4]
declarereadui_button	decay_motion_invert[	4]




for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_slider_properties(		attack[		i], 		90342, 		"knob_uni", -		800)
	set_slider_properties(		attack_min[		i], 		90342, 		"lbl_motion_slider", -		800)
	set_slider_properties(		attack_max[		i], 		696774, 		"lbl_motion_slider", -		800)
	set_button_properties(		attack_motion[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion")
	set_button_properties(		attack_motion_invert[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion-invert")

	set_slider_properties(		decay[		i], 		500000, 		"knob_uni", -		800)
	set_slider_properties(		decay_min[		i], 		10000, 		"lbl_motion_slider", -		800)
	set_slider_properties(		decay_max[		i], 		700000, 		"lbl_motion_slider", -		800)
	set_button_properties(		decay_motion[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion")
	set_button_properties(		decay_motion_invert[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion-invert")

	set_bounds(		attack[		i], 		405, 		355, 		34, 		30)
	set_bounds(		attack_min[		i], 		405+		-50, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		attack_max[		i], 		405+		40, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		attack_motion[		i], 		405+		-22, 		355+		42, 		53, 		14)
	set_bounds(		attack_motion_invert[		i], 		405+		45, 		355+		41, 		16, 		14)
	set_bounds(		decay[		i], 		600, 		355, 		34, 		30)
	set_bounds(		decay_min[		i], 		600+		-50, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		decay_max[		i], 		600+		40, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		decay_motion[		i], 		600+		-22, 		355+		42, 		53, 		14)
	set_bounds(		decay_motion_invert[		i], 		600+		45, 		355+		41, 		16, 		14)

	assign_to_page(		attack[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_VALUE)
	assign_to_page(		attack_min[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		attack_max[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		attack_motion[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		attack_motion_invert[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		decay[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_VALUE)
	assign_to_page(		decay_min[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		decay_max[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		decay_motion[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		decay_motion_invert[		i], 		UIpage_FXENV1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

if	i=	0or	i=	3
	attack[	i]->	default_value :=	0
	attack_min[	i]->	default_value :=	0
	attack_max[	i]->	default_value :=	1000000
	decay_min[	i]->	default_value :=	1000000
	decay_max[	i]->	default_value :=	1000000
end if

	link_control_to_ep(		attack[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, -		1, -		1, 		0)
	link_control_to_ep(		decay[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, -		1, -		1, 		0)
end for

	set_slider_properties(		trem_depth_max[		i], 		1000000, 		"lbl_motion_slider", -		800)
	set_button_properties(		trem_depth_motion[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion")
	set_button_properties(		trem_depth_motion_invert[		i], 		"", 		"btn_motion-invert")

	set_bounds(		trem_bypass[		i], 		140, 		fx_trem_view->		y+		1, 		18, 		18)
	set_bounds(		trem_freq[		i], 		405, 		355, 		34, 		30)
	set_bounds(		trem_freq_min[		i], 		405+		-50, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		trem_freq_max[		i], 		405+		40, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		trem_freq_motion[		i], 		405+		-22, 		355+		42, 		53, 		14)
	set_bounds(		trem_freq_motion_invert[		i], 		405+		45, 		355+		41, 		16, 		14)
	set_bounds(		trem_depth[		i], 		600, 		355, 		34, 		30)
	set_bounds(		trem_depth_min[		i], 		600+		-50, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		trem_depth_max[		i], 		600+		40, 		355+		6, 		39, 		20)
	set_bounds(		trem_depth_motion[		i], 		600+		-22, 		355+		42, 		53, 		14)
	set_bounds(		trem_depth_motion_invert[		i], 		600+		45, 		355+		41, 		16, 		14)

	assign_to_page(		trem_bypass[		i], 		UIpage_MAIN, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
	assign_to_page(		trem_freq[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_VALUE)
	assign_to_page(		trem_freq_min[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		trem_freq_max[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		trem_freq_motion[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		trem_freq_motion_invert[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		trem_depth[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_VALUE)
	assign_to_page(		trem_depth_min[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		trem_depth_max[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		trem_depth_motion[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
	assign_to_page(		trem_depth_motion_invert[		i], 		UIpage_TREM1+		i, 		HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

	link_control_to_ep(		trem_bypass[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS, -		1, -		1, 		0)
	link_control_to_ep(		trem_freq[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY, -		1, -		1, 		0)
	link_control_to_ep(		trem_depth[		i], 		ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY, -		1, -		1, 		0)
end for
end macro
macro set_up_motion_module()

declareui_label	motion_min_value[	4](	1,	1)
declareui_label	motion_max_value[	4](	1,	1)

declareui_label	motion_min_label[	4](	1,	1)
declareui_label	motion_max_label[	4](	1,	1)

for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	set_label_properties(		motion_min_value[		i], 		"", 		"", 		1, 		font_motion_orange, 		0)
	set_label_properties(		motion_max_value[		i], 		"", 		"", 		1, 		font_motion_white, 		0)

	set_label_properties(		motion_min_label[		i], 		"", 		"knob_motion_red")
	set_label_properties(		motion_max_label[		i], 		"", 		"knob_motion_blue")

	set_bounds(		motion_min_value[		i], 		0, 		0, 		50, 		20)
	set_bounds(		motion_max_value[		i], 		0, 		0, 		50, 		20)

	set_bounds(		motion_min_label[		i], 		0, 		0, 		38, 		33)
	set_bounds(		motion_max_label[		i], 		0, 		0, 		38, 		33)

	set_control_par(		motion_min_value[		i], 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)
	set_control_par(		motion_max_value[		i], 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)

	set_control_par(		motion_min_label[		i], 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)
	set_control_par(		motion_max_label[		i], 		CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 		1)

	assign_to_page(		motion_min_value[		i], 		UIpage_NONE, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
	assign_to_page(		motion_max_value[		i], 		UIpage_NONE, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)

	assign_to_page(		motion_min_label[		i], 		UIpage_NONE, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
	assign_to_page(		motion_max_label[		i], 		UIpage_NONE, 		HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end for
declare	fx_control_values[	4*	11,	4]:=(	0)


for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	fx_control_values[	0+(	11*	i),	0]:=	attack[	i]
	fx_control_values[	1+(	11*	i),	0]:=	decay[	i]
	fx_control_values[	2+(	11*	i),	0] :=	sli_lc_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	3+(	11*	i),	0] :=	sli_bell_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	4+(	11*	i),	0] :=	sli_hc_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	5+(	11*	i),	0]:=	mod_mix[	i]
	fx_control_values[	6+(	11*	i),	0]:=	sat_gain[	i]
	fx_control_values[	7+(	11*	i),	0] :=	mod_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	8+(	11*	i),	0]:=	mixer.senddel[	i]
	fx_control_values[	9+(	11*	i),	0]:=	trem_depth[	i]
	fx_control_values[	10+(	11*	i),	0]:=	trem_freq[	i]
end for
declare	fx_motion_values[	11,	4]:=(	0)

end macro
macro set_motion_graphic_positions(	#basecontrol#, 	#ctrl_num#)
	motion_min_value#ctrl_num#->	x:=	#basecontrol#->	x+	-50
	motion_min_value#ctrl_num#->	y:=	#basecontrol#->	y+	6
	motion_min_value#ctrl_num#->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
	motion_max_value#ctrl_num#->	x:=	#basecontrol#->	x+	40
	motion_max_value#ctrl_num#->	y:=	#basecontrol#->	y+	6
	motion_max_value#ctrl_num#->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG



	motion_min_label#ctrl_num#->	x:=	#basecontrol#->	x+	1
	motion_min_label#ctrl_num#->	y:=	#basecontrol#->	y-	1
	motion_min_label#ctrl_num#->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
	motion_max_label#ctrl_num#->	x:=	#basecontrol#->	x+	1
	motion_max_label#ctrl_num#->	y:=	#basecontrol#->	y-	1
	motion_max_label#ctrl_num#->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end macro
macro update_motion_min_label(	#inputctrl#, 	#min#, 	#max#, 	#n#)
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	#inputctrl#->	value)-	#min#)/(	#max#-	#min#))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_min_value#n#, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_min_label#n#->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)
end macro
macro update_motion_max_label(	#inputctrl#, 	#min#, 	#max#, 	#n#)
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	#inputctrl#->	value)-	#min#)/(	#max#-	#min#))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value#n#, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label#n#->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)
end macro
macro set_sat_gain(	#ctrl_value#, 	#slot_idx#, 	#main_engine_par#)
if	sat_menu[	#slot_idx#] ->	value=	0
	set_engine_par(		#main_engine_par#, 		#ctrl_value#, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot_idx#)
	fx_sat_balancer :=(	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE,-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	#slot_idx#)-	500000)/	3
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot_idx#)
else
	set_engine_par(		#main_engine_par#, (		#ctrl_value#-		500000)*		2, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot_idx#)
if	sat_menu[	#slot_idx#] ->	value=	3
	fx_sat_balancer :=	get_engine_par(	#main_engine_par#,-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	#slot_idx#)/	6
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot_idx#)
elseif	sat_menu[	#slot_idx#] ->	value=	5
	fx_sat_balancer :=	0
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot_idx#)
else
	fx_sat_balancer :=	get_engine_par(	#main_engine_par#,-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	#slot_idx#)/	10
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot_idx#)
end if
end if
end macro
macro save_sat_preset(	#array#, 	#slot#)
	message(		"Sat Save 01: "&		preset.n)
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		sat_menu[		#slot#] ->		value)




select	sat_menu[	#slot#] ->	value
case	0
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
case	1
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DISTORTION_TYPE,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
case	2
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PREGAINLEAD,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BASS,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MID,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_TREBLE,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_POSTGAIN,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_RESONANCE,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PRESENCE,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_LEADCHANNEL,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_HIGAIN,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BRIGHT,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_CRUNCH,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MONO,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
case	3
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
case	4
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
case	5
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
	preset_add_param(		#array#, 		get_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR,-		1,		3,		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#))
end select
	message(		"Sat Save 02: "&		preset.n)
end macro
macro load_sat_preset(	#array#, 	#slot#)
	message(		"Sat Load 01: "&		preset.n)
	preset_load_control(		#array#, 		sat_menu[		#slot#])
	visible_deny :=	1
call	update_sat_type



select	sat_menu[	#slot#] ->	value
case	0
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
case	1
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_DISTORTION_TYPE, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
case	2
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PREGAINLEAD, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BASS, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MID, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_TREBLE, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_POSTGAIN, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_RESONANCE, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PRESENCE, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_LEADCHANNEL, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_HIGAIN, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BRIGHT, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_CRUNCH, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MONO, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
case	3
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
case	4
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
case	5
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
	preset_load_param(		#array#, 		ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		#slot#)
end select
	message(		"Sat Load 02: "&		preset.n)
	visible_deny :=	0
end macro
macro on_ui_fx_tab(	#control#, 	#value#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	fx_tab :=	#value#
call	main_subpage_manager
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_attack_decay(	#control#, 	#label_text#, 	#label#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		" ms", 		#label#, 		#label_text#)
if	search(	attack,	get_ui_id(	#control#))#-	1and	loaded_instruments[	search(	attack,	get_ui_id(	#control#))]=	0
	#control#->	label :=	"N/A"
elseif	search(	decay,	get_ui_id(	#control#))#-	1and	loaded_instruments[	search(	decay,	get_ui_id(	#control#))]=	0
	#control#->	label :=	"N/A"
end if
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_effect_bypass(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
call	update_fx_active_labels
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		"", 		#control#, 		"")
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_mod_menu(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
call	update_mod_type
call	update_visibility
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_mod(	#control#, 	#label_text#, 	#label#, 	#txt#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		#label_text#, 		#label#, 		#txt#)
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_sat_tone(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		"", 		sat_tone_value_label, 		"TONE")
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_sat_gain(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		"", 		sat_gain_value_label, 		"GAIN")
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_sat_menu(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	load_id :=	load_array_str(	sat_preset_array,	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&	sat_preset_names[	#control#]&	".nka")
while	load_id>	0
	wait(		100)
end while
if	load_id=-	1
	preset.n :=	0
	load_sat_preset(		sat_preset_array, 		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		#control#)))
end if
call	update_visibility
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_lc_order(	#n#)
on ui_control(	mnu_lc_order#n#)
	set_current_control(		mnu_lc_order#n#, 		"", 		mnu_lc_order#n#, 		"")
end on
end macro

end on
end macro

macro on_ui_bell_q(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		" Oc", 		lbl_bell_q_value, 		"Mid Q")
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_bell_freq(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		" Hz", 		lbl_bell_freq_value, 		"Mid Freq")
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_bell_gain(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
	set_current_control(		#control#, 		" dB", 		lbl_bell_gain_value, 		"Mid Gain")
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_motion_activate(	#control#, 	#main_ctrl#, 	#engine_par#, 	#slot#, 	#generic#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
if	#control#=	1
	relink_control_to_ep(		#main_ctrl#, 		#engine_par#, 		#slot#, 		#generic#, 		1)
	#main_ctrl#->	label :=	"Motion"
else
	relink_control_to_ep(		#main_ctrl#, 		#engine_par#, 		#slot#, 		#generic#, 		0)
end if
call	update_fx_motion_values
if	#control#=	0
if	search(	attack,	#main_ctrl#)=-	1and	search(	decay,	#main_ctrl#)=-	1
if	search(	trem_depth,	#main_ctrl#)#-	1or	search(	trem_freq,	#main_ctrl#)#-	1
	mod_lfo :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	#generic#]]+	n,	"LFO_SINE_1")
	target_idx :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	#generic#]]+	i,	mod_lfo,	"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
	#main_ctrl#->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	#engine_par#,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	#generic#]],	mod_lfo,	target_idx)
end if
elseif	search(	attack,	#main_ctrl#)#-	1or	search(	decay,	#main_ctrl#)#-	1
if	search(	attack,	#main_ctrl#)#-	1
	n :=	search(	attack,	#main_ctrl#)
else
	n :=	search(	decay,	#main_ctrl#)
end if
	s :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	"ENV_AHDSR")
	i :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
	#main_ctrl#->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	#engine_par#,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	i)&	" ms"
end if
end if
call	update_visibility
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_motion_min(	#control#, 	#min#, 	#max#, 	#n#, 	#motion_num#)
on ui_control(	#control#_min#n#)
if	#control#_min#n#>=	#control#_max#n#
	#control#_min#n# :=	#control#_max#n#-	1
end if
	update_motion_min_label(		#control#_min#n#, 		#min#, 		#max#, 		#motion_num#)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_motion_max(	#control#, 	#min#, 	#max#, 	#n#, 	#motion_num#)
on ui_control(	#control#_max#n#)
if	#control#_max#n#<=	#control#_min#n#
	#control#_max#n# :=	#control#_min#n#+	1
end if
	update_motion_max_label(		#control#_max#n#, 		#min#, 		#max#, 		#motion_num#)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on
end macro
macro on_ui_motion_invert(	#control#)
on ui_control(	#control#)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on
end macro
macro set_up_nks()
declare	nks_i
	set_nks_array(		mixer.mute, 		"Mute ")
	set_nks_array(		mixer.solo, 		"Solo ")
	set_nks_array(		mixer.vol, 		"Volume ")
	set_nks_array(		mixer.pan, 		"Pan ")
	set_nks_array(		attack, 		"Attack ")
	set_nks_array(		decay, 		"Decay ")

	set_nks_array(		mixer.senddel, 		"Delay Send ")
	set_nks_array(		mixer.sendrev, 		"Reverb Send ")

	set_nks(		mixer.comp_bypass, 		"Compressor Bypass ")
	set_nks(		mixer.comp_threshold, 		"Compressor Threshold ")
	set_nks(		mixer.comp_makeup, 		"Compressor Gain ")
	set_nks(		mixer.delay_bypass, 		"Delay Bypass ")
	set_nks(		mixer.delay_sync, 		"Delay Sync ")
	set_nks(		mixer.delay_time, 		"Delay Time ")
	set_nks(		mixer.delay_feedback, 		"Delay Feedback ")
	set_nks(		mixer.delay_hicut, 		"Delay Hicut ")
	set_nks(		mixer.delay_return, 		"Delay Return ")
	set_nks(		mixer.rev_bypass, 		"Reverb Bypass ")
	set_nks(		mixer.rev_predelay, 		"Predelay ")
	set_nks(		mixer.rev_time, 		"Time ")
if	mixer.rev_type=	0
	mixer.rev_predelay->	automation_name :=	"N/A"
	mixer.rev_time->	automation_name :=	"N/A"
else
	mixer.rev_predelay->	automation_name :=	"Predelay "
	mixer.rev_time->	automation_name :=	"Time "
end if
	set_nks(		mixer.rev_return, 		"Reverb Return ")




	set_nks_array(		filter_bypass, 		"EQ Bypass ")
	set_nks_array(		sli_lc_freq, 		"EQ LC Freq ")
	set_nks_array(		sli_lc_resonance, 		"EQ LC Res ")
	set_nks_array(		sli_bell_freq, 		"EQ Mid Freq ")
	set_nks_array(		sli_bell_q, 		"EQ Mid Q ")
	set_nks_array(		sli_bell_gain, 		"EQ Mid Gain ")
	set_nks_array(		sli_hc_freq, 		"EQ HC Freq ")
	set_nks_array(		sli_hc_resonance, 		"EQ HC Res ")

	set_nks_array(		sat_bypass, 		"Sat Bypass ")
	set_nks_array(		sat_gain, 		"Sat Gain ")

	set_nks_array(		mod_bypass, 		"Chorus Bypass ")
	set_nks_array(		mod_depth, 		"Chorus Depth ")
	set_nks_array(		mod_freq, 		"Chorus Speed ")
	set_nks_array(		mod_phase, 		"Chorus Phase ")
	set_nks_array(		mod_mix, 		"Chorus Mix ")

	set_nks_array(		trem_bypass, 		"Trem Bypass ")
	set_nks_array(		trem_depth, 		"Trem Depth ")
	set_nks_array(		trem_freq, 		"Trem Frequency ")


	set_nks(		grain1.density_knob, 		"Grain 1 Density ")
	set_nks(		grain2.density_knob, 		"Grain 2 Density ")
	set_nks(		grain1.pos_rand_knob, 		"Grain 1 Rand Pos ")
	set_nks(		grain2.pos_rand_knob, 		"Grain 2 Rand Pos ")
	set_nks(		grain1.position_A, 		"Grain 1 Pos A ")
	set_nks(		grain2.position_A, 		"Grain 2 Pos A ")
	set_nks(		grain1.position_B, 		"Grain 1 Pos B ")
	set_nks(		grain2.position_B, 		"Grain 2 Pos B ")
	set_nks(		grain1.ATT, 		"Grain 1 Attack ")
	set_nks(		grain2.ATT, 		"Grain 2 Attack ")
	set_nks(		grain1.DEC, 		"Grain 1 Decay ")
	set_nks(		grain2.DEC, 		"Grain 2 Decay ")
	set_nks(		grain1.SUS, 		"Grain 1 Sustain ")
	set_nks(		grain2.SUS, 		"Grain 2 Sustain ")
	set_nks(		grain1.REL, 		"Grain 1 Release ")
	set_nks(		grain2.REL, 		"Grain 2 Release ")



end macro
macro set_nks_array(	#array#, 	#automation_name#)
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	#array#)-	1
	#array#[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	#array#[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	#automation_name#
	inc(		nks_i)
end for
end macro
macro set_nks(	#control#, 	#automation_name#)
	#control#->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	#control#->	automation_name :=	#automation_name#
	inc(		nks_i)
end macro





function	run_arp1
	arp1.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	arp1.latch_mode#	0
	arp1.a :=	0

if	arp1.cursor#	0
call	arp1_sort_fill_buffer
end if

if	arp1.bar_reset_active#	0
if	arp1.bar_count>=	arp1.bar_limit
	arp1.aa :=	0
	arp1.bar_count :=	0
	arp1.oct_cursor :=	0
	arp1.n :=	0
	arp1.s :=	0

end if
end if



if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_arp1and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	arp1.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	arp1.i :=	0to	31
	arp1.rhythm_indicator[	arp1.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp1.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	arp1.rhythm_indicator[	arp1.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp1.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	arp1.rhythm_playback[	arp1.act_step]#	0
if	arp1.loop_cursor#	0
if(	arp1.note_order=	14)
for	s:=	0to	arp1.i
	note_off(		arp1.chord_buffer[		s])
	arp1.chord_last_notes[	s] :=-	1
end for
	arp1.i :=	0
while(	arp1.i<	arp1.loop_cursor)
if	arp1.rhythm_playback[	arp1.act_step]#	0
	arp1.velo :=	arp1.rhythm_playback[	arp1.act_step]
end if
if(	arp1.velo>	127)
	arp1.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp1.velo<	1)
	arp1.velo :=	1
end if

	arp1.note :=	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.i]
	arp1.note :=	arp1.note+	arp1.oct_cursor*	12
	arp1.note :=	arp1.note+	arp1.transpose


if	arp1.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.chord_last_notes[	arp1.i] :=	arp1.note_to_engine
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp1.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp1.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.chord_last_notes[	arp1.i] :=	arp1.note_to_engine
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp1.a)
end if
elseif	arp1.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.chord_last_notes[	arp1.i] :=	arp1.note_to_engine
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp1.a)
end if
elseif	arp1.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.chord_last_notes[	arp1.i] :=	arp1.note_to_engine
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp1.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	arp1.chord_last_notes[	arp1.i]#-	1
if	in_range(	arp1.chord_last_notes[	arp1.i],	instr_min_key[	arp1.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp1.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp1.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp1.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp1.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp1.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp1.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp1.a]+	1
end if
end if
end if

	arp1.chord_buffer[	arp1.i] :=	arp1.note_id
	inc(		arp1.i)
end while

if	arp1.note_repeat=	0
	arp1.aa :=	arp1.loop_cursor
else
	inc(		arp1.aa)
if(	arp1.aa>	arp1.note_repeat)
	arp1.aa :=	0
if(	arp1.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp1.oct_cursor)
if(	arp1.oct_cursor>	arp1.octave)
	arp1.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp1.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp1.oct_cursor)
if(	arp1.oct_cursor<	arp1.octave)
	arp1.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

if	arp1.rhythm_playback[	arp1.act_step]#	0
	arp1.velo :=	arp1.rhythm_playback[	arp1.act_step]
end if
if(	arp1.velo>	127)
	arp1.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp1.velo<	1)
	arp1.velo :=	1
end if

if	arp1.note_repeat#	0
	arp1.note :=	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.s]
	inc(		arp1.n)
if	arp1.n>	arp1.repeat_max
	arp1.n :=	0
	inc(		arp1.s)
	arp1.aa :=	arp1.s
end if
else
	arp1.note :=	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.aa]
	inc(		arp1.aa)
end if
	arp1.note :=	arp1.note+	arp1.oct_cursor*	12
	arp1.note :=	arp1.note+	arp1.transpose

for	arp1.a :=	0to	4-	1
if	arp1.last_note_ids[	arp1.a]#-	1
	note_off(		arp1.last_note_ids[		arp1.a])
	arp1.last_note_ids[	arp1.a] :=-	1
end if
end for

if	arp1.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.last_note_ids[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.note_id
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp1.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp1.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.last_note_ids[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.note_id
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp1.a)
end if
elseif	arp1.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.last_note_ids[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.note_id
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp1.a)
end if
elseif	arp1.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp1.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]>	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	arp1.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp1.a]*	12)
if	arp1.note_to_engine<	0
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp1.note_to_engine>	127
	arp1.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp1.note_id :=	play_note(	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp1.last_note_ids[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.note_id
	arp1.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp1.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp1.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	in_range(	arp1.note_to_engine,	instr_min_key[	arp1.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp1.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp1.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp1.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp1.note_to_engine,	arp1.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp1.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp1.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp1.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp1.a]+	1
end if
end if


if	arp1.s>=	arp1.loop_cursor
	arp1.s :=	0
	arp1.aa :=	0
if(	arp1.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp1.oct_cursor)
if(	arp1.oct_cursor>	arp1.octave)
	arp1.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp1.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp1.oct_cursor)
if(	arp1.oct_cursor<	arp1.octave)
	arp1.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseif	arp1.rhythm_playback[	arp1.act_step]=	0
if	arp1.rhythm_skip=	1
if	arp1.note_repeat#	0
if	arp1.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp1.n)
if	arp1.n<	0
	arp1.n :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp1.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp1.aa)
end if
if	arp1.aa<	0
	arp1.aa :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp1.note_repeat#	0
	inc(		arp1.n)
if	arp1.note_order=	14
	inc(		arp1.aa)
end if
else
	inc(		arp1.aa)
end if

end if
if	arp1.note_order#	14
if	arp1.n>	arp1.repeat_max
	arp1.n :=	0

	arp1.aa :=	arp1.s
end if
end if
end if

if	arp1.bar_reset_active#	0
	inc(		arp1.bar_count)
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	arp1.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	arp1.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	arp1.real_hold*	int_to_real(	arp1.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	arp1.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	arp1.act_step+	1)))
if	arp1.act_step=	0
	arp1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
	arp1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	arp1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	arp1.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
if	arp1.indicator_hold>	arp1.t
	arp1.t :=	arp1.indicator_hold
	arp1.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp1.real_hold)+	1
else
	arp1.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp1.real_hold)
end if



if	arp1.note_repeat=	0
if(	arp1.aa>=	arp1.loop_cursor)
	arp1.aa :=	0
if(	arp1.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp1.oct_cursor)
if(	arp1.oct_cursor>	arp1.octave)
	arp1.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp1.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp1.oct_cursor)
if(	arp1.oct_cursor<	arp1.octave)
	arp1.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
	inc(		arp1.act_step)
if(	arp1.act_step>=	arp1.steps)
	arp1.act_step :=	0
	arp1.t :=	0
end if

select	arp1.rate
case	0
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	arp1.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

if	engine_half_time=	1
	arp1.step_length :=	arp1.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	arp1.step_length :=	arp1.step_length/	2
end if

if(	arp1.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	arp1.step_length :=	arp1.step_length+(	arp1.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	arp1.step_length :=	arp1.step_length+(	arp1.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		arp1.swing_cursor)

if	arp1.humanize_hold#	0
	arp1.step_length :=	arp1.step_length-	abs(	arp1.humanize_hold)
end if
	arp1.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	arp1.step_length :=	arp1.step_length+	arp1.humanize_hold





if	arp1.cursor#	0
	wait(		arp1.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_arp1_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	arp1.cursor-	1
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	arp1.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	arp1.note_selection#	0and	arp1.cursor#	0
	sort(		arp1.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	arp1.note_selection_hold
case	1
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	arp1.cursor-	1]
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	arp1.cursor-	1]
if	arp1.cursor>	1
if	arp1.cursor=	2
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	arp1.cursor-	2]
end if
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	arp1.cursor/	2]
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp1.cursor>	1
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp1.cursor=	2
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	arp1.cursor>	2
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	arp1.cursor=	1
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	arp1.note_selection=	0and	arp1.cursor#	0
	arp1.selected_cursor :=	arp1.cursor
end if
end function

function	arp1_sort_fill_buffer
call	set_arp1_note_selection
while(	arp1.a<	128)
if(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor)
	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	arp1.a]
else
	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a] :=	0
	arp1.selected_notes_buffer[	arp1.a] :=	0
end if
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	sort(		arp1.ordered, 		1)
	arp1.min_note :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	1]
	arp1.max_note :=	arp1.ordered[	0]

select(	arp1.note_order)
case	2
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	1-	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
case	3
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
case	4
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	1-	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
if(	arp1.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp1.loop_cursor :=(	arp1.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a+	arp1.selected_cursor] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a+	1]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
end if
case	5
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
if(	arp1.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp1.loop_cursor :=(	arp1.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a+	arp1.selected_cursor] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	2-	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
end if
case	6
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.max_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.ordered[	2]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	0]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp1.ordered[	1]
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	arp1.a-	1]
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	arp1.a-	3]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp1.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	7
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.max_note
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.ordered[	0]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	2]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp1.ordered[	1]
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a]
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a+	2]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp1.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	8
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.max_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.ordered[	2]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	0]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp1.ordered[	1]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp1.ordered[	0]
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	arp1.a-	1]
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	arp1.a-	3]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+((	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a+	2]
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+((	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a+	1]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp1.selected_cursor)-	10
end if
case	9
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.max_note
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.min_note
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp1.ordered[	0]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	2]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp1.ordered[	1]
	arp1.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp1.ordered[	2]
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp1.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a]
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a+	2]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+((	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	arp1.a-	3]
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+((	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	arp1.a-	2]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp1.selected_cursor)-	10
end if

case	10to	13
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor
	arp1.a :=	0
while((	arp1.a*	2)<	arp1.selected_cursor)
