	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.selected_cursor-	1-	arp1.a]
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor
if(	arp1.note_order=	11or	arp1.note_order=	13)
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.loop_cursor)
	arp1.help_buffer[	arp1.loop_cursor-	arp1.a-	1] :=	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.loop_cursor)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.help_buffer[	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
end if
if((	arp1.note_order=	12or	arp1.note_order=	13)and	arp1.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp1.loop_buffer[(	arp1.a)+(	arp1.selected_cursor)] :=	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.selected_cursor-	2-	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor*	2-	2
end if
case	14
	arp1.loop_cursor :=	arp1.selected_cursor
	arp1.a :=	0
while(	arp1.a<	arp1.selected_cursor)
	arp1.loop_buffer[	arp1.a] :=	arp1.ordered[	arp1.a]
	inc(		arp1.a)
end while
end select
end function

function	run_arp2
	arp2.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	arp2.latch_mode#	0
	arp2.a :=	0

if	arp2.cursor#	0
call	arp2_sort_fill_buffer
end if

if	arp2.bar_reset_active#	0
if	arp2.bar_count>=	arp2.bar_limit
	arp2.aa :=	0
	arp2.bar_count :=	0
	arp2.oct_cursor :=	0
	arp2.n :=	0
	arp2.s :=	0

end if
end if



if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_arp2and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	arp2.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	arp2.i :=	0to	31
	arp2.rhythm_indicator[	arp2.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp2.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	arp2.rhythm_indicator[	arp2.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp2.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	arp2.rhythm_playback[	arp2.act_step]#	0
if	arp2.loop_cursor#	0
if(	arp2.note_order=	14)
for	s:=	0to	arp2.i
	note_off(		arp2.chord_buffer[		s])
	arp2.chord_last_notes[	s] :=-	1
end for
	arp2.i :=	0
while(	arp2.i<	arp2.loop_cursor)
if	arp2.rhythm_playback[	arp2.act_step]#	0
	arp2.velo :=	arp2.rhythm_playback[	arp2.act_step]
end if
if(	arp2.velo>	127)
	arp2.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp2.velo<	1)
	arp2.velo :=	1
end if

	arp2.note :=	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.i]
	arp2.note :=	arp2.note+	arp2.oct_cursor*	12
	arp2.note :=	arp2.note+	arp2.transpose


if	arp2.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.chord_last_notes[	arp2.i] :=	arp2.note_to_engine
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp2.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp2.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.chord_last_notes[	arp2.i] :=	arp2.note_to_engine
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp2.a)
end if
elseif	arp2.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.chord_last_notes[	arp2.i] :=	arp2.note_to_engine
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp2.a)
end if
elseif	arp2.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.chord_last_notes[	arp2.i] :=	arp2.note_to_engine
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp2.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	arp2.chord_last_notes[	arp2.i]#-	1
if	in_range(	arp2.chord_last_notes[	arp2.i],	instr_min_key[	arp2.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp2.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp2.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp2.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp2.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp2.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp2.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp2.a]+	1
end if
end if
end if

	arp2.chord_buffer[	arp2.i] :=	arp2.note_id
	inc(		arp2.i)
end while

if	arp2.note_repeat=	0
	arp2.aa :=	arp2.loop_cursor
else
	inc(		arp2.aa)
if(	arp2.aa>	arp2.note_repeat)
	arp2.aa :=	0
if(	arp2.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp2.oct_cursor)
if(	arp2.oct_cursor>	arp2.octave)
	arp2.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp2.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp2.oct_cursor)
if(	arp2.oct_cursor<	arp2.octave)
	arp2.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

if	arp2.rhythm_playback[	arp2.act_step]#	0
	arp2.velo :=	arp2.rhythm_playback[	arp2.act_step]
end if
if(	arp2.velo>	127)
	arp2.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp2.velo<	1)
	arp2.velo :=	1
end if

if	arp2.note_repeat#	0
	arp2.note :=	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.s]
	inc(		arp2.n)
if	arp2.n>	arp2.repeat_max
	arp2.n :=	0
	inc(		arp2.s)
	arp2.aa :=	arp2.s
end if
else
	arp2.note :=	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.aa]
	inc(		arp2.aa)
end if
	arp2.note :=	arp2.note+	arp2.oct_cursor*	12
	arp2.note :=	arp2.note+	arp2.transpose

for	arp2.a :=	0to	4-	1
if	arp2.last_note_ids[	arp2.a]#-	1
	note_off(		arp2.last_note_ids[		arp2.a])
	arp2.last_note_ids[	arp2.a] :=-	1
end if
end for

if	arp2.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.last_note_ids[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.note_id
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp2.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp2.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.last_note_ids[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.note_id
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp2.a)
end if
elseif	arp2.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.last_note_ids[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.note_id
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp2.a)
end if
elseif	arp2.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp2.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]>	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	arp2.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp2.a]*	12)
if	arp2.note_to_engine<	0
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp2.note_to_engine>	127
	arp2.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp2.note_id :=	play_note(	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp2.last_note_ids[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.note_id
	arp2.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp2.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp2.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	in_range(	arp2.note_to_engine,	instr_min_key[	arp2.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp2.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp2.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp2.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp2.note_to_engine,	arp2.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp2.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp2.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp2.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp2.a]+	1
end if
end if


if	arp2.s>=	arp2.loop_cursor
	arp2.s :=	0
	arp2.aa :=	0
if(	arp2.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp2.oct_cursor)
if(	arp2.oct_cursor>	arp2.octave)
	arp2.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp2.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp2.oct_cursor)
if(	arp2.oct_cursor<	arp2.octave)
	arp2.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseif	arp2.rhythm_playback[	arp2.act_step]=	0
if	arp2.rhythm_skip=	1
if	arp2.note_repeat#	0
if	arp2.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp2.n)
if	arp2.n<	0
	arp2.n :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp2.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp2.aa)
end if
if	arp2.aa<	0
	arp2.aa :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp2.note_repeat#	0
	inc(		arp2.n)
if	arp2.note_order=	14
	inc(		arp2.aa)
end if
else
	inc(		arp2.aa)
end if

end if
if	arp2.note_order#	14
if	arp2.n>	arp2.repeat_max
	arp2.n :=	0

	arp2.aa :=	arp2.s
end if
end if
end if

if	arp2.bar_reset_active#	0
	inc(		arp2.bar_count)
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	arp2.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	arp2.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	arp2.real_hold*	int_to_real(	arp2.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	arp2.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	arp2.act_step+	1)))
if	arp2.act_step=	0
	arp2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
	arp2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	arp2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	arp2.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
if	arp2.indicator_hold>	arp2.t
	arp2.t :=	arp2.indicator_hold
	arp2.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp2.real_hold)+	1
else
	arp2.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp2.real_hold)
end if



if	arp2.note_repeat=	0
if(	arp2.aa>=	arp2.loop_cursor)
	arp2.aa :=	0
if(	arp2.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp2.oct_cursor)
if(	arp2.oct_cursor>	arp2.octave)
	arp2.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp2.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp2.oct_cursor)
if(	arp2.oct_cursor<	arp2.octave)
	arp2.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
	inc(		arp2.act_step)
if(	arp2.act_step>=	arp2.steps)
	arp2.act_step :=	0
	arp2.t :=	0
end if

select	arp2.rate
case	0
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	arp2.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

if	engine_half_time=	1
	arp2.step_length :=	arp2.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	arp2.step_length :=	arp2.step_length/	2
end if

if(	arp2.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	arp2.step_length :=	arp2.step_length+(	arp2.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	arp2.step_length :=	arp2.step_length+(	arp2.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		arp2.swing_cursor)

if	arp2.humanize_hold#	0
	arp2.step_length :=	arp2.step_length-	abs(	arp2.humanize_hold)
end if
	arp2.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	arp2.step_length :=	arp2.step_length+	arp2.humanize_hold





if	arp2.cursor#	0
	wait(		arp2.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_arp2_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	arp2.cursor-	1
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	arp2.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	arp2.note_selection#	0and	arp2.cursor#	0
	sort(		arp2.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	arp2.note_selection_hold
case	1
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	arp2.cursor-	1]
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	arp2.cursor-	1]
if	arp2.cursor>	1
if	arp2.cursor=	2
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	arp2.cursor-	2]
end if
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	arp2.cursor/	2]
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp2.cursor>	1
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp2.cursor=	2
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	arp2.cursor>	2
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	arp2.cursor=	1
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	arp2.note_selection=	0and	arp2.cursor#	0
	arp2.selected_cursor :=	arp2.cursor
end if
end function

function	arp2_sort_fill_buffer
call	set_arp2_note_selection
while(	arp2.a<	128)
if(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor)
	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	arp2.a]
else
	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a] :=	0
	arp2.selected_notes_buffer[	arp2.a] :=	0
end if
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	sort(		arp2.ordered, 		1)
	arp2.min_note :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	1]
	arp2.max_note :=	arp2.ordered[	0]

select(	arp2.note_order)
case	2
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	1-	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
case	3
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
case	4
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	1-	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
if(	arp2.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp2.loop_cursor :=(	arp2.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a+	arp2.selected_cursor] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a+	1]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
end if
case	5
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
if(	arp2.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp2.loop_cursor :=(	arp2.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a+	arp2.selected_cursor] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	2-	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
end if
case	6
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.max_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.ordered[	2]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	0]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp2.ordered[	1]
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	arp2.a-	1]
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	arp2.a-	3]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp2.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	7
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.max_note
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.ordered[	0]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	2]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp2.ordered[	1]
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a]
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a+	2]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp2.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	8
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.max_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.ordered[	2]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	0]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp2.ordered[	1]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp2.ordered[	0]
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	arp2.a-	1]
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	arp2.a-	3]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+((	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a+	2]
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+((	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a+	1]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp2.selected_cursor)-	10
end if
case	9
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.max_note
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.min_note
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp2.ordered[	0]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	2]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp2.ordered[	1]
	arp2.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp2.ordered[	2]
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp2.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a]
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a+	2]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+((	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	arp2.a-	3]
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+((	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	arp2.a-	2]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp2.selected_cursor)-	10
end if

case	10to	13
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor
	arp2.a :=	0
while((	arp2.a*	2)<	arp2.selected_cursor)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.selected_cursor-	1-	arp2.a]
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor
if(	arp2.note_order=	11or	arp2.note_order=	13)
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.loop_cursor)
	arp2.help_buffer[	arp2.loop_cursor-	arp2.a-	1] :=	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.loop_cursor)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.help_buffer[	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
end if
if((	arp2.note_order=	12or	arp2.note_order=	13)and	arp2.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp2.loop_buffer[(	arp2.a)+(	arp2.selected_cursor)] :=	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.selected_cursor-	2-	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor*	2-	2
end if
case	14
	arp2.loop_cursor :=	arp2.selected_cursor
	arp2.a :=	0
while(	arp2.a<	arp2.selected_cursor)
	arp2.loop_buffer[	arp2.a] :=	arp2.ordered[	arp2.a]
	inc(		arp2.a)
end while
end select
end function

function	run_arp3
	arp3.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	arp3.latch_mode#	0
	arp3.a :=	0

if	arp3.cursor#	0
call	arp3_sort_fill_buffer
end if

if	arp3.bar_reset_active#	0
if	arp3.bar_count>=	arp3.bar_limit
	arp3.aa :=	0
	arp3.bar_count :=	0
	arp3.oct_cursor :=	0
	arp3.n :=	0
	arp3.s :=	0

end if
end if



if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_arp3and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	arp3.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	arp3.i :=	0to	31
	arp3.rhythm_indicator[	arp3.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp3.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	arp3.rhythm_indicator[	arp3.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp3.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	arp3.rhythm_playback[	arp3.act_step]#	0
if	arp3.loop_cursor#	0
if(	arp3.note_order=	14)
for	s:=	0to	arp3.i
	note_off(		arp3.chord_buffer[		s])
	arp3.chord_last_notes[	s] :=-	1
end for
	arp3.i :=	0
while(	arp3.i<	arp3.loop_cursor)
if	arp3.rhythm_playback[	arp3.act_step]#	0
	arp3.velo :=	arp3.rhythm_playback[	arp3.act_step]
end if
if(	arp3.velo>	127)
	arp3.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp3.velo<	1)
	arp3.velo :=	1
end if

	arp3.note :=	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.i]
	arp3.note :=	arp3.note+	arp3.oct_cursor*	12
	arp3.note :=	arp3.note+	arp3.transpose


if	arp3.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.chord_last_notes[	arp3.i] :=	arp3.note_to_engine
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp3.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp3.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.chord_last_notes[	arp3.i] :=	arp3.note_to_engine
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp3.a)
end if
elseif	arp3.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.chord_last_notes[	arp3.i] :=	arp3.note_to_engine
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp3.a)
end if
elseif	arp3.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.chord_last_notes[	arp3.i] :=	arp3.note_to_engine
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp3.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	arp3.chord_last_notes[	arp3.i]#-	1
if	in_range(	arp3.chord_last_notes[	arp3.i],	instr_min_key[	arp3.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp3.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp3.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp3.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp3.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp3.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp3.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp3.a]+	1
end if
end if
end if

	arp3.chord_buffer[	arp3.i] :=	arp3.note_id
	inc(		arp3.i)
end while

if	arp3.note_repeat=	0
	arp3.aa :=	arp3.loop_cursor
else
	inc(		arp3.aa)
if(	arp3.aa>	arp3.note_repeat)
	arp3.aa :=	0
if(	arp3.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp3.oct_cursor)
if(	arp3.oct_cursor>	arp3.octave)
	arp3.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp3.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp3.oct_cursor)
if(	arp3.oct_cursor<	arp3.octave)
	arp3.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

if	arp3.rhythm_playback[	arp3.act_step]#	0
	arp3.velo :=	arp3.rhythm_playback[	arp3.act_step]
end if
if(	arp3.velo>	127)
	arp3.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp3.velo<	1)
	arp3.velo :=	1
end if

if	arp3.note_repeat#	0
	arp3.note :=	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.s]
	inc(		arp3.n)
if	arp3.n>	arp3.repeat_max
	arp3.n :=	0
	inc(		arp3.s)
	arp3.aa :=	arp3.s
end if
else
	arp3.note :=	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.aa]
	inc(		arp3.aa)
end if
	arp3.note :=	arp3.note+	arp3.oct_cursor*	12
	arp3.note :=	arp3.note+	arp3.transpose

for	arp3.a :=	0to	4-	1
if	arp3.last_note_ids[	arp3.a]#-	1
	note_off(		arp3.last_note_ids[		arp3.a])
	arp3.last_note_ids[	arp3.a] :=-	1
end if
end for

if	arp3.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.last_note_ids[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.note_id
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp3.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp3.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.last_note_ids[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.note_id
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp3.a)
end if
elseif	arp3.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.last_note_ids[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.note_id
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp3.a)
end if
elseif	arp3.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp3.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]>	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	arp3.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp3.a]*	12)
if	arp3.note_to_engine<	0
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp3.note_to_engine>	127
	arp3.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp3.note_id :=	play_note(	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp3.last_note_ids[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.note_id
	arp3.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp3.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp3.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	in_range(	arp3.note_to_engine,	instr_min_key[	arp3.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp3.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp3.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp3.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp3.note_to_engine,	arp3.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp3.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp3.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp3.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp3.a]+	1
end if
end if


if	arp3.s>=	arp3.loop_cursor
	arp3.s :=	0
	arp3.aa :=	0
if(	arp3.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp3.oct_cursor)
if(	arp3.oct_cursor>	arp3.octave)
	arp3.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp3.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp3.oct_cursor)
if(	arp3.oct_cursor<	arp3.octave)
	arp3.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseif	arp3.rhythm_playback[	arp3.act_step]=	0
if	arp3.rhythm_skip=	1
if	arp3.note_repeat#	0
if	arp3.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp3.n)
if	arp3.n<	0
	arp3.n :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp3.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp3.aa)
end if
if	arp3.aa<	0
	arp3.aa :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp3.note_repeat#	0
	inc(		arp3.n)
if	arp3.note_order=	14
	inc(		arp3.aa)
end if
else
	inc(		arp3.aa)
end if

end if
if	arp3.note_order#	14
if	arp3.n>	arp3.repeat_max
	arp3.n :=	0

	arp3.aa :=	arp3.s
end if
end if
end if

if	arp3.bar_reset_active#	0
	inc(		arp3.bar_count)
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	arp3.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	arp3.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	arp3.real_hold*	int_to_real(	arp3.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	arp3.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	arp3.act_step+	1)))
if	arp3.act_step=	0
	arp3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
	arp3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	arp3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	arp3.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
if	arp3.indicator_hold>	arp3.t
	arp3.t :=	arp3.indicator_hold
	arp3.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp3.real_hold)+	1
else
	arp3.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp3.real_hold)
end if



if	arp3.note_repeat=	0
if(	arp3.aa>=	arp3.loop_cursor)
	arp3.aa :=	0
if(	arp3.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp3.oct_cursor)
if(	arp3.oct_cursor>	arp3.octave)
	arp3.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp3.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp3.oct_cursor)
if(	arp3.oct_cursor<	arp3.octave)
	arp3.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
	inc(		arp3.act_step)
if(	arp3.act_step>=	arp3.steps)
	arp3.act_step :=	0
	arp3.t :=	0
end if

select	arp3.rate
case	0
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	arp3.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

if	engine_half_time=	1
	arp3.step_length :=	arp3.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	arp3.step_length :=	arp3.step_length/	2
end if

if(	arp3.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	arp3.step_length :=	arp3.step_length+(	arp3.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	arp3.step_length :=	arp3.step_length+(	arp3.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		arp3.swing_cursor)

if	arp3.humanize_hold#	0
	arp3.step_length :=	arp3.step_length-	abs(	arp3.humanize_hold)
end if
	arp3.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	arp3.step_length :=	arp3.step_length+	arp3.humanize_hold





if	arp3.cursor#	0
	wait(		arp3.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_arp3_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	arp3.cursor-	1
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	arp3.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	arp3.note_selection#	0and	arp3.cursor#	0
	sort(		arp3.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	arp3.note_selection_hold
case	1
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	arp3.cursor-	1]
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	arp3.cursor-	1]
if	arp3.cursor>	1
if	arp3.cursor=	2
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	arp3.cursor-	2]
end if
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	arp3.cursor/	2]
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp3.cursor>	1
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp3.cursor=	2
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	arp3.cursor>	2
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	arp3.cursor=	1
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	arp3.note_selection=	0and	arp3.cursor#	0
	arp3.selected_cursor :=	arp3.cursor
end if
end function

function	arp3_sort_fill_buffer
call	set_arp3_note_selection
while(	arp3.a<	128)
if(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor)
	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	arp3.a]
else
	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a] :=	0
	arp3.selected_notes_buffer[	arp3.a] :=	0
end if
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	sort(		arp3.ordered, 		1)
	arp3.min_note :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	1]
	arp3.max_note :=	arp3.ordered[	0]

select(	arp3.note_order)
case	2
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	1-	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
case	3
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
case	4
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	1-	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
if(	arp3.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp3.loop_cursor :=(	arp3.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a+	arp3.selected_cursor] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a+	1]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
end if
case	5
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
if(	arp3.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp3.loop_cursor :=(	arp3.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a+	arp3.selected_cursor] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	2-	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
end if
case	6
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.max_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.ordered[	2]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	0]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp3.ordered[	1]
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	arp3.a-	1]
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	arp3.a-	3]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp3.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	7
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.max_note
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.ordered[	0]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	2]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp3.ordered[	1]
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a]
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a+	2]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp3.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	8
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.max_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.ordered[	2]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	0]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp3.ordered[	1]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp3.ordered[	0]
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	arp3.a-	1]
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	arp3.a-	3]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+((	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a+	2]
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+((	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a+	1]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp3.selected_cursor)-	10
end if
case	9
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.max_note
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.min_note
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp3.ordered[	0]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	2]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp3.ordered[	1]
	arp3.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp3.ordered[	2]
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp3.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a]
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a+	2]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+((	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	arp3.a-	3]
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+((	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	arp3.a-	2]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp3.selected_cursor)-	10
end if

case	10to	13
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor
	arp3.a :=	0
while((	arp3.a*	2)<	arp3.selected_cursor)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.selected_cursor-	1-	arp3.a]
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor
if(	arp3.note_order=	11or	arp3.note_order=	13)
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.loop_cursor)
	arp3.help_buffer[	arp3.loop_cursor-	arp3.a-	1] :=	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.loop_cursor)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.help_buffer[	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
end if
if((	arp3.note_order=	12or	arp3.note_order=	13)and	arp3.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp3.loop_buffer[(	arp3.a)+(	arp3.selected_cursor)] :=	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.selected_cursor-	2-	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor*	2-	2
end if
case	14
	arp3.loop_cursor :=	arp3.selected_cursor
	arp3.a :=	0
while(	arp3.a<	arp3.selected_cursor)
	arp3.loop_buffer[	arp3.a] :=	arp3.ordered[	arp3.a]
	inc(		arp3.a)
end while
end select
end function

function	run_arp4
	arp4.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	arp4.latch_mode#	0
	arp4.a :=	0

if	arp4.cursor#	0
call	arp4_sort_fill_buffer
end if

if	arp4.bar_reset_active#	0
if	arp4.bar_count>=	arp4.bar_limit
	arp4.aa :=	0
	arp4.bar_count :=	0
	arp4.oct_cursor :=	0
	arp4.n :=	0
	arp4.s :=	0

end if
end if



if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_arp4and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	arp4.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	arp4.i :=	0to	31
	arp4.rhythm_indicator[	arp4.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp4.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	arp4.rhythm_indicator[	arp4.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	arp4.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	arp4.rhythm_playback[	arp4.act_step]#	0
if	arp4.loop_cursor#	0
if(	arp4.note_order=	14)
for	s:=	0to	arp4.i
	note_off(		arp4.chord_buffer[		s])
	arp4.chord_last_notes[	s] :=-	1
end for
	arp4.i :=	0
while(	arp4.i<	arp4.loop_cursor)
if	arp4.rhythm_playback[	arp4.act_step]#	0
	arp4.velo :=	arp4.rhythm_playback[	arp4.act_step]
end if
if(	arp4.velo>	127)
	arp4.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp4.velo<	1)
	arp4.velo :=	1
end if

	arp4.note :=	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.i]
	arp4.note :=	arp4.note+	arp4.oct_cursor*	12
	arp4.note :=	arp4.note+	arp4.transpose


if	arp4.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.chord_last_notes[	arp4.i] :=	arp4.note_to_engine
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp4.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp4.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.chord_last_notes[	arp4.i] :=	arp4.note_to_engine
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp4.a)
end if
elseif	arp4.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.chord_last_notes[	arp4.i] :=	arp4.note_to_engine
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp4.a)
end if
elseif	arp4.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.chord_last_notes[	arp4.i] :=	arp4.note_to_engine
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]











	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp4.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	arp4.chord_last_notes[	arp4.i]#-	1
if	in_range(	arp4.chord_last_notes[	arp4.i],	instr_min_key[	arp4.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp4.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp4.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp4.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp4.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp4.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp4.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp4.a]+	1
end if
end if
end if

	arp4.chord_buffer[	arp4.i] :=	arp4.note_id
	inc(		arp4.i)
end while

if	arp4.note_repeat=	0
	arp4.aa :=	arp4.loop_cursor
else
	inc(		arp4.aa)
if(	arp4.aa>	arp4.note_repeat)
	arp4.aa :=	0
if(	arp4.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp4.oct_cursor)
if(	arp4.oct_cursor>	arp4.octave)
	arp4.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp4.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp4.oct_cursor)
if(	arp4.oct_cursor<	arp4.octave)
	arp4.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
else

if	arp4.rhythm_playback[	arp4.act_step]#	0
	arp4.velo :=	arp4.rhythm_playback[	arp4.act_step]
end if
if(	arp4.velo>	127)
	arp4.velo :=	127
end if
if(	arp4.velo<	1)
	arp4.velo :=	1
end if

if	arp4.note_repeat#	0
	arp4.note :=	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.s]
	inc(		arp4.n)
if	arp4.n>	arp4.repeat_max
	arp4.n :=	0
	inc(		arp4.s)
	arp4.aa :=	arp4.s
end if
else
	arp4.note :=	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.aa]
	inc(		arp4.aa)
end if
	arp4.note :=	arp4.note+	arp4.oct_cursor*	12
	arp4.note :=	arp4.note+	arp4.transpose

for	arp4.a :=	0to	4-	1
if	arp4.last_note_ids[	arp4.a]#-	1
	note_off(		arp4.last_note_ids[		arp4.a])
	arp4.last_note_ids[	arp4.a] :=-	1
end if
end for

if	arp4.callback_id=	arp1.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	0
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.last_note_ids[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.note_id
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp1.note_id, 		arp4.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	0] :=	1
end if
elseif	arp4.callback_id=	arp2.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	1
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.last_note_ids[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.note_id
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp2.note_id, 		arp4.a)
end if
elseif	arp4.callback_id=	arp3.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	2
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.last_note_ids[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.note_id
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp3.note_id, 		arp4.a)
end if
elseif	arp4.callback_id=	arp4.callback_id
	arp4.a :=	3
if	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]>	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	arp4.note+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	arp4.a]*	12)
if	arp4.note_to_engine<	0
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	0
elseif	arp4.note_to_engine>	127
	arp4.note_to_engine :=	127
end if
	arp4.note_id :=	play_note(	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo,	0,-	1)
	arp4.last_note_ids[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.note_id
	arp4.instr_in_slot :=	assigned_instruments[	1,	arp4.a]

	_allow_groups(		1, 		arp4.note_id, 		arp4.a)
	ani_arp_triggered[	1] :=	1
end if
end if
if	in_range(	arp4.note_to_engine,	instr_min_key[	arp4.instr_in_slot],	instr_max_key[	arp4.instr_in_slot])
if	NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1

	midi_ids[	arp4.a] :=	mf_insert_event(	arp4.a,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	REC_TIME),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	arp4.note_to_engine,	arp4.velo)
	mf_set_event_par(		midi_ids[		arp4.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		arp4.mf_length)
	midi_pos[	arp4.a] :=	midi_pos[	arp4.a]+	1
end if
end if


if	arp4.s>=	arp4.loop_cursor
	arp4.s :=	0
	arp4.aa :=	0
if(	arp4.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp4.oct_cursor)
if(	arp4.oct_cursor>	arp4.octave)
	arp4.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp4.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp4.oct_cursor)
if(	arp4.oct_cursor<	arp4.octave)
	arp4.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if

end if
end if

elseif	arp4.rhythm_playback[	arp4.act_step]=	0
if	arp4.rhythm_skip=	1
if	arp4.note_repeat#	0
if	arp4.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp4.n)
if	arp4.n<	0
	arp4.n :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp4.act_step=	0
	dec(		arp4.aa)
end if
if	arp4.aa<	0
	arp4.aa :=	0
end if
end if
else
if	arp4.note_repeat#	0
	inc(		arp4.n)
if	arp4.note_order=	14
	inc(		arp4.aa)
end if
else
	inc(		arp4.aa)
end if

end if
if	arp4.note_order#	14
if	arp4.n>	arp4.repeat_max
	arp4.n :=	0

	arp4.aa :=	arp4.s
end if
end if
end if

if	arp4.bar_reset_active#	0
	inc(		arp4.bar_count)
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	arp4.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	arp4.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	arp4.real_hold*	int_to_real(	arp4.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	arp4.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	arp4.act_step+	1)))
if	arp4.act_step=	0
	arp4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
	arp4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	arp4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	arp4.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
if	arp4.indicator_hold>	arp4.t
	arp4.t :=	arp4.indicator_hold
	arp4.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp4.real_hold)+	1
else
	arp4.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	arp4.real_hold)
end if



if	arp4.note_repeat=	0
if(	arp4.aa>=	arp4.loop_cursor)
	arp4.aa :=	0
if(	arp4.octave>	0)
	inc(		arp4.oct_cursor)
if(	arp4.oct_cursor>	arp4.octave)
	arp4.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
if(	arp4.octave<	0)
	dec(		arp4.oct_cursor)
if(	arp4.oct_cursor<	arp4.octave)
	arp4.oct_cursor :=	0
end if
end if
end if
end if
	inc(		arp4.act_step)
if(	arp4.act_step>=	arp4.steps)
	arp4.act_step :=	0
	arp4.t :=	0
end if

select	arp4.rate
case	0
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	arp4.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select

if	engine_half_time=	1
	arp4.step_length :=	arp4.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	arp4.step_length :=	arp4.step_length/	2
end if

if(	arp4.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	arp4.step_length :=	arp4.step_length+(	arp4.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	arp4.step_length :=	arp4.step_length+(	arp4.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		arp4.swing_cursor)

if	arp4.humanize_hold#	0
	arp4.step_length :=	arp4.step_length-	abs(	arp4.humanize_hold)
end if
	arp4.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	arp4.step_length :=	arp4.step_length+	arp4.humanize_hold





if	arp4.cursor#	0
	wait(		arp4.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_arp4_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	arp4.cursor-	1
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	arp4.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	arp4.note_selection#	0and	arp4.cursor#	0
	sort(		arp4.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	arp4.note_selection_hold
case	1
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	arp4.cursor-	1]
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	arp4.cursor-	1]
if	arp4.cursor>	1
if	arp4.cursor=	2
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	arp4.cursor-	2]
end if
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	arp4.cursor/	2]
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp4.cursor>	1
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	arp4.cursor=	2
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	arp4.cursor>	2
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	arp4.cursor=	1
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	arp4.note_selection=	0and	arp4.cursor#	0
	arp4.selected_cursor :=	arp4.cursor
end if
end function

function	arp4_sort_fill_buffer
call	set_arp4_note_selection
while(	arp4.a<	128)
if(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor)
	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	arp4.a]
else
	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a] :=	0
	arp4.selected_notes_buffer[	arp4.a] :=	0
end if
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	sort(		arp4.ordered, 		1)
	arp4.min_note :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	1]
	arp4.max_note :=	arp4.ordered[	0]

select(	arp4.note_order)
case	2
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	1-	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
case	3
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
case	4
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	1-	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
if(	arp4.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp4.loop_cursor :=(	arp4.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a+	arp4.selected_cursor] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a+	1]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
end if
case	5
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
if(	arp4.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp4.loop_cursor :=(	arp4.selected_cursor*	2)-	2
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a+	arp4.selected_cursor] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	2-	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
end if
case	6
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.max_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.ordered[	2]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	0]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp4.ordered[	1]
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	arp4.a-	1]
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	arp4.a-	3]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp4.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	7
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.max_note
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.ordered[	0]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	2]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp4.ordered[	1]
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	3
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a]
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a+	2]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.loop_cursor :=(	2*	arp4.selected_cursor)-	4
end if
case	8
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.max_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.ordered[	2]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	0]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp4.ordered[	1]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp4.ordered[	0]
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	arp4.a-	1]
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	arp4.a-	3]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+((	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a+	2]
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+((	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a+	1]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp4.selected_cursor)-	10
end if
case	9
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	1)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	1
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.max_note
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.min_note
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	2
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor=	3)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	0] :=	arp4.ordered[	0]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	2]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	2] :=	arp4.ordered[	1]
	arp4.loop_buffer[	3] :=	arp4.ordered[	2]
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	4
end if
if(	arp4.selected_cursor>	3)
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a]
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a+	2]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	3)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+((	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	arp4.a-	3]
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+((	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)*	2)+	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	arp4.a-	2]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.loop_cursor :=(	4*	arp4.selected_cursor)-	10
end if

case	10to	13
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor
	arp4.a :=	0
while((	arp4.a*	2)<	arp4.selected_cursor)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.selected_cursor-	1-	arp4.a]
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a*	2)+	1] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor
if(	arp4.note_order=	11or	arp4.note_order=	13)
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.loop_cursor)
	arp4.help_buffer[	arp4.loop_cursor-	arp4.a-	1] :=	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.loop_cursor)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.help_buffer[	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
end if
if((	arp4.note_order=	12or	arp4.note_order=	13)and	arp4.selected_cursor>	2)
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor-	2)
	arp4.loop_buffer[(	arp4.a)+(	arp4.selected_cursor)] :=	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.selected_cursor-	2-	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor*	2-	2
end if
case	14
	arp4.loop_cursor :=	arp4.selected_cursor
	arp4.a :=	0
while(	arp4.a<	arp4.selected_cursor)
	arp4.loop_buffer[	arp4.a] :=	arp4.ordered[	arp4.a]
	inc(		arp4.a)
end while
end select
end function




function	run_env1
	env1.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	env1.latch_mode#	0

call	set_env1_note_selection

if	env1.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	env1.i :=	0
elseif	env1.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	env1.i :=	1
elseif	env1.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	env1.i :=	2
elseif	env1.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	env1.i :=	3
end if

if	assigned_instruments[	2,	env1.i]#	0

	env1.instr_in_slot :=	loaded_instruments[	env1.i]
	mf_insert_event(		env1.i, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		transport_stamp-		ms_to_ticks(		12000), 		MIDI_COMMAND_CC, 		dyn_cc_num, 		env1.rhythm_playback[		env1.act_step])
for	env1.a :=	0to	env1.selected_cursor-	1
	env1.engine_note_hold :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	env1.a]
if	env1.active_notes[	0,	env1.engine_note_hold]=	1and	env1.last_note_ids[	env1.i,	env1.engine_note_hold]=	0
	env1.octaved_note :=	env1.engine_note_hold+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	env1.i]*	12)
if	env1.octaved_note<	0
	env1.octaved_note :=	0
elseif	env1.octaved_note>	127
	env1.octaved_note :=	127
end if
	env1.note_id :=	play_note(	env1.octaved_note,	50,	0,-	1)
	env1.current_engine_notes[	env1.i,	env1.engine_note_hold] :=	env1.octaved_note
	env1.active_notes[	1,	env1.engine_note_hold] :=	1
	env1.last_note_ids[	env1.i,	env1.engine_note_hold] :=	env1.note_id
	_allow_groups(		2, 		env1.note_id, 		env1.i)

	midi_ids[	env1.i] :=	mf_insert_event(	env1.i,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	12000),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	env1.octaved_note,	100)
	env1.mf_note_ids[	env1.i,	env1.engine_note_hold] :=	midi_ids[	env1.i]
	env1.note_entry_time[	env1.engine_note_hold] :=	NI_SONG_POSITION
	midi_pos[	env1.i] :=	midi_pos[	env1.i]+	1
end if
end for
end if

if	env1.note_selection>	0
if	env1.cursor>	env1.selected_cursor
for	env1.a:=	0to	127
if	env1.last_note_ids[	env1.i,	env1.a]#	0
	env1.note_check :=	1
for	env1.m:=	0to	env1.selected_cursor-	1
if	env1.a=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	env1.m]
	env1.note_check :=	0
end if
end for
if	env1.note_check=	1
	mf_set_event_par(		env1.mf_note_ids[		env1.i,		env1.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		env1.note_entry_time[		env1.a])
	note_off(		env1.last_note_ids[		env1.i,		env1.a])
	env1.last_note_ids[	env1.i,	env1.a] :=	0
	env1.active_notes[	1,	env1.a] :=	0
	env1.current_engine_notes[	env1.i,	env1.a] :=	0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_env1and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	env1.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	env1.i:=	0to	99
	env1.rhythm_indicator[	env1.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env1.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	env1.rhythm_indicator[	env1.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env1.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	env1.mode_menu=	0
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	env1.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	env1.rate)
case	95
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length/	2
case	97
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length*	2
case	98
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length*	3
case	99
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length*	4
end select
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length/	100
elseif	env1.mode_menu=	1
select(	env1.rate)
case	0
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	env1.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	env1.step_length<	5000)
	env1.step_length :=	5000
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	env1.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	env1.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env1.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env1.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1)))
if	env1.act_step=	0
	env1.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env1.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env1.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1)))
	env1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
if	env1.mode_menu=	0
if	env1.act_stepmod	2=	0
	env1.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env1.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env1.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1)))
	env1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env1.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
else
	env1.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env1.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env1.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env1.act_step+	1)))
	env1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env1.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env1.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
end if
if	env1.indicator_hold>	env1.t
	env1.t :=	env1.indicator_hold
	env1.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env1.real_hold)+	1
else
	env1.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env1.real_hold)
end if


if	engine_half_time=	1
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length/	2
end if

if	env1.mode_menu=	1
if(	env1.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length+(	env1.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length+(	env1.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		env1.swing_cursor)

if	env1.humanize_hold>	0
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length-	env1.humanize_hold
elseif	env1.humanize_hold<	0
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length+	env1.humanize_hold
end if
	env1.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	env1.step_length :=	env1.step_length+	env1.humanize_hold
end if

if	env1.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	set_controller(		102, 		env1.rhythm_playback[		env1.act_step])
elseif	env1.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	set_controller(		103, 		env1.rhythm_playback[		env1.act_step])
elseif	env1.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	set_controller(		104, 		env1.rhythm_playback[		env1.act_step])
elseif	env1.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	set_controller(		105, 		env1.rhythm_playback[		env1.act_step])
end if

	inc(		env1.act_step)
if(	env1.act_step>=	env1.steps)
	env1.act_step :=	0
	env1.t :=	0
if	env1.retrigger=	1
for	env1.i :=	0to	4-	1
for	env1.a :=	0to	127
if	env1.last_note_ids[	env1.i,	env1.a]#	0
	note_off(		env1.last_note_ids[		env1.i,		env1.a])
	env1.last_note_ids[	env1.i,	env1.a] :=	0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
if	env1.cursor#	0
	wait(		env1.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_env1_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	env1.cursor-	1
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	env1.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	env1.note_selection#	0and	env1.cursor#	0
	sort(		env1.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	env1.note_selection
case	1
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	env1.cursor-	1]
	env1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	env1.cursor-	1]
if	env1.cursor>	1
if	env1.cursor=	2
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	env1.cursor-	2]
end if
	env1.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	env1.cursor/	2]
	env1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	env1.cursor>	1
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env1.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	env1.cursor=	2
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env1.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	env1.cursor>	2
	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	env1.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	env1.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	env1.cursor=	1
	env1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	env1.note_selection=	0and	env1.cursor#	0
	env1.selected_cursor :=	env1.cursor
end if
end function


function	run_env2
	env2.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	env2.latch_mode#	0

call	set_env2_note_selection

if	env2.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	env2.i :=	0
elseif	env2.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	env2.i :=	1
elseif	env2.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	env2.i :=	2
elseif	env2.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	env2.i :=	3
end if

if	assigned_instruments[	2,	env2.i]#	0

	env2.instr_in_slot :=	loaded_instruments[	env2.i]
	mf_insert_event(		env2.i, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		transport_stamp-		ms_to_ticks(		12000), 		MIDI_COMMAND_CC, 		dyn_cc_num, 		env2.rhythm_playback[		env2.act_step])
for	env2.a :=	0to	env2.selected_cursor-	1
	env2.engine_note_hold :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	env2.a]
if	env2.active_notes[	0,	env2.engine_note_hold]=	1and	env2.last_note_ids[	env2.i,	env2.engine_note_hold]=	0
	env2.octaved_note :=	env2.engine_note_hold+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	env2.i]*	12)
if	env2.octaved_note<	0
	env2.octaved_note :=	0
elseif	env2.octaved_note>	127
	env2.octaved_note :=	127
end if
	env2.note_id :=	play_note(	env2.octaved_note,	50,	0,-	1)
	env2.current_engine_notes[	env2.i,	env2.engine_note_hold] :=	env2.octaved_note
	env2.active_notes[	1,	env2.engine_note_hold] :=	1
	env2.last_note_ids[	env2.i,	env2.engine_note_hold] :=	env2.note_id
	_allow_groups(		2, 		env2.note_id, 		env2.i)

	midi_ids[	env2.i] :=	mf_insert_event(	env2.i,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	12000),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	env2.octaved_note,	100)
	env2.mf_note_ids[	env2.i,	env2.engine_note_hold] :=	midi_ids[	env2.i]
	env2.note_entry_time[	env2.engine_note_hold] :=	NI_SONG_POSITION
	midi_pos[	env2.i] :=	midi_pos[	env2.i]+	1
end if
end for
end if

if	env2.note_selection>	0
if	env2.cursor>	env2.selected_cursor
for	env2.a:=	0to	127
if	env2.last_note_ids[	env2.i,	env2.a]#	0
	env2.note_check :=	1
for	env2.m:=	0to	env2.selected_cursor-	1
if	env2.a=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	env2.m]
	env2.note_check :=	0
end if
end for
if	env2.note_check=	1
	mf_set_event_par(		env2.mf_note_ids[		env2.i,		env2.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		env2.note_entry_time[		env2.a])
	note_off(		env2.last_note_ids[		env2.i,		env2.a])
	env2.last_note_ids[	env2.i,	env2.a] :=	0
	env2.active_notes[	1,	env2.a] :=	0
	env2.current_engine_notes[	env2.i,	env2.a] :=	0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_env2and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	env2.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	env2.i:=	0to	99
	env2.rhythm_indicator[	env2.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env2.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	env2.rhythm_indicator[	env2.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env2.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	env2.mode_menu=	0
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	env2.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	env2.rate)
case	95
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length/	2
case	97
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length*	2
case	98
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length*	3
case	99
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length*	4
end select
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length/	100
elseif	env2.mode_menu=	1
select(	env2.rate)
case	0
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	env2.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	env2.step_length<	5000)
	env2.step_length :=	5000
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	env2.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	env2.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env2.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env2.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1)))
if	env2.act_step=	0
	env2.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env2.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env2.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1)))
	env2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
if	env2.mode_menu=	0
if	env2.act_stepmod	2=	0
	env2.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env2.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env2.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1)))
	env2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env2.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
else
	env2.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env2.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env2.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env2.act_step+	1)))
	env2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env2.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env2.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
end if
if	env2.indicator_hold>	env2.t
	env2.t :=	env2.indicator_hold
	env2.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env2.real_hold)+	1
else
	env2.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env2.real_hold)
end if


if	engine_half_time=	1
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length/	2
end if

if	env2.mode_menu=	1
if(	env2.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length+(	env2.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length+(	env2.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		env2.swing_cursor)

if	env2.humanize_hold>	0
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length-	env2.humanize_hold
elseif	env2.humanize_hold<	0
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length+	env2.humanize_hold
end if
	env2.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	env2.step_length :=	env2.step_length+	env2.humanize_hold
end if

if	env2.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	set_controller(		102, 		env2.rhythm_playback[		env2.act_step])
elseif	env2.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	set_controller(		103, 		env2.rhythm_playback[		env2.act_step])
elseif	env2.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	set_controller(		104, 		env2.rhythm_playback[		env2.act_step])
elseif	env2.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	set_controller(		105, 		env2.rhythm_playback[		env2.act_step])
end if

	inc(		env2.act_step)
if(	env2.act_step>=	env2.steps)
	env2.act_step :=	0
	env2.t :=	0
if	env2.retrigger=	1
for	env2.i :=	0to	4-	1
for	env2.a :=	0to	127
if	env2.last_note_ids[	env2.i,	env2.a]#	0
	note_off(		env2.last_note_ids[		env2.i,		env2.a])
	env2.last_note_ids[	env2.i,	env2.a] :=	0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
if	env2.cursor#	0
	wait(		env2.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_env2_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	env2.cursor-	1
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	env2.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	env2.note_selection#	0and	env2.cursor#	0
	sort(		env2.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	env2.note_selection
case	1
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	env2.cursor-	1]
	env2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	env2.cursor-	1]
if	env2.cursor>	1
if	env2.cursor=	2
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	env2.cursor-	2]
end if
	env2.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	env2.cursor/	2]
	env2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	env2.cursor>	1
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env2.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	env2.cursor=	2
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env2.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	env2.cursor>	2
	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	env2.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	env2.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	env2.cursor=	1
	env2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	env2.note_selection=	0and	env2.cursor#	0
	env2.selected_cursor :=	env2.cursor
end if
end function


function	run_env3
	env3.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	env3.latch_mode#	0

call	set_env3_note_selection

if	env3.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	env3.i :=	0
elseif	env3.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	env3.i :=	1
elseif	env3.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	env3.i :=	2
elseif	env3.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	env3.i :=	3
end if

if	assigned_instruments[	2,	env3.i]#	0

	env3.instr_in_slot :=	loaded_instruments[	env3.i]
	mf_insert_event(		env3.i, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		transport_stamp-		ms_to_ticks(		12000), 		MIDI_COMMAND_CC, 		dyn_cc_num, 		env3.rhythm_playback[		env3.act_step])
for	env3.a :=	0to	env3.selected_cursor-	1
	env3.engine_note_hold :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	env3.a]
if	env3.active_notes[	0,	env3.engine_note_hold]=	1and	env3.last_note_ids[	env3.i,	env3.engine_note_hold]=	0
	env3.octaved_note :=	env3.engine_note_hold+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	env3.i]*	12)
if	env3.octaved_note<	0
	env3.octaved_note :=	0
elseif	env3.octaved_note>	127
	env3.octaved_note :=	127
end if
	env3.note_id :=	play_note(	env3.octaved_note,	50,	0,-	1)
	env3.current_engine_notes[	env3.i,	env3.engine_note_hold] :=	env3.octaved_note
	env3.active_notes[	1,	env3.engine_note_hold] :=	1
	env3.last_note_ids[	env3.i,	env3.engine_note_hold] :=	env3.note_id
	_allow_groups(		2, 		env3.note_id, 		env3.i)

	midi_ids[	env3.i] :=	mf_insert_event(	env3.i,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	12000),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	env3.octaved_note,	100)
	env3.mf_note_ids[	env3.i,	env3.engine_note_hold] :=	midi_ids[	env3.i]
	env3.note_entry_time[	env3.engine_note_hold] :=	NI_SONG_POSITION
	midi_pos[	env3.i] :=	midi_pos[	env3.i]+	1
end if
end for
end if

if	env3.note_selection>	0
if	env3.cursor>	env3.selected_cursor
for	env3.a:=	0to	127
if	env3.last_note_ids[	env3.i,	env3.a]#	0
	env3.note_check :=	1
for	env3.m:=	0to	env3.selected_cursor-	1
if	env3.a=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	env3.m]
	env3.note_check :=	0
end if
end for
if	env3.note_check=	1
	mf_set_event_par(		env3.mf_note_ids[		env3.i,		env3.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		env3.note_entry_time[		env3.a])
	note_off(		env3.last_note_ids[		env3.i,		env3.a])
	env3.last_note_ids[	env3.i,	env3.a] :=	0
	env3.active_notes[	1,	env3.a] :=	0
	env3.current_engine_notes[	env3.i,	env3.a] :=	0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_env3and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	env3.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	env3.i:=	0to	99
	env3.rhythm_indicator[	env3.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env3.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	env3.rhythm_indicator[	env3.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env3.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	env3.mode_menu=	0
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	env3.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	env3.rate)
case	95
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length/	2
case	97
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length*	2
case	98
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length*	3
case	99
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length*	4
end select
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length/	100
elseif	env3.mode_menu=	1
select(	env3.rate)
case	0
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	env3.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	env3.step_length<	5000)
	env3.step_length :=	5000
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	env3.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	env3.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env3.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env3.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1)))
if	env3.act_step=	0
	env3.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env3.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env3.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1)))
	env3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
if	env3.mode_menu=	0
if	env3.act_stepmod	2=	0
	env3.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env3.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env3.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1)))
	env3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env3.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
else
	env3.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env3.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env3.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env3.act_step+	1)))
	env3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env3.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env3.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
end if
if	env3.indicator_hold>	env3.t
	env3.t :=	env3.indicator_hold
	env3.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.real_hold)+	1
else
	env3.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.real_hold)
end if


if	engine_half_time=	1
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length/	2
end if

if	env3.mode_menu=	1
if(	env3.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length+(	env3.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length+(	env3.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		env3.swing_cursor)

if	env3.humanize_hold>	0
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length-	env3.humanize_hold
elseif	env3.humanize_hold<	0
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length+	env3.humanize_hold
end if
	env3.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	env3.step_length :=	env3.step_length+	env3.humanize_hold
end if

if	env3.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	set_controller(		102, 		env3.rhythm_playback[		env3.act_step])
elseif	env3.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	set_controller(		103, 		env3.rhythm_playback[		env3.act_step])
elseif	env3.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	set_controller(		104, 		env3.rhythm_playback[		env3.act_step])
elseif	env3.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	set_controller(		105, 		env3.rhythm_playback[		env3.act_step])
end if

	inc(		env3.act_step)
if(	env3.act_step>=	env3.steps)
	env3.act_step :=	0
	env3.t :=	0
if	env3.retrigger=	1
for	env3.i :=	0to	4-	1
for	env3.a :=	0to	127
if	env3.last_note_ids[	env3.i,	env3.a]#	0
	note_off(		env3.last_note_ids[		env3.i,		env3.a])
	env3.last_note_ids[	env3.i,	env3.a] :=	0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
if	env3.cursor#	0
	wait(		env3.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_env3_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	env3.cursor-	1
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	env3.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	env3.note_selection#	0and	env3.cursor#	0
	sort(		env3.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	env3.note_selection
case	1
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	env3.cursor-	1]
	env3.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	env3.cursor-	1]
if	env3.cursor>	1
if	env3.cursor=	2
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	env3.cursor-	2]
end if
	env3.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env3.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	env3.cursor/	2]
	env3.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
