if	env3.cursor>	1
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env3.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env3.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env3.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	env3.cursor=	2
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env3.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	env3.cursor>	2
	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	env3.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	env3.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	env3.cursor=	1
	env3.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	env3.note_selection=	0and	env3.cursor#	0
	env3.selected_cursor :=	env3.cursor
end if
end function


function	run_env4
	env4.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	cursor>	0and	env4.latch_mode#	0

call	set_env4_note_selection

if	env4.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	env4.i :=	0
elseif	env4.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	env4.i :=	1
elseif	env4.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	env4.i :=	2
elseif	env4.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	env4.i :=	3
end if

if	assigned_instruments[	2,	env4.i]#	0

	env4.instr_in_slot :=	loaded_instruments[	env4.i]
	mf_insert_event(		env4.i, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		transport_stamp-		ms_to_ticks(		12000), 		MIDI_COMMAND_CC, 		dyn_cc_num, 		env4.rhythm_playback[		env4.act_step])
for	env4.a :=	0to	env4.selected_cursor-	1
	env4.engine_note_hold :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	env4.a]
if	env4.active_notes[	0,	env4.engine_note_hold]=	1and	env4.last_note_ids[	env4.i,	env4.engine_note_hold]=	0
	env4.octaved_note :=	env4.engine_note_hold+(	assigned_octave_shifts[	env4.i]*	12)
if	env4.octaved_note<	0
	env4.octaved_note :=	0
elseif	env4.octaved_note>	127
	env4.octaved_note :=	127
end if
	env4.note_id :=	play_note(	env4.octaved_note,	50,	0,-	1)
	env4.current_engine_notes[	env4.i,	env4.engine_note_hold] :=	env4.octaved_note
	env4.active_notes[	1,	env4.engine_note_hold] :=	1
	env4.last_note_ids[	env4.i,	env4.engine_note_hold] :=	env4.note_id
	_allow_groups(		2, 		env4.note_id, 		env4.i)

	midi_ids[	env4.i] :=	mf_insert_event(	env4.i,	NI_SONG_POSITION-	transport_stamp-	ms_to_ticks(	12000),	MIDI_COMMAND_NOTE_ON,	env4.octaved_note,	100)
	env4.mf_note_ids[	env4.i,	env4.engine_note_hold] :=	midi_ids[	env4.i]
	env4.note_entry_time[	env4.engine_note_hold] :=	NI_SONG_POSITION
	midi_pos[	env4.i] :=	midi_pos[	env4.i]+	1
end if
end for
end if

if	env4.note_selection>	0
if	env4.cursor>	env4.selected_cursor
for	env4.a:=	0to	127
if	env4.last_note_ids[	env4.i,	env4.a]#	0
	env4.note_check :=	1
for	env4.m:=	0to	env4.selected_cursor-	1
if	env4.a=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	env4.m]
	env4.note_check :=	0
end if
end for
if	env4.note_check=	1
	mf_set_event_par(		env4.mf_note_ids[		env4.i,		env4.a], 		EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 		NI_SONG_POSITION-		env4.note_entry_time[		env4.a])
	note_off(		env4.last_note_ids[		env4.i,		env4.a])
	env4.last_note_ids[	env4.i,	env4.a] :=	0
	env4.active_notes[	1,	env4.a] :=	0
	env4.current_engine_notes[	env4.i,	env4.a] :=	0
end if
end if
end for
end if
end if


if	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_env4and	see_page=	UIpage_MAIN
	env4.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
for	env4.i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm_indicator[	env4.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env4.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	env4.rhythm_indicator[	env4.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	env4.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	env4.mode_menu=	0
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	env4.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	env4.rate)
case	95
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length/	2
case	97
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length*	2
case	98
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length*	3
case	99
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length*	4
end select
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length/	100
elseif	env4.mode_menu=	1
select(	env4.rate)
case	0
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	env4.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	env4.step_length<	5000)
	env4.step_length :=	5000
end if

if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	see_main_subpage=	UIpage_SUBMAIN
	env4.indicator_mirror->	hide :=	HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if
	env4.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env4.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env4.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1)))
if	env4.act_step=	0
	env4.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env4.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env4.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1)))
	env4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	198
else
if	env4.mode_menu=	0
if	env4.act_stepmod	2=	0
	env4.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env4.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env4.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1)))
	env4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env4.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
else
	env4.indicator_hold :=	real_to_int((	env4.real_hold*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1))-(	floor(	env4.real_hold)*	int_to_real(	env4.act_step+	1)))
	env4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x :=	env4.indicator_mirror->	pos_x+	env4.indicator_mirror->	width+	1
end if
end if
if	env4.indicator_hold>	env4.t
	env4.t :=	env4.indicator_hold
	env4.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.real_hold)+	1
else
	env4.indicator_mirror->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.real_hold)
end if


if	engine_half_time=	1
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length*	2
elseif	engine_double_time=	1
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length/	2
end if

if	env4.mode_menu=	1
if(	env4.swing_cursormod	2=	0)
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length+(	env4.step_length*	rhythm_swing)/	100
else
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length+(	env4.step_length*(-	rhythm_swing))/	100
end if
	inc(		env4.swing_cursor)

if	env4.humanize_hold>	0
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length-	env4.humanize_hold
elseif	env4.humanize_hold<	0
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length+	env4.humanize_hold
end if
	env4.humanize_hold :=	random(-	humanize_max,	humanize_max)
	env4.step_length :=	env4.step_length+	env4.humanize_hold
end if

if	env4.callback_id=	env1.callback_id
	set_controller(		102, 		env4.rhythm_playback[		env4.act_step])
elseif	env4.callback_id=	env2.callback_id
	set_controller(		103, 		env4.rhythm_playback[		env4.act_step])
elseif	env4.callback_id=	env3.callback_id
	set_controller(		104, 		env4.rhythm_playback[		env4.act_step])
elseif	env4.callback_id=	env4.callback_id
	set_controller(		105, 		env4.rhythm_playback[		env4.act_step])
end if

	inc(		env4.act_step)
if(	env4.act_step>=	env4.steps)
	env4.act_step :=	0
	env4.t :=	0
if	env4.retrigger=	1
for	env4.i :=	0to	4-	1
for	env4.a :=	0to	127
if	env4.last_note_ids[	env4.i,	env4.a]#	0
	note_off(		env4.last_note_ids[		env4.i,		env4.a])
	env4.last_note_ids[	env4.i,	env4.a] :=	0
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if
if	env4.cursor#	0
	wait(		env4.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_env4_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	env4.cursor-	1
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	env4.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	env4.note_selection#	0and	env4.cursor#	0
	sort(		env4.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	env4.note_selection
case	1
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	env4.cursor-	1]
	env4.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	env4.cursor-	1]
if	env4.cursor>	1
if	env4.cursor=	2
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	env4.cursor-	2]
end if
	env4.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env4.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	env4.cursor/	2]
	env4.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	env4.cursor>	1
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env4.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	env4.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	env4.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	env4.cursor=	2
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	env4.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	env4.cursor>	2
	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	env4.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	env4.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	env4.cursor=	1
	env4.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	env4.note_selection=	0and	env4.cursor#	0
	env4.selected_cursor :=	env4.cursor
end if
end function




function	run_grenv1
	grenv1.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	search(	KEY_DOWN,	1)#-	1and	grenv1.latch_mode#	0

if	grenv1.callback_id=	grenv1.callback_id
	grenv1.i :=	0
elseif	grenv1.callback_id=	grenv2.callback_id
	grenv1.i :=	1






end if


if	see_page=	UIpage_grain1and	loaded_instruments[	1]#-	1
if	btn_engine_page_engine=	1
	grenv1.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
end if
for	grenv1.i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm_indicator[	grenv1.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	grenv1.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	grenv1.rhythm_indicator[	grenv1.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	grenv1.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	grenv1.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	grenv1.rate)
case	95
	grenv1.step_length :=	grenv1.step_length/	2
case	97
	grenv1.step_length :=	grenv1.step_length*	2
case	98
	grenv1.step_length :=	grenv1.step_length*	3
case	99
	grenv1.step_length :=	grenv1.step_length*	4
case	100
	grenv1.step_length :=	grenv1.step_length*	6
case	101
	grenv1.step_length :=	grenv1.step_length*	8
end select
	grenv1.step_length :=	grenv1.step_length/	100
elseif	grenv1.mode_menu=	1
select(	grenv1.rate)
case	0
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	grenv1.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	grenv1.step_length<	5000)
	grenv1.step_length :=	5000
end if



























if	grain1.position_choice=	2
if	grain1.position_A<=	grain1.position_B
	grain1.pos :=	grain1.position_A+	real_to_int((	int_to_real(	grain1.position_B-	grain1.position_A)/	127.0)*	int_to_real(	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	grenv1.act_step]))
else
	grain1.pos :=	grain1.position_A-	real_to_int((	int_to_real(	grain1.position_A-	grain1.position_B)/	127.0)*	int_to_real(	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	grenv1.act_step]))
end if
	grain1.pos_knob :=	1000-	real_to_int(	1000.00/	int_to_real(	grain1.position_B-	grain1.position_A)*	int_to_real(	grain1.position_B-	grain1.pos))
end if









	inc(		grenv1.act_step)
if(	grenv1.act_step>=	grenv1.steps)
	grenv1.act_step :=	0










end if
if	search(	KEY_DOWN,	1)#-	1
	wait(		grenv1.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_grenv1_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	grenv1.cursor-	1
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	grenv1.note_buffer[	i]
end for
if	grenv1.note_selection#	0and	grenv1.cursor#	0
	sort(		grenv1.selected_notes_buffer, 		1)
select	grenv1.note_selection
case	1
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv1.cursor-	1]
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv1.cursor-	1]
if	grenv1.cursor>	1
if	grenv1.cursor=	2
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv1.cursor-	2]
end if
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv1.cursor/	2]
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	grenv1.cursor>	1
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	5
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	1
case	6
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	grenv1.cursor=	2
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	2
elseif	grenv1.cursor>	2
	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	2] :=	grenv1.selected_notes_buffer[	2]
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	3
elseif	grenv1.cursor=	1
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select
elseif	grenv1.note_selection=	0and	grenv1.cursor#	0
	grenv1.selected_cursor :=	grenv1.cursor
end if
end function


function	run_grenv2
	grenv2.callback_id :=	NI_CALLBACK_ID

while	search(	KEY_DOWN,	1)#-	1and	grenv2.latch_mode#	0

if	grenv2.callback_id=	grenv1.callback_id
	grenv2.i :=	0
elseif	grenv2.callback_id=	grenv2.callback_id
	grenv2.i :=	1






end if


if	see_page=	UIpage_grain2and	loaded_instruments[	2]#-	1
if	btn_engine_page_engine=	1
	grenv2.rhythm_indicator->	hide:=	HIDE_PART_BG
end if
for	grenv2.i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm_indicator[	grenv2.i] :=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	grenv2.i]->	picture_state:=	0
end for
	grenv2.rhythm_indicator[	grenv2.act_step] :=	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	grenv2.act_step]->	picture_state:=	1
end if

if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH*	grenv2.eight_notes_bar_amount
select(	grenv2.rate)
case	95
	grenv2.step_length :=	grenv2.step_length/	2
case	97
	grenv2.step_length :=	grenv2.step_length*	2
case	98
	grenv2.step_length :=	grenv2.step_length*	3
case	99
	grenv2.step_length :=	grenv2.step_length*	4
case	100
	grenv2.step_length :=	grenv2.step_length*	6
case	101
	grenv2.step_length :=	grenv2.step_length*	8
end select
	grenv2.step_length :=	grenv2.step_length/	100
elseif	grenv2.mode_menu=	1
select(	grenv2.rate)
case	0
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	4
case	1
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH/	2
case	2
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case	3
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH
case	4
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER
case	5
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case	6
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case	7
	grenv2.step_length :=	DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
end select
end if

if(	grenv2.step_length<	5000)
	grenv2.step_length :=	5000
end if



























if	grain2.position_choice=	2
if	grain2.position_A<=	grain2.position_B
	grain2.pos :=	grain2.position_A+	real_to_int((	int_to_real(	grain2.position_B-	grain2.position_A)/	127.0)*	int_to_real(	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	grenv2.act_step]))
else
	grain2.pos :=	grain2.position_A-	real_to_int((	int_to_real(	grain2.position_A-	grain2.position_B)/	127.0)*	int_to_real(	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	grenv2.act_step]))
end if
	grain2.pos_knob :=	1000-	real_to_int(	1000.00/	int_to_real(	grain2.position_B-	grain2.position_A)*	int_to_real(	grain2.position_B-	grain2.pos))
end if









	inc(		grenv2.act_step)
if(	grenv2.act_step>=	grenv2.steps)
	grenv2.act_step :=	0










end if
if	search(	KEY_DOWN,	1)#-	1
	wait(		grenv2.step_length)
else
	wait(		1)
end if
end while

end function

function	set_grenv2_note_selection
declare	i
declare	hold_value
for	i:=	0to	grenv2.cursor-	1
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	i] :=	grenv2.note_buffer[	i]
end for

case	1
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv2.cursor-	1]
	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	2
	hold_value :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv2.cursor-	1]
if	grenv2.cursor>	1
if	grenv2.cursor=	2
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	hold_value
else
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv2.cursor-	2]
end if
	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
case	3
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	grenv2.cursor/	2]
	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	1
case	4
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]
if	grenv2.cursor>	1
	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	1]
	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	2
else
	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if

	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	0]

	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	1] :=	grenv2.selected_notes_buffer[	1]

	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	1
end if
end select

	grenv2.selected_cursor :=	grenv2.cursor
end if
end function

	show_library_tab()

	set_control_par_str(		INST_LIB_PIC_TWO_ID, 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"AboutIconLibAuthor")

declare	instr_id_on_button[	7,	300] :=(-	1)
	s :=	0
	n :=	0
for	i :=	0to	7-	1
while	instr_browser.instr_ids[	s]#-	1
	instr_browser.instr_id_on_button[	i,	n] :=	instr_browser.instr_ids[	s]
	inc(		n)
	inc(		s)

	n :=	0
	inc(		s)
end for

declare	fx_control_values[	4*	11,	4]:=(	0)


for	i:=	0to	4-	1
	fx_control_values[	0+(	11*	i),	0]:=	attack[	i]
	fx_control_values[	1+(	11*	i),	0]:=	decay[	i]
	fx_control_values[	2+(	11*	i),	0] :=	sli_lc_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	3+(	11*	i),	0] :=	sli_bell_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	4+(	11*	i),	0] :=	sli_hc_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	5+(	11*	i),	0]:=	mod_mix[	i]
	fx_control_values[	6+(	11*	i),	0]:=	sat_gain[	i]
	fx_control_values[	7+(	11*	i),	0] :=	mod_freq[	i]
	fx_control_values[	8+(	11*	i),	0]:=	mixer.senddel[	i]
	fx_control_values[	9+(	11*	i),	0]:=	trem_depth[	i]
	fx_control_values[	10+(	11*	i),	0]:=	trem_freq[	i]
end for
declare	fx_motion_values[	11,	4]:=(	0)

if1=1
family	ArpEn
declareconst	NUM_INSTANCES :=	4

declareconst	MAX_STEPS :=	32
declareconst	NOTE_BUFFER_SIZE :=	512

declare	nks_i
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mixer.mute)-	1
	mixer.mute[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.mute[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Mute "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mixer.solo)-	1
	mixer.solo[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.solo[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Solo "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mixer.vol)-	1
	mixer.vol[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.vol[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Volume "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mixer.pan)-	1
	mixer.pan[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.pan[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Pan "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	attack)-	1
	attack[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	attack[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Attack "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

	decay[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	decay[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Decay "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for


for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mixer.senddel)-	1
	mixer.senddel[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.senddel[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Delay Send "

end for

	mixer.sendrev[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.sendrev[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Reverb Send "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for


	mixer.comp_bypass->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.comp_bypass->	automation_name :=	"Compressor Bypass "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.comp_threshold->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.comp_threshold->	automation_name :=	"Compressor Threshold "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.comp_makeup->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.comp_makeup->	automation_name :=	"Compressor Gain "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.delay_bypass->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.delay_bypass->	automation_name :=	"Delay Bypass "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.delay_sync->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.delay_sync->	automation_name :=	"Delay Sync "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.delay_time->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.delay_time->	automation_name :=	"Delay Time "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.delay_feedback->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.delay_feedback->	automation_name :=	"Delay Feedback "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.delay_hicut->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.delay_hicut->	automation_name :=	"Delay Hicut "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.delay_return->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.delay_return->	automation_name :=	"Delay Return "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.rev_bypass->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.rev_bypass->	automation_name :=	"Reverb Bypass "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.rev_predelay->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.rev_predelay->	automation_name :=	"Predelay "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mixer.rev_time->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.rev_time->	automation_name :=	"Time "
	inc(		nks_i)

if	mixer.rev_type=	0
	mixer.rev_predelay->	automation_name :=	"N/A"
	mixer.rev_time->	automation_name :=	"N/A"
else
	mixer.rev_predelay->	automation_name :=	"Predelay "
	mixer.rev_time->	automation_name :=	"Time "
end if
	mixer.rev_return->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mixer.rev_return->	automation_name :=	"Reverb Return "
	inc(		nks_i)

	mod_depth[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Chorus Depth "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mod_freq)-	1
	mod_freq[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mod_freq[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Chorus Speed "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mod_phase)-	1
	mod_phase[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mod_phase[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Chorus Phase "
	inc(		nks_i)
end for

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	mod_mix)-	1
	mod_mix[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_id :=	nks_i
	mod_mix[	nks_translation[	i]]->	automation_name :=	nks_slot_names[	nks_translation[	i]]&	"Chorus Mix "
	inc(		nks_i)

declare	%btn_preset_grid_y[	15]
declare	btn_tag_grid_y[	27]
declare	btn_tag_grid_x[	27]

	i :=	0
	ii :=	0
while	i<	num_elements(	%btn_preset_grid_y)
	%btn_preset_grid_y[	i] :=	preset_matrix_coord[	1]+(	ii*	20)+(	ii*	1)
	inc(		i)
	inc(		ii)
end while

	i :=	0
	ii :=	0
	iii :=	0
while	i<	27
	btn_tag_grid_y[	i] :=	tag_matrix_coord[	1]+	ii*	btn_tag_height+	ii*	1
if	in_range(	ii,	0,	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii]-	1)
	btn_tag_grid_y[	i] :=	btn_tag_grid_y[	i]+	row1_POS_Y[	iii]
elseif	in_range(	ii,	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii],	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	iii]-	1)
	btn_tag_grid_y[	i] :=	btn_tag_grid_y[	i]+	row2_POS_Y[	iii]
end if
	inc(		ii)
if	ii=	row1_NUM_ROWS[	iii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	iii]
	ii :=	0
	inc(		iii)
end if
	inc(		i)
end while

	i :=	0
	ii :=	0
	iii :=	0
while	i<	27
if	in_range(	iii,	0,	row1_NUM_ROWS[	ii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	ii])
	btn_tag_grid_x[	i] :=	tag_matrix_coord[	0]+	columns_POS_X[	ii]
end if
	inc(		i)
	inc(		iii)
if	iii=	row1_NUM_ROWS[	ii]+	row2_NUM_ROWS[	ii]
	inc(		ii)
	iii :=	0
end if
end while





declareui_button	btn_presetBrowserDC
	set_button_properties(		btn_presetBrowserDC, 		"", 		"alpha")
	btn_presetBrowserDC ->	hide :=	HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
	btn_presetBrowserDC ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declareui_switch	btn_double_click
	set_switch_properties(		btn_double_click, 		"", 		"empty_picture")
	set_bounds(		btn_double_click, 		0, 		0, 		250-		25, 		20)
	btn_double_click->	hide:=	HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
	btn_double_click ->	z_layer :=	1
	btn_double_click->	allow_automation :=	0

declareui_slider	sli_scrollbar(	0,	1000000)
	set_slider_properties(		sli_scrollbar, 		1000000, 		"alpha_scroll_slider", -		3500)
	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_X :=	preset_matrix_coord[	0]+	250+	1-	1
	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_Y :=	preset_matrix_coord[	1]-	10+	12
	sli_scrollbar ->	width :=	21
	sli_scrollbar ->	height :=	310

	sli_scrollbar ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declareui_label	lbl_scrollhandle(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_scrollhandle, 		"", 		"scrollbar")
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	POS_X :=	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_X+	1
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	POS_Y :=	sli_scrollbar ->	POS_Y
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	height :=	handle_size
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	z_layer :=-	1
	lbl_scrollhandle ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declareui_label	lbl_scrollBG(	1,	1)
	set_label_properties(		lbl_scrollBG, 		"", 		"scrollbar_bg")
	set_bounds(		lbl_scrollBG, 		sli_scrollbar ->		x, 		sli_scrollbar ->		y-		2, 		5, 		310+		2+		1)
	lbl_scrollBG ->	z_layer :=-	1
	lbl_scrollBG ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_preset_browser)

declare	category_active[	6] :=(	0)
declareui_button	lbl_categories[	6]
declareui_label	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6](	1,	1)
for	i :=	0to	6-	1
	lbl_categories[	i] ->	disable_text_shifting :=	1
	set_button_properties(		lbl_categories[		i], 		!category_titles[		i], 		"alpha", 		0, 		fonts.category_font[		0])
	set_bounds(		lbl_categories[		i], 		btn_tag_grid_x[		category_accum[		i]]-		1, 		btn_tag_grid_y[		category_accum[		i]]+		category_title_offset[		i], 		btn_tag_width_perCategory[		i], 		22)
if	i#	num_elements(	lbl_categories)-	1
	lbl_categories[	i] ->	z_layer :=	0
end if
	lbl_categories[	i] ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_categories)

	set_label_properties(		lbl_categoriesSeparation[		i], 		"", 		"lbl_separation")
	set_bounds(		lbl_categoriesSeparation[		i], 		lbl_categories[		i]->		x+		2, 		lbl_categories[		i]->		y+		20, 		lbl_categories[		i]->		width, 		2)
	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	i] ->	parent_panel :=	get_ui_id(	UI_categories)
end for
	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1] ->	x :=	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1]->	x-	12
	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1] ->	width :=	lbl_categoriesSeparation[	6-	1]->	width+	17

	lbl_categories[	6-	1] ->	x :=	preset_matrix_coord[	0]+	23

set_label_properties(	lbl_sphere_selected[	i], 	"", 	"")
ifi=0ori=1
lbl_sphere_selected[i]->picture :="lbl_sphere_selected_top"
else
lbl_sphere_selected[i]->picture :="lbl_sphere_selected_bottom"
end if
set_bounds(	lbl_sphere_selected[	i], 	34+(	imod	2)*	550, 	2+	i/	2*	313, 	233, 	205)
assign_to_page(	lbl_sphere_selected[	i], 	UIpage_Main, 	HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
lbl_sphere_selected[i]->z_layer :=1
end for

end for

	trem_depth_motion_invert[	i]->	help:=	"Turn on to invert the motion engines morph direction for the corresponding control"
end for


		PanEn.btn_active[		0]	->		help:=		"Turn this pan engine on or off"
		PanEn.mnu_rate[		0]	->		help:=		"Set the step duration of the respective pan engine"

		PanEn.btn_copy[		1]	->		help:=		"Copy the pan engine values"
		PanEn.btn_paste[		1]	->		help:=		"Paste the pan engine values"

for	i:=	0to	4-	1

	mixer.pan[	i]->	help:=	"Adjust the panorama for this slot. Does not work with a pan engine linked to this slot. The control will show ENGINE in this case."

	mixer.comp_bypass->	help:=	"Turn the global compressor on or off"

	arp1.bar_limit :=	arp1.max_eighth_notes*	4

end if

functionupdate_purge
declarei
declares
declaren

fori:=0to	4-1
ifsearch(loaded_instruments,loaded_instruments_buffer[i])=-1
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments_buffer[i]]-1
purge_group(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments_buffer[	i]]+	n, 	0)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, -	1, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments_buffer[	i]]+	n, -	1, -	1)
end for
end if
ifloaded_instruments[i]#0
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
purge_group(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, 	1)
end for
end if
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, -	1, -	1)
end for
loaded_instruments_buffer[i] :=loaded_instruments[i]
end for
callupdate_key_colors
call	PanEn.update_step_settings
call	PanEn.reset_all_mods
call	PanEn.update_bypass
call	PanEn.set_step_lbl_text
call	PanEn.update_head_labels


end function

functionupdate_key_colors

declaremin_key
declaremax_key
fori:=0to127
set_key_color(	i, 	KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
set_key_type(	i, 	NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT)
end for
fori:=0to	4-1
n :=loaded_instruments[i]
ifn>0
min_key :=clamp2((instr_min_key[n]-(assigned_octave_shifts[i]*12)),0,127)
max_key	:=clamp2((instr_max_key[n]-(assigned_octave_shifts[i]*12)),0,127)
fors :=min_keytomax_key
set_key_color(	s, 	KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
set_key_type(	s, 	NI_KEY_TYPE_DEFAULT)
end for
end if
end for
end function

functionlink_control_to_ep(id,engine_par,slot,generic,motion)
core.control_ids[core.n] :=id
core.engine_par[core.n] :=engine_par
core.slot[core.n] :=slot
core.generic[core.n] :=generic
core.motion[core.n] :=motion
inc(	core.n)
end function

functionrelink_control_to_ep(id,engine_par,slot,generic,motion)
declares
s :=search(core.control_ids,id)
core.engine_par[s] :=engine_par
core.slot[s] :=slot
core.generic[s] :=generic
core.motion[s] :=motion
end function

set_font

function_allow_groups(engine,eventID,slot_count)
declarei
declares
declaren
declarev
declareidx
declarehold


fori:=0toNUM_GROUPS-1
set_event_par_arr(	eventID, 	EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 	0, 	i)
end for

v :=slot_count
ifengine=0
ifart_length[loaded_instruments[v]]=0
set_event_par_arr(	eventID, 	EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 	1, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	v]]+	slots_rrCount[	v])
ifrr_nums[loaded_instruments[v]]=1
slots_rrCount[v] :=0
else
hold :=slots_rrCount[v]
whileslots_rrCount[v]=hold
slots_rrCount[v] :=random(0,rr_nums[loaded_instruments[v]]-1)

end while
end if
else
s:=loaded_instruments[v]
forn:=0torr_nums[s]-1
set_event_par_arr(	eventID, 	EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 	1, 	first_groupID[	s]+	n)
end for
end if
elseifengine=1andart_length[loaded_instruments[v]]=0
s:=assigned_instruments[engine,slot_count]
ifs>0
set_event_par_arr(	eventID, 	EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 	1, 	first_groupID[	s]+	slots_rrCount[	slot_count])
ifslot_count=0
	inc(		slots_chord_subCount[		1,		slot_count])
if	arp1.note_order=	14or	arp1.note_repeat=	0
if	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count]>=	arp1.selected_cursor
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count] :=	0
end if
end if
if	arp1.note_order#	14and	arp1.note_repeat>	0
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
end if

elseifslot_count=1
	inc(		slots_chord_subCount[		1,		slot_count])
if	arp2.note_order=	14or	arp2.note_repeat=	0
if	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count]>=	arp2.selected_cursor
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count] :=	0
end if
end if
if	arp2.note_order#	14and	arp2.note_repeat>	0
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
end if

elseifslot_count=2
	inc(		slots_chord_subCount[		1,		slot_count])
if	arp3.note_order=	14or	arp3.note_repeat=	0
if	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count]>=	arp3.selected_cursor
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count] :=	0
end if
end if
if	arp3.note_order#	14and	arp3.note_repeat>	0
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
end if

elseifslot_count=3
	inc(		slots_chord_subCount[		1,		slot_count])
if	arp4.note_order=	14or	arp4.note_repeat=	0
if	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count]>=	arp4.selected_cursor
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
	slots_chord_subCount[	1,	slot_count] :=	0
end if
end if
if	arp4.note_order#	14and	arp4.note_repeat>	0
	inc(		slots_rrCount[		slot_count])
end if

end if
ifslots_rrCount[slot_count]>=rr_nums[s]
slots_rrCount[slot_count] :=0
end if
end if
elseifengine>=1andengine#3andart_length[loaded_instruments[v]]=1
s:=assigned_instruments[engine,slot_count]
ifs>0
forn:=0torr_nums[s]-1
set_event_par_arr(	eventID, 	EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 	1, 	first_groupID[	s]+	n)
end for
end if
elseifengine=3
s:=assigned_instruments[engine,slot_count]
ifs>0
forn:=0torr_nums[s]-1
set_event_par_arr(	eventID, 	EVENT_PAR_ALLOW_GROUP, 	1, 	first_groupID[	s]+	n)
end for
end if
end if
end function

check_arp_rr_count_method

on note

ifpreset.is_loading=	1
exit()
end if

ignore_event(	EVENT_ID)
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1andtransport_stamp=-1
transport_stamp :=NI_SONG_POSITION
mf_remove_event(	ALL_EVENTS)

midi_export_button->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
midi_export_animation->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
end if

run_animation :=	1



fora :=0to	4-1
ifloaded_instruments[a]#-1
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[a]]
ifrr#0
forn :=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_RETRIGGER, 	0, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	a]]+	n, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
end for
end if
end if
end for

	set_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID, 		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 		EVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE, 		5)
		message(			"Cauhgt Grain On Note. ACTIVE: "&			grain1.active)
if		grain1.active=		1and		in_range(		EVENT_NOTE+(		assigned_octave_shifts[		grain1.slot]*		12),		instr_min_key[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]],		instr_max_key[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]])
		grain1.trg_id :=		play_note(		EVENT_NOTE+(		assigned_octave_shifts[		grain1.slot]*		12),		EVENT_VELOCITY,		0,		1)



		_allow_groups(			3, 			grain1.trg_id, 			grain1.slot)
		change_vol(			grain1.trg_id, -			64000, 			0)
		set_event_par_arr(			grain1.trg_id, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			grain1.BLIP_ID, 			5)
		set_event_par(			grain1.trg_id, 			EVENT_PAR_1, 			EVENT_ID)
		set_event_par(			grain1.trg_id, 			EVENT_PAR_2, 			ENGINE_UPTIME)
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			grain1.trg_id, 			14+			grain1.ID)
		message(			"zone id of group is "&			zone_id_group[			loaded_instruments[			grain1.slot]])
if		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]>=		0
		attach_zone(			grain1.wave_display, 			zone_id_group[			loaded_instruments[			grain1.slot]], 			UI_WAVEFORM_TABLE_IS_BIPOLAR)
end if
end if

		message(			"Cauhgt Grain On Note. ACTIVE: "&			grain2.active)
if		grain2.active=		1and		in_range(		EVENT_NOTE+(		assigned_octave_shifts[		grain2.slot]*		12),		instr_min_key[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]],		instr_max_key[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]])
		grain2.trg_id :=		play_note(		EVENT_NOTE+(		assigned_octave_shifts[		grain2.slot]*		12),		EVENT_VELOCITY,		0,		1)



		_allow_groups(			3, 			grain2.trg_id, 			grain2.slot)
		change_vol(			grain2.trg_id, -			64000, 			0)
		set_event_par_arr(			grain2.trg_id, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			grain2.BLIP_ID, 			5)
		set_event_par(			grain2.trg_id, 			EVENT_PAR_1, 			EVENT_ID)
		set_event_par(			grain2.trg_id, 			EVENT_PAR_2, 			ENGINE_UPTIME)
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			grain2.trg_id, 			14+			grain2.ID)
		message(			"zone id of group is "&			zone_id_group[			loaded_instruments[			grain2.slot]])
if		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]>=		0
		attach_zone(			grain2.wave_display, 			zone_id_group[			loaded_instruments[			grain2.slot]], 			UI_WAVEFORM_TABLE_IS_BIPOLAR)
end if
end if


event_velo :=EVENT_VELOCITY
event_note :=EVENT_NOTE

selectenv1.latch_mode
case1
env1.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=	1
env1.note_buffer[env1.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(	env1.cursor)
end select
selectenv2.latch_mode
case1
env2.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=	1
env2.note_buffer[env2.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(	env2.cursor)
end select
selectenv3.latch_mode
case1
env3.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=	1
env3.note_buffer[env3.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(	env3.cursor)
end select
selectenv4.latch_mode
case1
env4.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=	1
env4.note_buffer[env4.cursor] :=EVENT_NOTE
inc(	env4.cursor)
end select

fori:=0tonum_elements(loaded_instruments)-1
ifloaded_instruments[i]#0andget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[i],assign_slot_menu[i]->value)=0
octaved_note :=event_note+(assigned_octave_shifts[i]*12)
ifoctaved_note<0
octaved_note :=0
elseifoctaved_note>127
octaved_note :=127
end if
event_id :=play_note(octaved_note,event_velo,0,-1)
ani_arp_triggered[i/3] :=	1
set_event_par(	event_id, 	EVENT_PAR_0, 	ENGINE_TYPE.NONE)
no_engine_note_ids[i,octaved_note] :=event_id
_allow_groups(	0, 	event_id, 	i)
end if
end for

if		arp1.latch_mode#		0
		arp1.note_buffer[		arp1.cursor] :=		EVENT_NOTE
		inc(			arp1.cursor)

if		arp1.cursor<		2and		arp1.check_id=		0
		arp1.check_id :=		EVENT_ID
		arp1.aa :=		0
		arp1.s :=		0
		arp1.n :=		0
		arp1.t :=		0
		arp1.act_step :=		0
		arp1.oct_cursor :=		0
		arp1.swing_cursor :=		0
		arp1.bar_count :=		0
		arp1.blip_note :=		play_note(		0,		1,		0,		1)
		change_vol(			arp1.blip_note, -			64000, 			0)
end if
end if

if		arp2.latch_mode#		0
		arp2.note_buffer[		arp2.cursor] :=		EVENT_NOTE
		inc(			arp2.cursor)

if		arp2.cursor<		2and		arp2.check_id=		0
		arp2.check_id :=		EVENT_ID
		arp2.aa :=		0
		arp2.s :=		0
		arp2.n :=		0
		arp2.t :=		0
		arp2.act_step :=		0
		arp2.oct_cursor :=		0
		arp2.swing_cursor :=		0
		arp2.bar_count :=		0
		arp2.blip_note :=		play_note(		0,		1,		0,		1)
		change_vol(			arp2.blip_note, -			64000, 			0)
end if
end if

if		arp3.latch_mode#		0
		arp3.note_buffer[		arp3.cursor] :=		EVENT_NOTE
		inc(			arp3.cursor)

if		arp3.cursor<		2and		arp3.check_id=		0
		arp3.check_id :=		EVENT_ID
		arp3.aa :=		0
		arp3.s :=		0
		arp3.n :=		0
		arp3.t :=		0
		arp3.act_step :=		0
		arp3.oct_cursor :=		0
		arp3.swing_cursor :=		0
		arp3.bar_count :=		0
		arp3.blip_note :=		play_note(		0,		1,		0,		1)
		change_vol(			arp3.blip_note, -			64000, 			0)
end if
end if

if		arp4.latch_mode#		0
		arp4.note_buffer[		arp4.cursor] :=		EVENT_NOTE
		inc(			arp4.cursor)

if		arp4.cursor<		2and		arp4.check_id=		0
		arp4.check_id :=		EVENT_ID
		arp4.aa :=		0
		arp4.s :=		0
		arp4.n :=		0
		arp4.t :=		0
		arp4.act_step :=		0
		arp4.oct_cursor :=		0
		arp4.swing_cursor :=		0
		arp4.bar_count :=		0
		arp4.blip_note :=		play_note(		0,		1,		0,		1)
		change_vol(			arp4.blip_note, -			64000, 			0)
end if
end if


ifarp1.latch_mode#0orarp2.latch_mode#0orarp3.latch_mode#0orarp4.latch_mode#0orenv1.latch_mode#0orenv2.latch_mode#0orenv3.latch_mode#0orenv4.latch_mode#0orgrenv1.latch_mode#0orgrenv2.latch_mode#0
set_event_par(	EVENT_ID, 	0, 	2)
ifenv1.latch_mode#0andenv1.cursor<2andenv1.check_id=0
env1.check_id :=EVENT_ID
env1.act_step :=0
env1.swing_cursor :=0
env1.t :=0
env1.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(	env1.blip_note, -	64000, 	0)
end if
ifenv2.latch_mode#0andenv2.cursor<2andenv2.check_id=0
env2.check_id :=EVENT_ID
env2.act_step :=0
env2.swing_cursor :=0
env2.t :=0
env2.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(	env2.blip_note, -	64000, 	0)
end if
ifenv3.latch_mode#0andenv3.cursor<2andenv3.check_id=0
env3.check_id :=EVENT_ID
env3.act_step :=0
env3.swing_cursor :=0
env3.t :=0
env3.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(	env3.blip_note, -	64000, 	0)
end if
ifenv4.latch_mode#0andenv4.cursor<2andenv4.check_id=0
env4.check_id :=EVENT_ID
env4.act_step :=0
env4.swing_cursor :=0
env4.t :=0
env4.blip_note :=play_note(0,1,0,1)
change_vol(	env4.blip_note, -	64000, 	0)
end if
ifgrenv1.latch_mode#0andgrenv1.check_id=0
grenv1.check_id :=EVENT_ID
grenv1.act_step :=0
grenv1.swing_cursor :=0
grenv1.blip_note :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE,1,0,1)
change_vol(	grenv1.blip_note, -	64000, 	0)
end if
ifgrenv2.latch_mode#0andgrenv2.check_id=0
grenv2.check_id :=EVENT_ID
grenv2.act_step :=0
grenv2.swing_cursor :=0
grenv2.blip_note :=play_note(EVENT_NOTE,1,0,1)
change_vol(	grenv2.blip_note, -	64000, 	0)
end if
end if
	message(		"PanEn.on_note")
	PanEn.inputevents[	EVENT_NOTE] :=	1
	PanEn.inputcheck :=	search(	PanEn.inputevents,	1)
for	PanEn.i :=	0to	2-	1
if	PanEn.state[	PanEn.i]#	1
	PanEn.state[	PanEn.i] :=	1
	PanEn.blip_note[	PanEn.i] :=	play_note(	0,	1,	0,	1)
	change_vol(		PanEn.blip_note[		PanEn.i], -		64000, 		0)
end if
end for

end on

on release


ifsearch(KEY_DOWN,	1)=-1
run_animation :=	0
fora :=0to	4-1
ifloaded_instruments[a]#-1
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[a]]
ifrr#0
forn :=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[a]]+n,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_RETRIGGER, 	1, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	a]]+	n, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
end for
end if
end if
end for
end if

select		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		5)

case		grain1.BLIP_ID
		message(			"Caught Grain Blip. EVENT_STATE: "&			get_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID,			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,			5)&			"; G ACTIVE: "&			grain1.active)
while		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		5)<		EVENT_STATE.ENDEDand		grain1.active=		1
		grain1.dur :=		ENGINE_UPTIME-		get_event_par(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_2)




if		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		5)=		EVENT_STATE.RELEASE
		grain1.vol :=		grain1.cur_vol-		64000*(		ENGINE_UPTIME-		get_event_par(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_3))/		grain1.Rel
if		grain1.vol<-		64000
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.ENDED, 			5)
end if


elseif		grain1.dur<=		grain1.Att
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.ATTACK, 			5)
if		grain1.Att<=		grain1.density_knob
		grain1.cur_vol :=		0
else
		grain1.cur_vol :=-		64000+		grain1.dur*		64000/		grain1.Att
if		grain1.cur_vol>		0
		grain1.cur_vol :=		0
end if
end if
		grain1.att_vol :=		grain1.cur_vol
		grain1.vol :=		grain1.cur_vol


elseif		grain1.dur<=		grain1.Att+		grain1.Decand		grain1.att_vol>		grain1.Sus
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.DECAY, 			5)
		grain1.cur_vol :=		grain1.att_vol-(		grain1.att_vol-		grain1.Sus)*(		grain1.dur-		grain1.Att)/		grain1.Dec
		grain1.vol :=		grain1.cur_vol


else
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.SUSTAIN, 			5)
		grain1.cur_vol :=		grain1.Sus
		grain1.vol :=		grain1.cur_vol
end if



if		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]>		0









if		grain1.position_A<=		grain1.position_B
		grain1.left_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]/		1000*		grain1.position_A
		grain1.right_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]/		1000*		grain1.position_B
else
		grain1.left_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]/		1000*		grain1.position_B
		grain1.right_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]/		1000*		grain1.position_A
end if

		grain1.play_pos :=(		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]/		1000)*		grain1.pos


if		grain1.mnu_pos_rand_mode=		0
		grain1.play_pos :=		grain1.play_pos+		random(-		grain1.pos_rand_knob,		grain1.pos_rand_knob)*		300
if		grain1.play_pos<		grain1.left_clip
		grain1.play_pos :=		grain1.left_clip
end if
if		grain1.play_pos>		grain1.right_clip
		grain1.play_pos :=		grain1.right_clip
end if
elseif		grain1.mnu_pos_rand_mode=		1

		grain1.left_clip  :=		grain1.play_pos-((		grain1.play_pos-		grain1.left_clip)/		1000)*		grain1.pos_rand_knob
		grain1.right_clip :=		grain1.play_pos+((		grain1.right_clip-		grain1.play_pos)/		1000)*		grain1.pos_rand_knob
		grain1.play_pos :=(		grain1.play_pos+		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		6))+((		300*		500)*		grain1.sample_pos_move_direction)

if		grain1.play_pos<		grain1.left_clip
		grain1.play_pos :=		grain1.left_clip
		grain1.sample_pos_move_direction :=		POS_MOVE.FORWARD
end if
if		grain1.play_pos>		grain1.right_clip
		grain1.play_pos :=		grain1.right_clip
		grain1.sample_pos_move_direction :=		POS_MOVE.BACKWARD
end if
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			grain1.play_pos-((			zone_length_array[			loaded_instruments[			grain1.slot]]/			1000)*			grain1.pos), 			6)
end if


end if

		grain1.g_id :=		play_note(		EVENT_NOTE,		EVENT_VELOCITY,		grain1.play_pos,		grain1.Len*		1000)



		_allow_groups(			3, 			grain1.g_id, 			grain1.slot)
		change_tune(			grain1.g_id, 			random(-			grain1.detune,			grain1.detune), 			0)
		change_pan(			grain1.g_id, 			random(-			grain1.Rand_Pan,			grain1.Rand_Pan), 			0)
		grain1.vol :=		vol_compensation(		grain1.vol)

		change_vol(			grain1.g_id, 			grain1.vol, 			0)
		set_ui_wf_property(			grain1.wave_display, 			UI_WF_PROP_PLAY_CURSOR, 			0, 			grain1.play_pos)

if		grain1.density_sync=		0

		grain1.repetition_time :=		1000000/(		grain1.density/		2)

else
select(		grain1.density)
case		0
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER*		8
case		1
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER*		4
case		2
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER*		2
case		3
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER
case		4
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
case		5
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_EIGHTH
case		6
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case		7
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case		8
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case		9
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH/		2
case		10
		grain1.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH/		4
end select
end if

		wait(			grain1.repetition_time)

end while

case		EVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE

if		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		14+		grain1.ID)#		0
		set_event_par(			get_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID,			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,			14+			grain1.ID), 			EVENT_PAR_3, 			ENGINE_UPTIME)
		set_event_par_arr(			get_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID,			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,			14+			grain1.ID), 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.RELEASE, 			5)
end if
end select

select		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		5)

case		grain2.BLIP_ID
		message(			"Caught Grain Blip. EVENT_STATE: "&			get_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID,			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,			5)&			"; G ACTIVE: "&			grain2.active)
while		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		5)<		EVENT_STATE.ENDEDand		grain2.active=		1
		grain2.dur :=		ENGINE_UPTIME-		get_event_par(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_2)




if		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		5)=		EVENT_STATE.RELEASE
		grain2.vol :=		grain2.cur_vol-		64000*(		ENGINE_UPTIME-		get_event_par(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_3))/		grain2.Rel
if		grain2.vol<-		64000
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.ENDED, 			5)
end if


elseif		grain2.dur<=		grain2.Att
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.ATTACK, 			5)
if		grain2.Att<=		grain2.density_knob
		grain2.cur_vol :=		0
else
		grain2.cur_vol :=-		64000+		grain2.dur*		64000/		grain2.Att
if		grain2.cur_vol>		0
		grain2.cur_vol :=		0
end if
end if
		grain2.att_vol :=		grain2.cur_vol
		grain2.vol :=		grain2.cur_vol


elseif		grain2.dur<=		grain2.Att+		grain2.Decand		grain2.att_vol>		grain2.Sus
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.DECAY, 			5)
		grain2.cur_vol :=		grain2.att_vol-(		grain2.att_vol-		grain2.Sus)*(		grain2.dur-		grain2.Att)/		grain2.Dec
		grain2.vol :=		grain2.cur_vol


else
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.SUSTAIN, 			5)
		grain2.cur_vol :=		grain2.Sus
		grain2.vol :=		grain2.cur_vol
end if



if		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]>		0









if		grain2.position_A<=		grain2.position_B
		grain2.left_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]/		1000*		grain2.position_A
		grain2.right_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]/		1000*		grain2.position_B
else
		grain2.left_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]/		1000*		grain2.position_B
		grain2.right_clip :=		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]/		1000*		grain2.position_A
end if

		grain2.play_pos :=(		zone_length_array[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]/		1000)*		grain2.pos


if		grain2.mnu_pos_rand_mode=		0
		grain2.play_pos :=		grain2.play_pos+		random(-		grain2.pos_rand_knob,		grain2.pos_rand_knob)*		300
if		grain2.play_pos<		grain2.left_clip
		grain2.play_pos :=		grain2.left_clip
end if
if		grain2.play_pos>		grain2.right_clip
		grain2.play_pos :=		grain2.right_clip
end if
elseif		grain2.mnu_pos_rand_mode=		1

		grain2.left_clip  :=		grain2.play_pos-((		grain2.play_pos-		grain2.left_clip)/		1000)*		grain2.pos_rand_knob
		grain2.right_clip :=		grain2.play_pos+((		grain2.right_clip-		grain2.play_pos)/		1000)*		grain2.pos_rand_knob
		grain2.play_pos :=(		grain2.play_pos+		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		6))+((		300*		500)*		grain2.sample_pos_move_direction)

if		grain2.play_pos<		grain2.left_clip
		grain2.play_pos :=		grain2.left_clip
		grain2.sample_pos_move_direction :=		POS_MOVE.FORWARD
end if
if		grain2.play_pos>		grain2.right_clip
		grain2.play_pos :=		grain2.right_clip
		grain2.sample_pos_move_direction :=		POS_MOVE.BACKWARD
end if
		set_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID, 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			grain2.play_pos-((			zone_length_array[			loaded_instruments[			grain2.slot]]/			1000)*			grain2.pos), 			6)
end if


end if

		grain2.g_id :=		play_note(		EVENT_NOTE,		EVENT_VELOCITY,		grain2.play_pos,		grain2.Len*		1000)



		_allow_groups(			3, 			grain2.g_id, 			grain2.slot)
		change_tune(			grain2.g_id, 			random(-			grain2.detune,			grain2.detune), 			0)
		change_pan(			grain2.g_id, 			random(-			grain2.Rand_Pan,			grain2.Rand_Pan), 			0)
		grain2.vol :=		vol_compensation(		grain2.vol)

		change_vol(			grain2.g_id, 			grain2.vol, 			0)
		set_ui_wf_property(			grain2.wave_display, 			UI_WF_PROP_PLAY_CURSOR, 			0, 			grain2.play_pos)

if		grain2.density_sync=		0

		grain2.repetition_time :=		1000000/(		grain2.density/		2)

else
select(		grain2.density)
case		0
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER*		8
case		1
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER*		4
case		2
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER*		2
case		3
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER
case		4
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_QUARTER_TRIPLET
case		5
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_EIGHTH
case		6
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_EIGHTH_TRIPLET
case		7
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH
case		8
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH_TRIPLET
case		9
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH/		2
case		10
		grain2.repetition_time :=		DURATION_SIXTEENTH/		4
end select
end if

		wait(			grain2.repetition_time)

end while

case		EVENT_STATE.INPUT_NOTE

if		get_event_par_arr(		EVENT_ID,		EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,		14+		grain2.ID)#		0
		set_event_par(			get_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID,			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,			14+			grain2.ID), 			EVENT_PAR_3, 			ENGINE_UPTIME)
		set_event_par_arr(			get_event_par_arr(			EVENT_ID,			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM,			14+			grain2.ID), 			EVENT_PAR_CUSTOM, 			EVENT_STATE.RELEASE, 			5)
end if
end select


ifEVENT_ID#arp1.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#arp2.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#arp3.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#arp4.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#env1.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#env2.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#env3.blip_noteandEVENT_ID#env4.blip_noteandsearch(PanEn.blip_note,EVENT_ID)=-1

ifget_event_par(EVENT_ID,EVENT_PAR_0)#ENGINE_TYPE.NONE

if		arp1.latch_mode#		0
		arp1.a :=		0
		arp1.b :=		arp1.cursor
		arp1.cursor :=		0
while(		arp1.a<		arp1.b)
if(		EVENT_NOTE#		arp1.note_buffer[		arp1.a])
		arp1.note_buffer[		arp1.cursor] :=		arp1.note_buffer[		arp1.a]
		inc(			arp1.cursor)
end if
		inc(			arp1.a)
end while
end if

if		arp2.latch_mode#		0

while(		arp2.a<		arp2.b)

		inc(			arp2.a)

		arp3.cursor :=		0
while(		arp3.a<		arp3.b)

		inc(			arp3.cursor)

		inc(			arp3.a)
end while
end if

if		arp4.latch_mode#		0
		arp4.a :=		0
		arp4.b :=		arp4.cursor
		arp4.cursor :=		0
while(		arp4.a<		arp4.b)
if(		EVENT_NOTE#		arp4.note_buffer[		arp4.a])
		arp4.note_buffer[		arp4.cursor] :=		arp4.note_buffer[		arp4.a]

		inc(			arp4.a)
end while
end if

case1

inc(	env1.cursor)
end if
inc(	env1.a)
end while
env1.active_notes[0,EVENT_NOTE] :=	0
fori:=0to	4-1

functioncheck_cursor_amount
call		arp1.check_cursor_amount
call		arp2.check_cursor_amount
call		arp3.check_cursor_amount
call		arp4.check_cursor_amount


ifenv1.cursor=0
fori:=0to	4-1
fors:=0to127
ifenv1.last_note_ids[i,s]#0
mf_set_event_par(	env1.mf_note_ids[	i,	s], 	EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 	NI_SONG_POSITION-	env1.note_entry_time[	s])
note_off(	env1.last_note_ids[	i,	s])
env1.last_note_ids[i,s] :=0
end if
end for
end for
stop_wait(	env1.callback_id, 	0)
fori:=0tonum_elements(env1.note_buffer)-1
env1.note_buffer[i] :=0
env1.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
ifi<num_elements(_env1.current_engine_notes)
_env1.current_engine_notes[i] :=0
end if
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_env1.last_note_ids)-1
_env1.last_note_ids[i] :=0
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_env1.active_notes)-1
_env1.active_notes[i] :=0
end for
env1.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0to99
env1.rhythm_indicator[i] :=	0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=	0
end for
end if

ifenv2.cursor=0
fori:=0to	4-1
fors:=0to127
ifenv2.last_note_ids[i,s]#0
mf_set_event_par(	env2.mf_note_ids[	i,	s], 	EVENT_PAR_NOTE_LENGTH, 	NI_SONG_POSITION-	env2.note_entry_time[	s])
note_off(	env2.last_note_ids[	i,	s])
env2.last_note_ids[i,s] :=0
end if
end for
end for
stop_wait(	env2.callback_id, 	0)
fori:=0tonum_elements(env2.note_buffer)-1
env2.note_buffer[i] :=0
env2.selected_notes_buffer[i] :=0
ifi<num_elements(_env2.current_engine_notes)
_env2.current_engine_notes[i] :=0
end if
end for
fori:=0tonum_elements(_env2.last_note_ids)-1
_env2.last_note_ids[i] :=0
end for
env2.indicator_mirror->hide:=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
fori:=0to99
env2.rhythm_indicator[i] :=	0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=	0
end for
end if

ifenv3.cursor=0
fori:=0to	4-1
fors:=0to127
ifenv3.last_note_ids[i,s]#0

end function


on listener
ifNI_SIGNAL_TYPE=NI_SIGNAL_TRANSP_STOP
forani.i:=0to	4-1
midi_pos[ani.i] :=0
end for
transport_stamp :=-1
midi_label_count :=0
midi_export_animation->hide :=HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL
midi_export_button->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
ifmf_get_buffer_size()<1000000
midi_export_label->hide :=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
midi_export_button :=	1
midi_export_button->picture :="btn_midiexport_active"
else
midi_export_button :=	0
midi_export_button->picture :="btn_midiexport"
end if
end if

ifNI_SIGNAL_TYPE=NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS
ifNI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING=	1andtransport_stamp#-1
midi_export_animation->picture_state :=midi_label_count
inc(	midi_label_count)
ifmidi_label_count>=30
midi_label_count :=0
end if
end if

ifbtn_animation_setting=	1
fade_in_progress :=	0
forani.i :=0to	4-1
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]>0
fade_in_progress :=	1
end if
end for

iffade_in_progress=	1orrun_animation=	1
forani.i :=0to	4-1
ifrun_animation=	1
if(solo_active=	0ormixer.solo[search(slot_translation,ani.i)]->value=	1)andmixer.mute[search(slot_translation,ani.i)]->value=	0
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]<14
inc(	animation_fade_state[	ani.i])
end if
else
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]<4
inc(	animation_fade_state[	ani.i])
elseifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]>4
dec(	animation_fade_state[	ani.i])
end if
end if

lbl_ani_sphere_fade[ani.i]->picture_state :=animation_fade_state[ani.i]
else
ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]>0
dec(	animation_fade_state[	ani.i])
end if
lbl_ani_sphere_fade[ani.i]->picture_state :=animation_fade_state[ani.i]
end if


ifanimation_fade_state[ani.i]#0
animation_state[ani.i] :=(animation_state[ani.i]+1)mod127
ifanimation_state[ani.i]>126
animation_state[ani.i] :=0
end if
lbl_ani_sphere[ani.i]->picture_state :=animation_state[ani.i]
end if
end for
end if

forani.i :=0to1
ifani_arp_triggered[ani.i]=	1
ani_arp_triggered[ani.i] :=	0
ani_arp_current_instance :=0
forani.ii :=0to	15-1
ifani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]=0
ani_arp_current_instance :=ani.ii
end if
end for
lbl_ani_arp[ani.i,ani_arp_current_instance]->picture :="ani_arp"&random(1,10)
ani_arp_state[ani.i,ani_arp_current_instance] :=1
end if

forani.ii :=0to	15-1
ifani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]#0
lbl_ani_arp[ani.i,ani.ii]->picture_state :=ani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]
inc(	ani_arp_state[	ani.i,	ani.ii])
ifani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii]>29
ani_arp_state[ani.i,ani.ii] :=0
end if
end if
end for
end for
end if
end if


ifNI_SIGNAL_TYPE=NI_SIGNAL_TIMER_MS
callscanning_automation()
end if
end on

on ui_control(midi_export_button)
ifmf_get_buffer_size()=1000000
midi_export_button :=	0
else
midi_export_button :=	1
end if
end on

on async_complete
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=save_array_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	1
save_array_id :=-1
elseifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	0
save_array_id :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=load_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	1
load_id :=-1
elseifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	0
load_id :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=preset_load_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	1
preset_load_id :=-1
else
preset_load_id :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=settings_load_id[0]
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	1
settings_load_id[0] :=-1
else
settings_load_id[0] :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=settings_load_id[1]
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	1
settings_load_id[1] :=-1
else
settings_load_id[1] :=0
end if
end if
ifNI_ASYNC_ID=preset.load_id
ifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	1
preset.load_id :=-1
elseifNI_ASYNC_EXIT_STATUS=	0
preset.load_id :=0
end if
end if
end on

on controller






ignore_controller()
if(CC_NUM=1)
set_controller(	1, 	%CC[	1])
end if
if(CC_NUM=7)
set_controller(	7, 	%CC[	7])
end if
if(CC_NUM=10)
set_controller(	10, 	%CC[	10])
end if
if(CC_NUM=11)
set_controller(	11, 	%CC[	11])
end if
if(CC_NUM=VCC_MONO_AT)
set_controller(	VCC_MONO_AT, 	%CC[	VCC_MONO_AT])
end if
if(CC_NUM=VCC_PITCH_BEND)
set_controller(	VCC_PITCH_BEND, 	%CC[	VCC_PITCH_BEND])
end if



ifrhythm_touched=	1
exit()
else
ifCC_NUM=dyn_cc_num
_on_controller()
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
bg_picturestate :=CC[dyn_cc_num]-1
set_background_animation()

end if
end if
end if

if(CC_NUM=motion_cc_num)
callmotion_fx
end if
end on

function_on_controller
declarei
declaren

forn:=0to	4-1
selectn
case0
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
if	arp1.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp1.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	arp1.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp1.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	arp1.rhythm_B[	i]-	arp1.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	arp1.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp1.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	arp1.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp1.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

case2
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
if	env1.rhythm_A[	i]-	env1.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	env1.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env1.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	env1.rhythm_B[	i]-	env1.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	env1.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env1.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	env1.rhythm_A[	i]-	env1.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

end select
case1
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
if	arp2.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp2.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	arp2.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp2.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	arp2.rhythm_B[	i]-	arp2.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	arp2.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp2.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	arp2.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp2.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

case2
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
if	env2.rhythm_A[	i]-	env2.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	env2.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env2.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	env2.rhythm_B[	i]-	env2.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	env2.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env2.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	env2.rhythm_A[	i]-	env2.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

case3
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

end select
case2
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
if	arp3.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp3.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	arp3.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp3.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	arp3.rhythm_B[	i]-	arp3.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	arp3.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp3.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	arp3.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp3.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

case2
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
if	env3.rhythm_A[	i]-	env3.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	env3.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env3.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	env3.rhythm_B[	i]-	env3.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	env3.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env3.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	env3.rhythm_A[	i]-	env3.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

case3
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

end select
case3
selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[n],assign_slot_menu[n]->value)
case1
for	i:=	0to	ArpEn.MAX_STEPS-	1
if	arp4.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp4.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	arp4.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp4.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	arp4.rhythm_B[	i]-	arp4.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	arp4.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	arp4.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	arp4.rhythm_A[	i]-	arp4.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

case2
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
if	env4.rhythm_A[	i]-	env4.rhythm_B[	i]<	0
	env4.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env4.rhythm_A[	i]+(((	env4.rhythm_B[	i]-	env4.rhythm_A[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	env4.rhythm_playback[	i]:=	env4.rhythm_A[	i]-(((	env4.rhythm_A[	i]-	env4.rhythm_B[	i])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if
end for

end select
end select
end for


ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
ifin_range(see_main_subpage,UIpage_ARP1,UIpage_ENV4)
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if
elseifin_range(see_page,UIpage_GRAIN1,UIpage_GRAIN2)
callupdate_mod_graphics
end if
end function

_env_on_controller

functionset_background_animation

lbl_knob_main_animation->picture_state :=real_to_int(round((int_to_real(bg_picturestate)/126.0)*64.0))


lbl_main_animation_lightfx->picture_state :=bg_picturestate/2
end function












reset_fx_page_pictures

on_ui_fx_page

on ui_control(	fx_page_button0)

	fx_slot :=	0
	engine_active_slot:=	0+	1
call	grain_page_switcher()
call	update_visibility
call	main_subpage_manager

end on

on ui_control(	fx_page_button1)

	fx_slot :=	1
	engine_active_slot:=	1+	1
call	grain_page_switcher()
call	update_visibility
call	main_subpage_manager

end on

on ui_control(	fx_page_button2)

	fx_slot :=	2
	engine_active_slot:=	2+	1
call	grain_page_switcher()
call	update_visibility
call	main_subpage_manager

end on

on ui_control(	fx_page_button3)

	fx_slot :=	3
	engine_active_slot:=	3+	1
call	grain_page_switcher()
call	update_visibility
call	main_subpage_manager

end on


on ui_control(btn_engine_page_fx)
btn_engine_page_fx :=1
btn_engine_page_engine :=0

callmain_subpage_manager
callupdate_visibility()
end on

on ui_control(btn_engine_page_engine)
btn_engine_page_fx :=0
btn_engine_page_engine :=1
callmain_subpage_manager
callupdate_visibility()
end on

on ui_control(mainsub_exit_button)
see_page :=UIpage_MAIN
see_main_subpage:=UIpage_SUBMAIN
mainsub_exit_button:=	0


callremote_fx_page_buttons

callupdate_visibility


end on

functionshow_hide_solo_mute_buttons
ifsee_page=UIpage_MAIN
mixer.solo[0]->pos_x :=150-13-11
mixer.solo[0]->pos_y :=	510-45-135-22
mixer.solo[1]->pos_x :=150-13-11
mixer.solo[1]->pos_y :=60+135
mixer.solo[2]->pos_x :=	850-150-13-11
mixer.solo[2]->pos_y :=60+135
mixer.solo[3]->pos_x :=	850-150-13-11
mixer.solo[3]->pos_y :=	510-45-135-22
fori:=0to	4-1
mixer.solo[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
mixer.mute[i]->hide:=HIDE_PART_NOTHING
mixer.mute[i]->pos_x :=mixer.solo[i]->x+25
mixer.mute[i]->pos_y :=mixer.solo[i]->y
end for
end if
ifsee_page=UIpage_MIXER
fori:=0to	4-1
mixer.solo[i]->pos_x :=73-22+14+(	151*slot_translation[i])
mixer.solo[i]->pos_y :=100+slot_position_offset[i]
mixer.mute[i]->pos_x :=77+14+(	151*slot_translation[i])
mixer.mute[i]->pos_y :=100+slot_position_offset[i]
end for
end if
end function


functionset_current_control(control,unit,label,label_text)

declareglobalctrl :=control
declareglobalctrl_id :=get_ui_id(control)
declareglobal@ctrl_unit :=unit
declareglobalctrl_label :=get_ui_id(label)
declareglobal@ctrl_label_text :=label_text

declaregloballast_ctrl_id
declaregloballast_ctrl_label
declareglobal@last_ctrl_label_text
callhandle_control_change
end function

functionhandle_control_change
s :=search(core.control_ids,ctrl_id)
declarei
declaren
declarelast_cb
declaretime_remaining
time_remaining :=1000000
declarevisible_allow :=	0
declareglobalslot_id
declaremod_idx
declaretarget_idx
declareglobalrr
declaresat_idx
declare@value_label
declarefx_sat_balancer
declare~control_value
declare~hold


ifctrl_id->hide=HIDE_PART_NOTHINGorctrl_id->hide=HIDE_PART_BGorctrl_id->hide=HIDE_PART_VALUE
visible_allow :=	1
end if

ifvisible_deny=	1
visible_allow :=	0
end if



ifs#-1andcore.engine_par[s]#	0
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
ctrl_id->label :="Motion"
visible_allow :=	0
callupdate_fx_motion_values
else
ifsearch(attack,ctrl_id)#-1andloaded_instruments[search(attack,ctrl_id)]>0orsearch(decay,ctrl_id)#-1andloaded_instruments[search(decay,ctrl_id)]>0
ifsearch(attack,ctrl_id)#-1
slot_id :=search(attack,ctrl_id)
else
slot_id :=search(decay,ctrl_id)
end if
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]
fori:=0torr-1
mod_idx :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]+i,"ENV_AHDSR")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]+i,mod_idx,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	ctrl, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, 	mod_idx, 	target_idx)
ifsearch(decay,ctrl_id)#-1
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 	ctrl, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, 	mod_idx, 	target_idx)
end if
end for
ctrl_id->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]],mod_idx,target_idx)&ctrl_unit
elseifsearch(mixer.pan,ctrl_id)#-1
slot_id :=search(mixer.pan,ctrl_id)
ifPanEn.btn_active0.or.PanEn.btn_active1=	1
ifPanEn.btn_active0*PanEn.btn_slot_active[0,slot_id] ->value=0andPanEn.btn_active1*PanEn.btn_slot_active[1,slot_id] ->value=0
fori:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]-1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.pan[	slot_id]->	value, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, -	1, -	1)
end for
ctrl_id->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]],-1,-1)
else
fori:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]-1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	500000, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, -	1, -	1)
end for
ctrl_id->label :="Engine"
end if
else
fori:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]-1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.pan[	slot_id]->	value, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, -	1, -	1)
end for
ctrl_id->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]],-1,-1)
end if


elseifsearch(mod_mix,ctrl_id)#-1
ifloaded_instruments[search(mod_mix,ctrl_id)]>0
slot_id :=search(mod_mix,ctrl_id)
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	ctrl)*	0.397), -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL, 	397000-	real_to_int(	exp(	0.00003247277471*	int_to_real(	ctrl)*	0.397)), -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
end if

elseifsearch(trem_bypass,ctrl_id)#-1
slot_id :=search(trem_bypass,ctrl_id)
ifctrl_id->value=	0
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]
fori:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]+i,"LFO_SINE_1")
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS, 	1, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, 	mod_lfo, -	1)
message(	"BYP GROUP "&	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i)
end for
message(	"MOD "&	slot_id&	" TURNED OFF")
else
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]
fori :=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+i,"LFO_SINE_1")
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS, 	0, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, 	mod_lfo, -	1)
message(	"BYP GROUP "&	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i)
end for
message(	"MOD "&	slot_id&	" TURNED ON")
end if

elseifsearch(trem_depth,ctrl_id)#-1
ifloaded_instruments[search(trem_depth,ctrl_id)]>=0

slot_id :=search(trem_depth,ctrl_id)
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]
fori:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]+i,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]+i,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	ctrl, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
end for
value_label :=real_to_int(int_to_real(ctrl-	600000)/int_to_real(	1000000-	600000)*100.0)&ctrl_unit


end if
elseifsearch(trem_freq,ctrl_id)#-1
ifloaded_instruments[search(trem_freq,ctrl_id)]>=0
slot_id :=search(trem_freq,ctrl_id)
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]

fori:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]+i,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]]+i,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	ctrl, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	slot_id]]+	i, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
end for
value_label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]],mod_lfo,target_idx)&ctrl_unit


end if

elseifsearch(sat_gain,ctrl_id)#-1
sat_idx :=search(sat_gain,ctrl_id)
message(	"sat menu"&	sat_idx&	" value is "&	sat_menu[	sat_idx] ->	value)
if	sat_menu[	sat_idx] ->	value=	0
	set_engine_par(		core.engine_par[		s], 		ctrl, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		sat_idx)
	fx_sat_balancer :=(	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE,-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	sat_idx)-	500000)/	3
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		sat_idx)
else
	set_engine_par(		core.engine_par[		s], (		ctrl-		500000)*		2, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		sat_idx)
if	sat_menu[	sat_idx] ->	value=	3
	fx_sat_balancer :=	get_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s],-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	sat_idx)/	6
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		sat_idx)
elseif	sat_menu[	sat_idx] ->	value=	5
	fx_sat_balancer :=	0
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		sat_idx)
else
	fx_sat_balancer :=	get_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s],-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	sat_idx)/	10
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		sat_idx)
end if
end if

elseifsearch(mnu_lc_order,ctrl_id)#-1
selectctrl
case0
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_HP1, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
case1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_HP2, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
case2
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_HP3, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
case3
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_HP4, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
end select
elseifsearch(mnu_hc_order,ctrl_id)#-1
selectctrl
case0
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_LP1, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
case1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_LP2, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
case2
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_LP3, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
case3
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_LDR_LP4, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
end select
elseifctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.delay_feedback)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.delay_hicut)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.delay_return)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.rev_predelay)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.rev_time)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.rev_return)
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	ctrl, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])
ctrl_id->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&ctrl_unit
elseifcore.engine_par[s]=ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS
ifcore.slot[s]=0

set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	ctrl, -	1, 	0, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	ctrl, -	1, 	1, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	ctrl, -	1, 	2, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	ctrl, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
end if
elseifcore.engine_par[s]=ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS
ifsearch(mod_bypass,ctrl_id)#-1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	ctrl, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	ctrl, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])
end if

elseifsearch(mixer.vol,ctrl_id)#-1
fori :=0to	4-1
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 	mixer.vol[	i]->	value*	mixer.solo_hold[	i], -	1, 	5, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
end for
ctrl_id->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,-1,5,NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])&ctrl_unit
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	ctrl, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
ctrl_id->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])&ctrl_unit
end if
end if
end if

ifvisible_allow=	1
ifs#-1andcore.engine_par[s]#ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASSandcore.engine_par[s]#ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASSandcore.engine_par[s]#ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_SUBTYPE
ifsearch(attack,ctrl_id)#-1orsearch(decay,ctrl_id)#-1
ctrl_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]],mod_idx,target_idx)&ctrl_unit
elseifsearch(mixer.pan,ctrl_id)#-1
ifPanEn.btn_active0*PanEn.btn_slot_active[0,slot_id] ->value=0andPanEn.btn_active1*PanEn.btn_slot_active[1,slot_id] ->value=0
ctrl_label->text:=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[slot_id]],-1,-1)
else
ctrl_label->text:="ENGINE"
end if
elseifctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.delay_feedback)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.delay_hicut)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.delay_return)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.rev_predelay)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.rev_time)orctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.rev_return)
ctrl_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&ctrl_unit
elseifcore.engine_par[s]=	0
ifcore.control_ids[s]=get_ui_id(grain1.density_knob)
ifgrain1.density_sync=	1
ctrl_label->text :=SYNC_NAMES[grain1.density]
else
ctrl_label->text :=(ctrl_id->value)&ctrl_unit
end if
elseifcore.control_ids[s]=get_ui_id(grain2.density_knob)
ifgrain2.density_sync=	1
ctrl_label->text :=SYNC_NAMES[grain2.density]
else
ctrl_label->text :=(ctrl_id->value)&ctrl_unit
end if
elseifsearch(grain1.adsr_ctrl_ids,core.control_ids[s])#-1orsearch(grain2.adsr_ctrl_ids,core.control_ids[s])#-1
ctrl_label ->text :=ctrl_unit
else

ctrl_label->text :=(ctrl_id->value/10)&ctrl_unit
end if
elseifsearch(trem_depth,ctrl_id)#-1orsearch(trem_freq,ctrl_id)#-1
ctrl_label->text :=value_label
else
ctrl_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])&ctrl_unit
end if
else
ifctrl_id=get_ui_id(mixer.delay_time)
ifmixer.delay_sync=	0
ctrl_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_RDL_TIME,-1,1,0)&"ms"
else
ctrl_label->text:=ctrl_unit
end if
end if
end if




iflast_ctrl_id=0
last_ctrl_id :=ctrl_id
last_ctrl_label :=ctrl_label
last_ctrl_label_text :=ctrl_label_text
end if
ifctrl_id#last_ctrl_id
last_ctrl_label->text :=last_ctrl_label_text
last_ctrl_id :=ctrl_id
last_ctrl_label :=ctrl_label
last_ctrl_label_text :=ctrl_label_text
end if

last_cb :=NI_CALLBACK_ID
whiletime_remaining>0and$NI_CALLBACK_ID=last_cb
time_remaining :=time_remaining-10000
wait(	10000)
end while
if(NI_CALLBACK_ID=last_cb)
ctrl_label->text :=ctrl_label_text
end if
else
ctrl_label->text :=ctrl_label_text
end if
end function



functionremote_page_buttons
main_page_button:=	0
mixer_page_button:=	0
pan_page_button:=	0
end function

functionupdate_assigned_instruments
declarei
declaren
declareenv_latch :=	0
declarearp_latch :=	0
declaregrain_latch :=	0

fori:=0tonum_elements(_assigned_instruments)-1
_assigned_instruments[i] :=0
end for

assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu0,0] :=loaded_instruments[0]
assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu1,1] :=loaded_instruments[1]
assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu2,2] :=loaded_instruments[2]
assigned_instruments[assign_slot_menu3,3] :=loaded_instruments[3]

fori:=0tonum_elements(assign_slot_menu)-1
assign_slot_menu[i]->text:=assign_slot_list[assign_slot_menu[i]->value]
end for

lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot1->picture_state :=assign_slot_menu0
lbl_engine_selector.bg_slot4->picture_state :=assign_slot_menu3

fori:=0to	4-1

selectget_menu_item_value(assign_slot_menu[i],assign_slot_menu[i]->value)
case0
arp_latch :=	0
env_latch :=	0
grain_latch :=	0
ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ARP1+iorsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV1+i
see_main_subpage :=UIpage_SUBMAIN
end if
case1
arp_latch :=	1
env_latch :=	0
grain_latch :=	0
ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV1+i
see_main_subpage :=UIpage_ARP1+i
call_update_shown_table
end if
case2
arp_latch :=	0
env_latch :=	1
grain_latch :=	0
ifsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ARP1+iorsee_main_subpage=UIpage_ENV1+i
see_main_subpage :=UIpage_SUBMAIN
call_update_shown_envelope
end if
case3
grain_latch :=	1
ifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN1orsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN2
call_update_shown_envelope
end if
end select

ifloaded_instruments[i]=0
arp_latch :=	0
env_latch :=	0
grain_latch :=	0
end if

selecti
case0
arp1.latch_mode :=arp_latch
env1.latch_mode :=env_latch
ifloaded_instruments[i]>0
set_current_control(	attack0, 	" ms", 	attack0, 	"")
set_current_control(	decay0, 	" ms", 	decay0, 	"")
else
attack0->label :="N/A"
decay0->label :="N/A"
end if
case1
arp2.latch_mode :=arp_latch
env2.latch_mode :=env_latch
grain1.active :=grain_latch
ifloaded_instruments[i]>0
set_current_control(	attack1, 	" ms", 	attack1, 	"")
set_current_control(	decay1, 	" ms", 	decay1, 	"")
else
attack1->label :="N/A"
decay1->label :="N/A"
end if
case2
arp3.latch_mode :=arp_latch
env3.latch_mode :=env_latch
grain2.active :=grain_latch
ifloaded_instruments[i]>0
set_current_control(	attack2, 	" ms", 	attack2, 	"")
set_current_control(	decay2, 	" ms", 	decay2, 	"")
else
attack2->label :="N/A"
decay2->label :="N/A"
end if
case3
arp4.latch_mode :=arp_latch
env4.latch_mode :=env_latch
ifloaded_instruments[i]>0
set_current_control(	attack3, 	" ms", 	attack3, 	"")
set_current_control(	decay3, 	" ms", 	decay3, 	"")
else
attack3->label :="N/A"
decay3->label :="N/A"
end if
end select
end for

ifpreset.is_loading#	1
callupdate_visibility
callupdate_envelope_target
end if

callupdate_key_colors
end function

functionupdate_octave_shifts
assigned_octave_shifts[0] :=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu0]
octave_shift_label[0]->text:=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu0]
assigned_octave_shifts[1] :=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu1]
octave_shift_label[1]->text:=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu1]
assigned_octave_shifts[2] :=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu2]
octave_shift_label[2]->text:=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu2]
assigned_octave_shifts[3] :=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu3]
octave_shift_label[3]->text:=octave_shift_value_map[octave_shift_menu3]
end function
on ui_control(octave_shift_menu0)

callupdate_key_colors
end on

callupdate_key_colors
end on

callupdate_key_colors
end on
on ui_control(octave_shift_menu3)

callupdate_key_colors
end on

on ui_control(btn_next_slot)
inc(	engine_active_slot)
ifengine_active_slot>	4
engine_active_slot :=1
end if
fx_slot :=engine_active_slot-1
callgrain_page_switcher()

callupdate_visibility
callmain_subpage_manager
end on

on ui_control(btn_prev_slot)
dec(	engine_active_slot)
ifengine_active_slot<1
engine_active_slot :=	4
end if
fx_slot :=engine_active_slot-1

callgrain_page_switcher()

callupdate_visibility
callmain_subpage_manager
end on

functiongrain_page_switcher()
message(	"switcher to "&	engine_active_slot)
selectengine_active_slot
case1
see_page :=UIpage_MAIN
case2
see_page :=UIpage_grain1
case3
see_page :=UIpage_grain2
case4
see_page :=UIpage_MAIN
end select
callchange_engine_page
end function

		engine_active_slot :=		search(		slot_translation,		0)+		1
		fx_slot :=		engine_active_slot-		1
call		grain_page_switcher()

call		update_visibility
call		main_subpage_manager
end on

on ui_control(		btn_slot_selection1)
		engine_active_slot :=		search(		slot_translation,		1)+		1

end on

		engine_active_slot :=		search(		slot_translation,		2)+		1
		fx_slot :=		engine_active_slot-		1
call		grain_page_switcher()

call		update_visibility

on ui_control(btn_instrument_selector)
see_main_subpage :=UIpage_INSTR_BROWSER
