	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		env4.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		env4.h)
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	env4.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	env4.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	env4.steps))
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env4.h))/	int_to_real(	env4.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		env4.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		env4.steps)
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	env4.steps
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env4.steps))/	int_to_real(	env4.steps)
end if
end if

	env4.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	env4.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	env4.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	env4.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env4.stepsor	env4.steps<	env4.hand	i<	env4.hand	env4.mode_menu=	1
if	env4.steps>	32
if	env4.label_width_indicator>	env4.z
	env4.z :=	env4.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env4.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	env4.label_width_indicator>	env4.z
	env4.z :=	env4.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env4.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	env4.steps<	env4.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	env4.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	env4.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	env4.rhythm->	x+	env4.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	env4.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if


elseifenv4.edit_active=EDIT_B
	xy_cursor_pos_x:=	env4.rhythm_xy->	x+	real_to_int(	env4.rhythm_xy[	0]*(	int_to_real(	env4.rhythm_xy->	width)))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
if	tb_idx_borders[	i]<=	xy_cursor_pos_xand	tb_idx_borders[	i+	1]>	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	i
elseif	tb_idx_borders[	32-	1]<=	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	32-	1
end if
end for
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env4.rhythm_xy),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	env4.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	env4.last_touched>	300
	env4.shift_all_active :=	1
	env4.shift_start :=	real_to_int(	env4.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
	shift_buffer[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
else
for	tb_idx:=	0to	32-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-(	env4.shift_start-	real_to_int(	env4.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127)))
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	h
if	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	env4.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	env4.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	env4.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	env4.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
	env4.last_touched :=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else
	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]:=	real_to_int(	env4.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
if	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	env4.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	env4.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	env4.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	env4.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	env4.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	env4.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	env4.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
for	i:=	env4.stepsto	num_elements(	env4.rhythm_B)-	1
	env4.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_B[	imod	env4.steps]
	env4.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_playback[	imod	env4.steps]
end for

if	env4.mode_menu=	0
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	env4.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	env4.mode_menu=	1
if	env4.rate>	4
	env4.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	env4.time_signature]
else
	env4.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	env4.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	env4.steps :=	env4.rhythm_steps
if	env4.steps<=	env4.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		env4.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		env4.h)
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	env4.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	env4.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	env4.steps))
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env4.h))/	int_to_real(	env4.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		env4.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		env4.steps)
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	env4.steps
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env4.steps))/	int_to_real(	env4.steps)
end if
end if

	env4.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	env4.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	env4.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	env4.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env4.stepsor	env4.steps<	env4.hand	i<	env4.hand	env4.mode_menu=	1
if	env4.steps>	32
if	env4.label_width_indicator>	env4.z
	env4.z :=	env4.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env4.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	env4.label_width_indicator>	env4.z
	env4.z :=	env4.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env4.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	env4.steps<	env4.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	env4.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	env4.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	env4.rhythm->	x+	env4.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	env4.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if


end if
end on

function_update_shown_envelope
message(	"update shown env")
ifsee_page=UIpage_GRAIN1
if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	grenv1.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	grenv1.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv1.rate>	4
	grenv1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	grenv1.time_signature]
else
	grenv1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	grenv1.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	grenv1.steps :=	grenv1.rhythm_steps
if	grenv1.steps<=	grenv1.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		grenv1.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.h)
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps))
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv1.h))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		grenv1.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.steps)
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	grenv1.steps
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps)
end if
end if

	grenv1.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	grenv1.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	grenv1.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	grenv1.stepsor	grenv1.steps<	grenv1.hand	i<	grenv1.hand	grenv1.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv1.steps>	32
if	grenv1.label_width_indicator>	grenv1.z
	grenv1.z :=	grenv1.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	grenv1.label_width_indicator>	grenv1.z
	grenv1.z :=	grenv1.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	grenv1.steps<	grenv1.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	grenv1.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	grenv1.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	x+	grenv1.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if

	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env3.stepsor	env3.steps<	env3.hand	i<	env3.hand	env3.mode_menu=	1
if	env3.steps>	32
if	env3.label_width_indicator>	env3.z
	env3.z :=	env3.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env3.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else

	env3.z :=	env3.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4

end if

	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	env3.rhythm->	x+	env3.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000

	env3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	env3.steps
	env3.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env3.steps))/	int_to_real(	env3.steps)
end if
end if

	env3.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	env3.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	env3.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	env3.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env3.stepsor	env3.steps<	env3.hand	i<	env3.hand	env3.mode_menu=	1
if	env3.steps>	32
if	env3.label_width_indicator>	env3.z
	env3.z :=	env3.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env3.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	env3.label_width_indicator>	env3.z
	env3.z :=	env3.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env3.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	env3.steps<	env3.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	env3.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	env3.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	env3.rhythm->	x+	env3.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	env3.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if

	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	env4.steps :=	100

	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env4.h))/	int_to_real(	env4.h)

call	update_mod_graphics

	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)

	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.h)
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps))

	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4

call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if

end if
end if
end function

update_shown_envelope

on_ui_edit_active

on ui_control(	env1.envelope_A_edit)
	env1.envelope_A_edit :=	1
	env1.envelope_B_edit :=	0
	env1.edit_active :=	EDIT_A
if	env1.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(	env1.envelope_B_edit)
	env1.envelope_B_edit :=	1
	env1.envelope_A_edit :=	0
	env1.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
if	env1.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(	env2.envelope_A_edit)
	env2.envelope_A_edit :=	1
	env2.envelope_B_edit :=	0
	env2.edit_active :=	EDIT_A
if	env2.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(	env2.envelope_B_edit)
	env2.envelope_B_edit :=	1
	env2.envelope_A_edit :=	0
	env2.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
if	env2.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

	env3.envelope_A_edit :=	1
	env3.envelope_B_edit :=	0
	env3.edit_active :=	EDIT_A
if	env3.mode_menu=	0

	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	env3.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos

end on



set_eight_notes_bar_amount

on_ui_time_signature

on ui_control(env1.time_signature)
if	env1.mode_menu=	0
select	env1.time_signature
case	0
	env1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	8
case	1
	env1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	2
	env1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	3
	env1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	5
case	4
	env1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	7
end select

elseif	env1.mode_menu=	1

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	env1.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	env1.rate>	4
	env1.rate :=	env1.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	env1.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	env1.rhythm_steps=-	1
	env1.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

if	NI_CALLBACK_ID#	preset.load_cb
	a :=(	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env1.rhythm_steps),	CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
if	env1.rate>	4and	s<	3
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]>	env1.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
elseif	env1.rate<	5
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]>	env1.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
end if
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		a)

end if
end if
if	env1.mode_menu=	0
	env1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	env1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	env1.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		env1.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env1.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	env1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	env1.mode_menu=	1
if	env1.rate>	4
	env1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	env1.time_signature]
else
	env1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	env1.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	env1.steps :=	env1.rhythm_steps
if	env1.steps<=	env1.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		env1.rhythm, 		env1.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env1.rhythm_indicator, 		env1.h)
	env1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	env1.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	env1.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	env1.steps))
	env1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env1.h))/	int_to_real(	env1.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		env1.rhythm, 		env1.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env1.rhythm_indicator, 		env1.steps)
	env1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	env1.steps
	env1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env1.steps))/	int_to_real(	env1.steps)
end if
end if

	env1.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	env1.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	env1.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	env1.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env1.stepsor	env1.steps<	env1.hand	i<	env1.hand	env1.mode_menu=	1
if	env1.steps>	32
if	env1.label_width_indicator>	env1.z
	env1.z :=	env1.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env1.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env1.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	env1.label_width_indicator>	env1.z
	env1.z :=	env1.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env1.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env1.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	env1.steps<	env1.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	env1.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	env1.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	env1.rhythm->	x+	env1.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	env1.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if



end on
on ui_control(env2.time_signature)
if	env2.mode_menu=	0
select	env2.time_signature
case	0
	env2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	8
case	1
	env2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	2
	env2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	3
	env2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	5
case	4
	env2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	7
end select

elseif	env2.mode_menu=	1

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	env2.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	env2.rate>	4
	env2.rate :=	env2.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0

	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]

	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)

	inc(		a)

end if

	env2.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1

while	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]>	env2.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
elseif	env2.rate<	5
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]>	env2.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
end if
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		a)

end if
end if
if	env2.mode_menu=	0
	env2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	env2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	env2.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		env2.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env2.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	env2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	env2.mode_menu=	1
if	env2.rate>	4
	env2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	env2.time_signature]
else
	env2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	env2.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	env2.steps :=	env2.rhythm_steps
if	env2.steps<=	env2.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		env2.rhythm, 		env2.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env2.rhythm_indicator, 		env2.h)
	env2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	env2.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	env2.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	env2.steps))
	env2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env2.h))/	int_to_real(	env2.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		env2.rhythm, 		env2.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env2.rhythm_indicator, 		env2.steps)
	env2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	env2.steps
	env2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env2.steps))/	int_to_real(	env2.steps)
end if
end if

	env2.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	env2.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	env2.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	env2.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env2.stepsor	env2.steps<	env2.hand	i<	env2.hand	env2.mode_menu=	1
if	env2.steps>	32
if	env2.label_width_indicator>	env2.z
	env2.z :=	env2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	env2.label_width_indicator>	env2.z
	env2.z :=	env2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	env2.steps<	env2.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	env2.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	env2.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	env2.rhythm->	x+	env2.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	env2.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00

call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if



end on

if	env3.mode_menu=	0
select	env3.time_signature
case	0
	env3.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	8
case	1
	env3.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	2

	env3.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	env3.steps :=	100

	set_table_steps_shown(		env3.rhythm_indicator, 		100)

	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	env3.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	env3.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	env3.mode_menu=	1
if	env3.rate>	4
	env3.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	env3.time_signature]
else
	env3.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	env3.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	env3.steps :=	env3.rhythm_steps
if	env3.steps<=	env3.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		env3.rhythm, 		env3.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env3.rhythm_indicator, 		env3.h)
	env3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	env3.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	env3.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	env3.steps))
	env3.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env3.h))/	int_to_real(	env3.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		env3.rhythm, 		env3.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env3.rhythm_indicator, 		env3.steps)
	env3.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	env3.steps
	env3.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env3.steps))/	int_to_real(	env3.steps)
end if
end if

	env3.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	env3.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	env3.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	env3.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env3.stepsor	env3.steps<	env3.hand	i<	env3.hand	env3.mode_menu=	1
if	env3.steps>	32
if	env3.label_width_indicator>	env3.z
	env3.z :=	env3.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env3.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	env3.label_width_indicator>	env3.z
	env3.z :=	env3.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env3.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env3.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	env3.steps<	env3.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	env3.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	env3.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	env3.rhythm->	x+	env3.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	env3.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if



end on
on ui_control(env4.time_signature)
if	env4.mode_menu=	0
select	env4.time_signature
case	0
	env4.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	8
case	1
	env4.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	2
	env4.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	3
	env4.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	5
case	4
	env4.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	7
end select

elseif	env4.mode_menu=	1

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	env4.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	env4.rate>	4
	env4.rate :=	env4.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	env4.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	env4.rhythm_steps=-	1
	env4.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

if	NI_CALLBACK_ID#	preset.load_cb
	a :=(	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env4.rhythm_steps),	CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
if	env4.rate>	4and	s<	3
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]>	env4.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
elseif	env4.rate<	5
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]>	env4.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
end if
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		a)

end if
end if
if	env4.mode_menu=	0
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	env4.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	env4.mode_menu=	1
if	env4.rate>	4
	env4.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	env4.time_signature]
else
	env4.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	env4.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	env4.steps :=	env4.rhythm_steps
if	env4.steps<=	env4.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		env4.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		env4.h)
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	env4.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	env4.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	env4.steps))
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env4.h))/	int_to_real(	env4.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm, 		env4.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		env4.rhythm_indicator, 		env4.steps)
	env4.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	env4.steps
	env4.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	env4.steps))/	int_to_real(	env4.steps)
end if
end if

	env4.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	env4.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	env4.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	env4.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	env4.stepsor	env4.steps<	env4.hand	i<	env4.hand	env4.mode_menu=	1
if	env4.steps>	32
if	env4.label_width_indicator>	env4.z
	env4.z :=	env4.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env4.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x

else
if	env4.label_width_indicator>	env4.z
	env4.z :=	env4.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	env4.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	env4.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4

functionupdate_envelope_target
declarei
declaren
declaregroup_id
declaremidi_velo_value
declaremidi_1_value
declaremidi_102_value
declaremidi_103_value
declaremidi_104_value
declaremidi_105_value
declaremidi_106_value
declareis_stutter

fori:=0to	4-1
ifart_length[loaded_instruments[i]]=1
midi_velo_value :=0
midi_1_value :=0
midi_102_value :=0
midi_103_value :=0
midi_104_value :=0
midi_105_value :=0
midi_106_value :=0
is_stutter :=0

selectassign_slot_menu[i]->value
case0
midi_1_value :=1
case1
midi_velo_value :=1
case2
ifi=0
midi_102_value :=1
is_stutter :=env1.mode_menu
elseifi=1
midi_103_value :=1
is_stutter :=env2.mode_menu
elseifi=2
midi_104_value :=1
is_stutter :=env3.mode_menu
elseifi=3
midi_105_value :=1
is_stutter :=env4.mode_menu
end if
end select

iflength_hdr[loaded_instruments[i]]=	1
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id :=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_velo_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_velo"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_1_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_1"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_102_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_102"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_102_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_102_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_103_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_103"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_103_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_103_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_104_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_104"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_104_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_104_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_105_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_105"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_105_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_105_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_106_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_106"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_106_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_106_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"ENV_AHDSR"), 	find_target(	group_id,	find_mod(	group_id,	"ENV_AHDSR"),	"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"))
ifn=0
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_velo_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_velo_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_1_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_1_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	1000000*	midi_102_value)-((	1000000*	midi_102_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_102_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	1000000*	midi_103_value)-((	1000000*	midi_103_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_103_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	1000000*	midi_104_value)-((	1000000*	midi_104_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_104_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	1000000*	midi_105_value)-((	1000000*	midi_105_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_105_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	1000000*	midi_106_value)-((	1000000*	midi_106_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_106_plus"), -	1)
else
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	865800*	midi_velo_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_velo_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	865800*	midi_1_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_1_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	865800*	midi_102_value)-((	865800*	midi_102_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_102_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	865800*	midi_103_value)-((	865800*	midi_103_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_103_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	865800*	midi_104_value)-((	865800*	midi_104_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_104_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	865800*	midi_105_value)-((	865800*	midi_105_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_105_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	865800*	midi_106_value)-((	865800*	midi_106_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_106_plus"), -	1)
end if
end for
message(	"")
elseiflength_hdr[loaded_instruments[i]]=	0
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
group_id :=first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_velo_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_velo"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	840000*	midi_velo_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_velo_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_1_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_1"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	840000*	midi_1_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_1_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_102_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_102"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	840000*	midi_102_value)-((	840000*	midi_102_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_102_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_102_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_102_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_103_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_103"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	840000*	midi_103_value)-((	840000*	midi_103_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_103_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_103_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_103_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_104_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_104"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	840000*	midi_104_value)-((	840000*	midi_104_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_104_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_104_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_104_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_105_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_105"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	840000*	midi_105_value)-((	840000*	midi_105_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_105_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_105_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_105_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_106_value, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_106"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, (	840000*	midi_106_value)-((	840000*	midi_106_value)*	is_stutter), 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_106_plus"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000*	midi_106_value*	is_stutter, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"mod_106_stut"), -	1)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_MOD_TARGET_INTENSITY, 	1000000, 	group_id, 	find_mod(	group_id,	"ENV_AHDSR"), 	find_target(	group_id,	find_mod(	group_id,	"ENV_AHDSR"),	"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME"))
end for
message(	"")
end if
end if
end for
end function

functionreset_env_last_mode
env1.last_mode:=-1
env2.last_mode:=-1
env3.last_mode:=-1
env4.last_mode:=-1
grenv1.last_mode:=-1
grenv2.last_mode:=-1
end function

set_env_mode

function_set_env_mode
select	env1.mode_menu
case	0
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env1.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
if	env1.last_mode#	env1.mode_menuand	env1.last_mode#-	1
	env1.rate:=	96
if	env1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
end if
	env1.last_mode :=	0
case	1
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env1.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
if	env1.last_mode#	env1.mode_menuand	env1.last_mode#-	1
	env1.rate:=	3
for	i:=	0to	99
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
end if

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	env1.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	env1.rate>	4
	env1.rate :=	env1.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	env1.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	env1.rhythm_steps=-	1
	env1.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

	env1.last_mode :=	1
end select
if	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_INITand	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDand	preset.is_loading#	1
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_envelope_target
end if

select	env2.mode_menu
case	0
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env2.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
if	env2.last_mode#	env2.mode_menuand	env2.last_mode#-	1
	env2.rate:=	96
if	env2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
end if
	env2.last_mode :=	0
case	1
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env2.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
if	env2.last_mode#	env2.mode_menuand	env2.last_mode#-	1
	env2.rate:=	3
for	i:=	0to	99
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
end if

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	env2.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	env2.rate>	4
	env2.rate :=	env2.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	env2.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	env2.rhythm_steps=-	1
	env2.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

	env2.last_mode :=	1
end select
if	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_INITand	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDand	preset.is_loading#	1
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_envelope_target
end if

select	env3.mode_menu
case	0
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env3.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
if	env3.last_mode#	env3.mode_menuand	env3.last_mode#-	1
	env3.rate:=	96
if	env3.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	env3.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	env3.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
end if
	env3.last_mode :=	0
case	1
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env3.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
if	env3.last_mode#	env3.mode_menuand	env3.last_mode#-	1
	env3.rate:=	3
for	i:=	0to	99
	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
end if

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	env3.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	env3.rate>	4
	env3.rate :=	env3.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	env3.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env3.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		env3.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env3.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env3.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	env3.rhythm_steps=-	1
	env3.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

	env3.last_mode :=	1
end select
if	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_INITand	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDand	preset.is_loading#	1
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_envelope_target
end if

select	env4.mode_menu
case	0
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env4.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
if	env4.last_mode#	env4.mode_menuand	env4.last_mode#-	1
	env4.rate:=	96
if	env4.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	env4.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
end if
	env4.last_mode :=	0
case	1
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	env4.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
if	env4.last_mode#	env4.mode_menuand	env4.last_mode#-	1
	env4.rate:=	3
for	i:=	0to	99
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
end if

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	env4.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	env4.rate>	4
	env4.rate :=	env4.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	env4.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		env4.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else

end if
end for
if	env4.rhythm_steps=-	1
	env4.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

	env4.last_mode :=	1
end select
if	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_INITand	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDand	preset.is_loading#	1
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_envelope_target
end if

select	grenv1.mode_menu
case	0
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	grenv1.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
if	grenv1.last_mode#	grenv1.mode_menuand	grenv1.last_mode#-	1
	grenv1.rate:=	96
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
end if
	grenv1.last_mode :=	0
case	1
for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
for	i:=	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)to	num_elements(	arp_rates_list)+(	grenv1.env_entries-	1)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
if	grenv1.last_mode#	grenv1.mode_menuand	grenv1.last_mode#-	1
	grenv1.rate:=	3
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
end if

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	grenv1.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	grenv1.rate>	4
	grenv1.rate :=	grenv1.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	grenv1.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	grenv1.rhythm_steps=-	1
	grenv1.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

	grenv1.last_mode :=	1
end select
if	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_INITand	NI_CALLBACK_TYPE#	NI_CB_TYPE_PERSISTENCE_CHANGEDand	preset.is_loading#	1
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_envelope_target
end if

on ui_control(env1.rhythm_steps)
env1.steps :=env1.rhythm_steps
for	i:=	env1.stepsto	num_elements(	env1.rhythm_A)-	1
	env1.rhythm_A[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_A[	imod	env1.steps]
	env1.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_playback[	imod	env1.steps]
end for

for	i:=	env1.stepsto	num_elements(	env1.rhythm_B)-	1
	env1.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_B[	imod	env1.steps]
	env1.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	env1.rhythm_playback[	imod	env1.steps]
end for

call_update_shown_envelope
end on
on ui_control(env2.rhythm_steps)
env2.steps :=env2.rhythm_steps
for	i:=	env2.stepsto	num_elements(	env2.rhythm_A)-	1
	env2.rhythm_A[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_A[	imod	env2.steps]
	env2.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_playback[	imod	env2.steps]
end for

for	i:=	env2.stepsto	num_elements(	env2.rhythm_B)-	1
	env2.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_B[	imod	env2.steps]
	env2.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	env2.rhythm_playback[	imod	env2.steps]
end for

call_update_shown_envelope
end on

end on

on ui_control(env1.retrigger)
ifenv1.retrigger=	1
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env1.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env1.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_blue)
end if
end on
on ui_control(env2.retrigger)
ifenv2.retrigger=	1
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env2.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env2.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_blue)
end if
end on
on ui_control(env3.retrigger)
ifenv3.retrigger=	1
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env3.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env3.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_blue)
end if
end on
on ui_control(env4.retrigger)
ifenv4.retrigger=	1
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env4.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_white)
else
set_control_par(	get_ui_id(	env4.retrigger_label), 	CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, 	font_main_big_blue)
end if
end on

on_ui_table_copy

on ui_control(	env1.table_copy)
for	i:=	0to	99
	env_copy_array_A[	i]:=	env1.rhythm_A[	i]
	env_copy_array_B[	i]:=	env1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
	env_copy_active :=	1
	wait(		500)
	env1.table_copy :=	0
end on

on ui_control(	env2.table_copy)
for	i:=	0to	99
	env_copy_array_A[	i]:=	env2.rhythm_A[	i]
	env_copy_array_B[	i]:=	env2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
	env_copy_active :=	1
	wait(		500)
	env2.table_copy :=	0
end on

on ui_control(	env3.table_copy)
for	i:=	0to	99
	env_copy_array_A[	i]:=	env3.rhythm_A[	i]
	env_copy_array_B[	i]:=	env3.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
	env_copy_active :=	1
	wait(		500)
	env3.table_copy :=	0
end on

on ui_control(	env4.table_copy)
for	i:=	0to	99
	env_copy_array_A[	i]:=	env4.rhythm_A[	i]
	env_copy_array_B[	i]:=	env4.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
	env_copy_active :=	1
	wait(		500)
	env4.table_copy :=	0
end on


on_ui_table_paste

on ui_control(	env1.table_paste)
if	env_copy_active=	1
for	i:=	0to	99
if	env1.mode_menu=	0
	env1.rhythm[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
end if
	env1.rhythm_A[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
	env1.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env_copy_array_B[	i]
end for


	env1.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	_on_controller
	wait(		500)
end if
	env1.table_paste :=	0
end on

on ui_control(	env2.table_paste)
if	env_copy_active=	1
for	i:=	0to	99
if	env2.mode_menu=	0
	env2.rhythm[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
end if
	env2.rhythm_A[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
	env2.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env_copy_array_B[	i]
end for


	env2.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	_on_controller
	wait(		500)
end if
	env2.table_paste :=	0
end on

on ui_control(	env3.table_paste)
if	env_copy_active=	1
for	i:=	0to	99
if	env3.mode_menu=	0
	env3.rhythm[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
end if
	env3.rhythm_A[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
	env3.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env_copy_array_B[	i]
end for


	env3.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
call	update_visibility
call	_update_shown_envelope
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	_on_controller
	wait(		500)
end if
	env3.table_paste :=	0
end on

on ui_control(	env4.table_paste)
if	env_copy_active=	1
for	i:=	0to	99
if	env4.mode_menu=	0
	env4.rhythm[	i] :=	env_copy_array_A[	i]
end if

	env4.rhythm_B[	i] :=	env_copy_array_B[	i]

	env4.edit_active :=	EDIT_B

	env4.table_paste :=	0

create_adsr_callbacks
on ui_control(		grain1.ATT)

		set_current_control(			grain1.ATT, 			grain1.ATT/			grain1.ATT_dis_div&			"."&(			abs(			grain1.ATT)mod			grain1.ATT_dis_div)/(			grain1.ATT_dis_div/			10)&(			abs(			grain1.ATT)mod(			grain1.ATT_dis_div/			10))/(			grain1.ATT_dis_div/			100)&			grain1.ATT.unit, 			grain1.ATT_value_label, 			"ATK")
		grain1.ATT->		label :=		grain1.ATT/		grain1.ATT_dis_div&		"."&(		abs(		grain1.ATT)mod		grain1.ATT_dis_div)/(		grain1.ATT_dis_div/		10)&(		abs(		grain1.ATT)mod(		grain1.ATT_dis_div/		10))/(		grain1.ATT_dis_div/		100)&		grain1.ATT.unit
end on

on ui_control(		grain1.DEC)

		set_current_control(			grain1.DEC, 			grain1.DEC/			grain1.DEC_dis_div&			"."&(			abs(			grain1.DEC)mod			grain1.DEC_dis_div)/(			grain1.DEC_dis_div/			10)&(			abs(			grain1.DEC)mod(			grain1.DEC_dis_div/			10))/(			grain1.DEC_dis_div/			100)&			grain1.DEC.unit, 			grain1.DEC_value_label, 			"DEC")
		grain1.DEC->		label :=		grain1.DEC/		grain1.DEC_dis_div&		"."&(		abs(		grain1.DEC)mod		grain1.DEC_dis_div)/(		grain1.DEC_dis_div/		10)&(		abs(		grain1.DEC)mod(		grain1.DEC_dis_div/		10))/(		grain1.DEC_dis_div/		100)&		grain1.DEC.unit
end on

on ui_control(		grain1.SUS)
		h :=		vol_compensation(		grain1.SUS)

		set_current_control(			grain1.SUS, 			grain1.SUS/			grain1.SUS_dis_div&			"."&(			abs(			h)mod			grain1.SUS_dis_div)/(			grain1.SUS_dis_div/			10)&(			abs(			h)mod(			grain1.SUS_dis_div/			10))/(			grain1.SUS_dis_div/			100)&			grain1.SUS.unit, 			grain1.SUS_value_label, 			"SUS")
		grain1.SUS->		label :=		grain1.SUS/		grain1.SUS_dis_div&		"."&(		abs(		h)mod		grain1.SUS_dis_div)/(		grain1.SUS_dis_div/		10)&(		abs(		h)mod(		grain1.SUS_dis_div/		10))/(		grain1.SUS_dis_div/		100)&		grain1.SUS.unit
end on

on ui_control(		grain1.REL)

		set_current_control(			grain1.REL, 			grain1.REL/			grain1.REL_dis_div&			"."&(			abs(			grain1.REL)mod			grain1.REL_dis_div)/(			grain1.REL_dis_div/			10)&(			abs(			grain1.REL)mod(			grain1.REL_dis_div/			10))/(			grain1.REL_dis_div/			100)&			grain1.REL.unit, 			grain1.REL_value_label, 			"REL")
		grain1.REL->		label :=		grain1.REL/		grain1.REL_dis_div&		"."&(		abs(		grain1.REL)mod		grain1.REL_dis_div)/(		grain1.REL_dis_div/		10)&(		abs(		grain1.REL)mod(		grain1.REL_dis_div/		10))/(		grain1.REL_dis_div/		100)&		grain1.REL.unit
end on


on ui_control(		grain2.ATT)

end on

update_grain_density

update_detune_for_fam

fetch_slice_data

get_grain_load_pos

functionload_grain_data
		grain1.slices :=		num_slices_zone(		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]])
for		i :=		0to		num_elements(		grain1.slice_positions)-		1
if		i<		grain1.slices
		grain1.slice_positions[		i] :=		zone_slice_start(		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]],		i)
else
		grain1.slice_positions[		i] :=-		1
end if
end for

		grain2.slices :=		num_slices_zone(		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]])
for		i :=		0to		num_elements(		grain2.slice_positions)-		1
if		i<		grain2.slices
		grain2.slice_positions[		i] :=		zone_slice_start(		zone_id_group[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]],		i)
else
		grain2.slice_positions[		i] :=-		1
end if
end for

ifpreset.is_loading=	0andNI_CALLBACK_TYPE=NI_CB_TYPE_UI_CONTROL
if		btn_grain_load_setting=		1
		grain1.position_A :=		grain_load_pos_A[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]
		grain1.position_B :=		grain_load_pos_B[		loaded_instruments[		grain1.slot]]
else
		grain1.position_A :=		0
		grain1.position_B :=		1000
end if
		set_current_control(			grain1.position_A, 			"%", 			grain1.pos_A_value_label, 			"Pos A")
		set_current_control(			grain1.position_B, 			"%", 			grain1.pos_B_value_label, 			"Pos B")
call		set_pos_label_position

if		btn_grain_load_setting=		1
		grain2.position_A :=		grain_load_pos_A[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]
		grain2.position_B :=		grain_load_pos_B[		loaded_instruments[		grain2.slot]]
else
		grain2.position_A :=		0
		grain2.position_B :=		1000
end if
		set_current_control(			grain2.position_A, 			"%", 			grain2.pos_A_value_label, 			"Pos A")
		set_current_control(			grain2.position_B, 			"%", 			grain2.pos_B_value_label, 			"Pos B")
call		set_pos_label_position

end if
end function

create_grain_callbacks












on ui_control(		grain1.position_A)
		set_current_control(			grain1.position_A, 			"%", 			grain1.pos_A_value_label, 			"Pos A")
call		set_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(		grain1.position_B)
		set_current_control(			grain1.position_B, 			"%", 			grain1.pos_B_value_label, 			"Pos B")
call		set_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(		grain1.pos_rand_knob)
		grain1.pos_rand :=		grain1.pos_rand_knob ->		value
		grain1.pos_rand_knob->		label :=		grain1.pos_rand_knob->		value/		10&		" %"
		set_current_control(			grain1.pos_rand_knob, 			"%", 			grain1.pos_rand_value_label, 			"Rand Pos")
end on

on ui_control(		grain1.density_knob)
if		grain1.density_sync=		1
		grain1.density :=(		grain1.density_knob-		20)/(		70/		SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
		grain1.density_knob->		label :=		SYNC_NAMES[		grain1.density]
else
		grain1.density :=		grain1.density_knob ->		value
		grain1.density_knob->		label :=		grain1.density
end if

		set_current_control(			grain1.density_knob, 			"", 			grain1.density_value_label, 			"Density")

end on

on ui_control(		grain1.density_sync)
if		grain1.density_sync=		1
		grain1.density :=(		grain1.density_knob-		20)/(		70/		SYNC_NAMES.SIZE)
		grain1.density_knob->		label :=		SYNC_NAMES[		grain1.density]
else
		grain1.density :=		grain1.density_knob ->		value
		grain1.density_knob->		label :=		grain1.density
end if

		set_current_control(			grain1.density_knob, 			"", 			grain1.density_value_label, 			"Density")

end on

on ui_control(		grain1.knb_grain_attack)
		set_current_control(			grain1.knb_grain_attack, 			"ms", 			grain1.lbl_grain_attack_value, 			"Attack")
		set_engine_par(			ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, 			grain1.knb_grain_attack, 			grain1.group, 			0, -			1)
end on

on ui_control(		grain1.knb_grain_release)
		set_current_control(			grain1.knb_grain_release, 			"ms", 			grain1.lbl_grain_release_value, 			"Release")
		set_engine_par(			ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 			grain1.knb_grain_release, 			grain1.group, 			0, -			1)
end on

on ui_control(		grain1.position_choice)
call		check_env_latch_mode
end on






on ui_control(		grain1.Detune_knob)
		grain1.detune :=		real_to_int(		pow((		int_to_real(		grain1.detune_knob)/		DETUNE_RANGE.0),		3.0)*		DETUNE_RANGE.0)
		grain1.detune_knob ->		label :=		grain1.detune/		10000&		"."&(		grain1.detunemod		10000)/		1000&(		grain1.detunemod		1000)/		100&		" ct"

end on

on ui_control(		grain1.group)
		attach_zone(			grain1.wave_display, 			zone_id_group[			grain1.group], 			0)
		set_engine_par(			ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, 			grain1.knb_grain_attack, 			grain1.group, 			0, -			1)
		set_engine_par(			ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 			grain1.knb_grain_release, 			grain1.group, 			0, -			1)




end on

on ui_control(		grain1.xy_control)
if		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN
		click.x :=		grain_pos_to_px(		grain1.xy_control[		0])
if		in_range(		click.x,		grain1.pos_A_label->		x,		grain1.pos_A_label->		x+		grain1.pos_A_label->		width)
		grain.selected_label :=		0
elseif		in_range(		click.x,		grain1.pos_B_label->		x,		grain1.pos_B_label->		x+		grain1.pos_B_label->		width)
		grain.selected_label :=		1
end if
elseif		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
if		grain.selected_label=		0
		grain1.position_A :=		real_to_int(		grain1.xy_control[		0]*		1000.0)
elseif		grain.selected_label=		1
		grain1.position_B :=		real_to_int(		grain1.xy_control[		0]*		1000.0)
end if
call		set_pos_label_position()
else
		grain.selected_label :=-		1

end if
end on













on ui_control(		grain2.position_A)
		set_current_control(			grain2.position_A, 			"%", 			grain2.pos_A_value_label, 			"Pos A")
call		set_pos_label_position
end on
on ui_control(		grain2.position_B)
		set_current_control(			grain2.position_B, 			"%", 			grain2.pos_B_value_label, 			"Pos B")
call		set_pos_label_position
end on

		set_current_control(			grain2.pos_rand_knob, 			"%", 			grain2.pos_rand_value_label, 			"Rand Pos")
end on

else
		grain2.density :=		grain2.density_knob ->		value
		grain2.density_knob->		label :=		grain2.density
