on ui_control(		grain2.knb_grain_release)
		set_current_control(			grain2.knb_grain_release, 			"ms", 			grain2.lbl_grain_release_value, 			"Release")
		set_engine_par(			ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 			grain2.knb_grain_release, 			grain1.group, 			0, -			1)
end on

on ui_control(		grain2.position_choice)
call		check_env_latch_mode
end on






on ui_control(		grain2.Detune_knob)
		grain1.detune :=		real_to_int(		pow((		int_to_real(		grain1.detune_knob)/		DETUNE_RANGE.0),		3.0)*		DETUNE_RANGE.0)
		grain1.detune_knob ->		label :=		grain1.detune/		10000&		"."&(		grain1.detunemod		10000)/		1000&(		grain1.detunemod		1000)/		100&		" ct"

end on

on ui_control(		grain2.group)
		attach_zone(			grain2.wave_display, 			zone_id_group[			grain2.group], 			0)
		set_engine_par(			ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, 			grain1.knb_grain_attack, 			grain1.group, 			0, -			1)
		set_engine_par(			ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 			grain1.knb_grain_release, 			grain1.group, 			0, -			1)




end on

on ui_control(		grain2.xy_control)
if		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN
		click.x :=		grain_pos_to_px(		grain2.xy_control[		0])
if		in_range(		click.x,		grain2.pos_A_label->		x,		grain2.pos_A_label->		x+		grain2.pos_A_label->		width)
		grain.selected_label :=		0
elseif		in_range(		click.x,		grain2.pos_B_label->		x,		grain2.pos_B_label->		x+		grain2.pos_B_label->		width)
		grain.selected_label :=		1
end if
elseif		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=		NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
if		grain.selected_label=		0
		grain2.position_A :=		real_to_int(		grain2.xy_control[		0]*		1000.0)
elseif		grain.selected_label=		1
		grain2.position_B :=		real_to_int(		grain2.xy_control[		0]*		1000.0)
end if
call		set_pos_label_position()
else
		grain.selected_label :=-		1

end if
end on



functionset_pos_label_position
grain1.pos_A_label->x :=(grain1.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(grain1.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(grain1.position_A)))
grain1.pos_B_label->x :=(grain1.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(grain1.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(grain1.position_B)))

grain2.pos_A_label->x :=(grain2.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(grain2.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(grain2.position_A)))
grain2.pos_B_label->x :=(grain2.wave_display->x-5)+real_to_int(((int_to_real(grain2.wave_display->width)/1000.00)*int_to_real(grain2.position_B)))

grain1.position_A->label :=grain1.position_A/10&" %"
grain1.position_B->label :=grain1.position_B/10&" %"
grain2.position_A->label :=grain2.position_A/10&" %"
grain2.position_B->label :=grain2.position_B/10&" %"
end function

functiongrain_pos_to_px(x)->result
result :=	170+real_to_int(round(x*int_to_real(	510)))
end function





set_up_grain_env_controls























































































functionreset_grain_envelopes
message(	"GrainEnv Reset")
stop_wait(	grenv1.callback_id, 	0)
fori:=0to99
grenv1.rhythm_indicator[i] :=	0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=	0
end for
grenv1.check_id :=0

stop_wait(	grenv2.callback_id, 	0)
fori:=0to99
grenv2.rhythm_indicator[i] :=	0
rhythm_morph_indicators[i]->picture_state:=	0
end for
grenv2.check_id :=0
end function

functioncheck_env_latch_mode
ifgrain1.dynamic_link=1orgrain1.position_choice=2
grenv1.latch_mode :=	1
else
grenv1.latch_mode :=	0
end if
ifgrain2.dynamic_link=1orgrain2.position_choice=2
grenv2.latch_mode :=	1
else
grenv2.latch_mode :=	0
end if
callupdate_mod_graphics
end function


on ui_control(grenv1.rhythm)
	tablequery_idx :=	NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
if	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNor	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPor	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
	tablequery_min :=	tablequery_idx-	10
	tablequery_max :=	tablequery_idx+	10
if	tablequery_min<	0
	tablequery_min :=	0
end if
if	tablequery_max>	99
	tablequery_max :=	99
end if
else
	tablequery_min :=	0
	tablequery_max :=	99
end if
if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	grenv1.rhythm),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	grenv1.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	grenv1.last_touched>	300
	grenv1.shift_all_active :=	1
for	tb_idx:=	0to	100-	1
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	tb_idx]
	shift_buffer[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	tb_idx]
	shift_buffer[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]
end if
if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
else
	grenv1.shift_diff :=	shift_buffer[	tablequery_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm[	tablequery_idx]
for	tb_idx:=	0to	100-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.shift_diff
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	grenv1.rhythm[	tb_idx] :=	h
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	tb_idx]
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	tb_idx]
end if
if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
	grenv1.last_touched:=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else
	grenv1.shift_all_active :=	0
for	i:=	tablequery_minto	tablequery_max
	tb_idx :=	i
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	i]
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	i]
end if
if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end for
end if
else
for	i:=	tablequery_minto	tablequery_max
if	grenv1.rhythm[	i]#	0
	tb_idx :=	i
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	i]
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm[	i]
end if
if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end if
end for
end if

end on

on ui_control(grenv2.rhythm)
	tablequery_idx :=	NI_CONTROL_PAR_IDX
if	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWNor	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UPor	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE=	NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG
	tablequery_min :=	tablequery_idx-	10
	tablequery_max :=	tablequery_idx+	10
if	tablequery_min<	0
	tablequery_min :=	0
end if
if	tablequery_max>	99
	tablequery_max :=	99
end if
else
	tablequery_min :=	0
	tablequery_max :=	99
end if
if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	grenv2.rhythm),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	grenv2.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	grenv2.last_touched>	300
	grenv2.shift_all_active :=	1
for	tb_idx:=	0to	100-	1
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	grenv2.rhythm[	tb_idx]
	shift_buffer[	tb_idx] :=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	grenv2.rhythm[	tb_idx]
	shift_buffer[	tb_idx] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]
end if
if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3

	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0

	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")

	tb_idx :=	i

else

end on







































on ui_control(grenv1.rhythm_xy)
ifgrenv1.edit_active=EDIT_A
	xy_cursor_pos_x:=	grenv1.rhythm_xy->	x+	real_to_int(	grenv1.rhythm_xy[	0]*(	int_to_real(	grenv1.rhythm_xy->	width)))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
if	tb_idx_borders[	i]<=	xy_cursor_pos_xand	tb_idx_borders[	i+	1]>	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	i
elseif	tb_idx_borders[	32-	1]<=	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	32-	1
end if
end for
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	grenv1.rhythm_xy),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	grenv1.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	grenv1.last_touched>	300
	grenv1.shift_all_active :=	1
	grenv1.shift_start :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
	shift_buffer[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	tb_idx:=	0to	32-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-(	grenv1.shift_start-	real_to_int(	grenv1.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127)))
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	h
if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if

	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))

end if

end if
end for
end if
	grenv1.last_touched :=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)

end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
for	i:=	grenv1.stepsto	num_elements(	grenv1.rhythm_A)-	1
	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	imod	grenv1.steps]
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	imod	grenv1.steps]
end for

if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	grenv1.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	grenv1.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv1.rate>	4
	grenv1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	grenv1.time_signature]
else
	grenv1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	grenv1.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	grenv1.steps :=	grenv1.rhythm_steps
if	grenv1.steps<=	grenv1.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		grenv1.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.h)
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps))
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv1.h))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		grenv1.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.steps)
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	grenv1.steps
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps)
end if
end if

	grenv1.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	grenv1.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	grenv1.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

	grenv1.z :=	grenv1.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width

	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x

call	update_mod_graphics

	tb_idx:=	i

	grenv1.shift_all_active :=	1

else

	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)

	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv1.h))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)

	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.steps)

else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	grenv1.steps<	grenv1.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	grenv1.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	grenv1.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	x+	grenv1.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	grenv1.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if


end if
end on

on ui_control(grenv2.rhythm_xy)
ifgrenv2.edit_active=EDIT_A
	xy_cursor_pos_x:=	grenv2.rhythm_xy->	x+	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	0]*(	int_to_real(	grenv2.rhythm_xy->	width)))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
if	tb_idx_borders[	i]<=	xy_cursor_pos_xand	tb_idx_borders[	i+	1]>	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	i
elseif	tb_idx_borders[	32-	1]<=	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	32-	1
end if
end for
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	grenv2.rhythm_xy),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	grenv2.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	grenv2.last_touched>	300
	grenv2.shift_all_active :=	1
	grenv2.shift_start :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
	shift_buffer[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	tb_idx:=	0to	32-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-(	grenv2.shift_start-	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127)))
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	h
if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
	grenv2.last_touched :=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else
	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]:=	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
for	i:=	grenv2.stepsto	num_elements(	grenv2.rhythm_A)-	1
	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	imod	grenv2.steps]
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	imod	grenv2.steps]
end for

if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	grenv2.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	grenv2.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv2.rate>	4
	grenv2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	grenv2.time_signature]
else
	grenv2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	grenv2.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	grenv2.steps :=	grenv2.rhythm_steps
if	grenv2.steps<=	grenv2.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		grenv2.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv2.h)
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	grenv2.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps))
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv2.h))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		grenv2.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv2.steps)
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	grenv2.steps
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps)
end if
end if

	grenv2.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	grenv2.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	grenv2.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	grenv2.stepsor	grenv2.steps<	grenv2.hand	i<	grenv2.hand	grenv2.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv2.steps>	32
if	grenv2.label_width_indicator>	grenv2.z
	grenv2.z :=	grenv2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	grenv2.label_width_indicator>	grenv2.z
	grenv2.z :=	grenv2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	grenv2.steps<	grenv2.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	grenv2.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	grenv2.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	x+	grenv2.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	grenv2.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if


elseifgrenv2.edit_active=EDIT_B
	xy_cursor_pos_x:=	grenv2.rhythm_xy->	x+	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	0]*(	int_to_real(	grenv2.rhythm_xy->	width)))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
if	tb_idx_borders[	i]<=	xy_cursor_pos_xand	tb_idx_borders[	i+	1]>	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	i
elseif	tb_idx_borders[	32-	1]<=	xy_cursor_pos_x
	tb_idx:=	32-	1
end if
end for
if	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	grenv2.rhythm_xy),	CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT)=	1
if	grenv2.shift_all_active=	0or	ENGINE_UPTIME-	grenv2.last_touched>	300
	grenv2.shift_all_active :=	1
	grenv2.shift_start :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
for	i:=	0to	32-	1
	shift_buffer[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
else
for	tb_idx:=	0to	32-	1
if	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]#	0
	h :=	shift_buffer[	tb_idx]-(	grenv2.shift_start-	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127)))
	clip(		h, 		0, 		127)
	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	h
if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
end for
end if
	grenv2.last_touched :=	ENGINE_UPTIME
else
	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]:=	real_to_int(	grenv2.rhythm_xy[	1]*	int_to_real(	127))
if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

end if
for	i:=	grenv2.stepsto	num_elements(	grenv2.rhythm_B)-	1
	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	imod	grenv2.steps]
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	imod	grenv2.steps]
end for

if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	grenv2.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	grenv2.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv2.rate>	4
	grenv2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	grenv2.time_signature]
else
	grenv2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	grenv2.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	grenv2.steps :=	grenv2.rhythm_steps
if	grenv2.steps<=	grenv2.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		grenv2.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv2.h)
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	grenv2.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps))
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv2.h))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		grenv2.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv2.steps)
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	grenv2.steps
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps)
end if
end if

	grenv2.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	grenv2.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	grenv2.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	grenv2.stepsor	grenv2.steps<	grenv2.hand	i<	grenv2.hand	grenv2.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv2.steps>	32
if	grenv2.label_width_indicator>	grenv2.z
	grenv2.z :=	grenv2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	grenv2.label_width_indicator>	grenv2.z
	grenv2.z :=	grenv2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	grenv2.steps<	grenv2.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	grenv2.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	grenv2.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	x+	grenv2.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	grenv2.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if


end if
end on







































































































































on ui_control(	grenv1.envelope_A_edit)
	grenv1.envelope_A_edit :=	1
	grenv1.envelope_B_edit :=	0
	grenv1.edit_active :=	EDIT_A
if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

on ui_control(	grenv1.envelope_B_edit)
	grenv1.envelope_B_edit :=	1
	grenv1.envelope_A_edit :=	0
	grenv1.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on


on ui_control(	grenv2.envelope_A_edit)
	grenv2.envelope_A_edit :=	1
	grenv2.envelope_B_edit :=	0

if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on

	grenv2.envelope_B_edit :=	1
	grenv2.envelope_A_edit :=	0
	grenv2.edit_active :=	EDIT_B
if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
call	update_arp_label_pos
end on




























on ui_control(grenv1.perc_sync)


fori :=0tonum_elements(grenv1.slices_in_table)-1
grenv1.hold_slice_calc[0] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(grain1.slice_positions[i])/(int_to_real(zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[grain1.slot]])/1000.0))
ifgrain1.slice_positions[i]#-1andin_range(grenv1.hold_slice_calc[0],grain1.position_A,grain1.position_B)
ifgrain1.position_A<=grain1.position_B
grenv1.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(grenv1.hold_slice_calc[0]-grain1.position_A)/(int_to_real(grain1.position_B-grain1.position_A)/127.0))
else
grenv1.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(grenv1.hold_slice_calc[0]+grain1.position_A)/(int_to_real(grain1.position_A-grain1.position_B)/127.0))
end if
else
grenv1.slices_in_table[i] :=-1
end if
end for

sort(	grenv1.slices_in_table, 	1)

fori :=0tonum_elements(grenv1.slices_in_table)-1
message(	"Grenv1 slice in table pos "&	i&	" is: "&	grenv1.slices_in_table[	i])
end for

fortb_idx :=0to	100-1
	n :=	0
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=-	1
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=-	1
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=-	1

while	n<	num_elements(	grenv1.slices_in_table)and	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]#-	1
if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]<=	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]
else
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]
end if

if	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1]=-	1or	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2]<	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1]
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2]
end if
	inc(		n)
end while

if	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0]#-	1
	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0]
end if

	n :=	0
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=-	1
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=-	1
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=-	1

while	n<	num_elements(	grenv1.slices_in_table)and	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]#-	1
if	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<=	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]
else
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]
end if

if	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1]=-	1or	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2]<	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1]
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=	grenv1.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	2]
end if
	inc(		n)
end while

if	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0]#-	1
	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	grenv1.hold_slice_calc[	0]
end if

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv1.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv1.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv1.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv1.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ifgrenv1.envelope_A_edit=	1
grenv1.rhythm[tb_idx] :=grenv1.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
else
grenv1.rhythm[tb_idx] :=grenv1.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
end for
grenv1.perc_sync :=	0
end on

on ui_control(grenv2.perc_sync)

fori :=0tonum_elements(grenv2.slices_in_table)-1
grenv2.hold_slice_calc[0] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(grain2.slice_positions[i])/(int_to_real(zone_length_array[loaded_instruments[grain2.slot]])/1000.0))
ifgrain2.slice_positions[i]#-1andin_range(grenv2.hold_slice_calc[0],grain2.position_A,grain2.position_B)
ifgrain2.position_A<=grain2.position_B
grenv2.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(grenv2.hold_slice_calc[0]-grain2.position_A)/(int_to_real(grain2.position_B-grain2.position_A)/127.0))
else
grenv2.slices_in_table[i] :=real_to_int(int_to_real(grenv2.hold_slice_calc[0]+grain2.position_A)/(int_to_real(grain2.position_A-grain2.position_B)/127.0))
end if
else
grenv2.slices_in_table[i] :=-1
end if
end for

sort(	grenv2.slices_in_table, 	1)

fortb_idx :=0to	100-1
	n :=	0
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=-	1
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=-	1
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=-	1

while	n<	num_elements(	grenv2.slices_in_table)and	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]#-	1
if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]<=	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]
else
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]
end if

if	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1]=-	1or	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2]<	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1]
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2]
end if
	inc(		n)
end while

if	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0]#-	1
	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx] :=	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0]
end if

	n :=	0
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=-	1
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=-	1
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=-	1

while	n<	num_elements(	grenv2.slices_in_table)and	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]#-	1
if	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<=	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]
else
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]
end if

if	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1]=-	1or	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2]<	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1]
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0] :=	grenv2.slices_in_table[	n]
	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	1] :=	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	2]
end if
	inc(		n)
end while

if	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0]#-	1
	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx] :=	grenv2.hold_slice_calc[	0]
end if

if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]+(((	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
else
	grenv2.rhythm_playback[	tb_idx]:=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-(((	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])*	CC[	dyn_cc_menu])/	127)
end if

	label_pos_y_A:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx])))
	label_pos_y_B:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(	height_per_value*	int_to_real((	127-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx])))

if	grenv2.rhythm_A[	tb_idx]-	grenv2.rhythm_B[	tb_idx]<	0
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_B
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_A-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	0
else
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_top")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	3
elseif	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_B
	set_control_par_str(		rhythm_morph_range_indicators[		tb_idx], 		CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, 		"lbl_engine_morph_bottom")
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	0] :=	0
end if
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y:=	label_pos_y_A
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	label_pos_y_B-	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y
	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1] :=	1
end if
if	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height<	4
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height:=	4
end if
if	grenv2.morph_label_shift[	tb_idx,	1]=	0
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	127-	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
else
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y :=(	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	y+	3)+	real_to_int(((	int_to_real((	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	tb_idx]->	height-	6))/	127.00)*	int_to_real((	CC[	dyn_cc_num]))))
end if

ifgrenv2.envelope_A_edit=	1
grenv2.rhythm[tb_idx] :=grenv2.rhythm_A[tb_idx]
else
grenv2.rhythm[tb_idx] :=grenv2.rhythm_B[tb_idx]
end if
end for
grenv2.perc_sync :=	0
end on

transfer_slice_pos

on ui_control(grenv1.time_signature)
if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
select	grenv1.time_signature
case	0
	grenv1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	8
case	1
	grenv1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	2
	grenv1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	3
	grenv1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	5
case	4
	grenv1.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	7
end select

elseif	grenv1.mode_menu=	1

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	grenv1.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	grenv1.rate>	4
	grenv1.rate :=	grenv1.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	grenv1.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	grenv1.rhythm_steps=-	1
	grenv1.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

if	NI_CALLBACK_ID#	preset.load_cb
	a :=(	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	grenv1.rhythm_steps),	CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
if	grenv1.rate>	4and	s<	3
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]>	grenv1.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
elseif	grenv1.rate<	5
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]>	grenv1.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
end if
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		grenv1.rhythm_steps), 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		a)

end if
end if
if	grenv1.mode_menu=	0
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	grenv1.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	grenv1.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv1.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	grenv1.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv1.rate>	4
	grenv1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	grenv1.time_signature]
else
	grenv1.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	grenv1.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv1.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	grenv1.steps :=	grenv1.rhythm_steps
if	grenv1.steps<=	grenv1.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		grenv1.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.h)
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps))
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv1.h))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm, 		grenv1.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv1.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv1.steps)
	grenv1.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	grenv1.steps
	grenv1.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps))/	int_to_real(	grenv1.steps)
end if
end if

	grenv1.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	grenv1.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	grenv1.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	grenv1.stepsor	grenv1.steps<	grenv1.hand	i<	grenv1.hand	grenv1.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv1.steps>	32
if	grenv1.label_width_indicator>	grenv1.z
	grenv1.z :=	grenv1.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	grenv1.label_width_indicator>	grenv1.z
	grenv1.z :=	grenv1.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv1.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv1.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	grenv1.steps<	grenv1.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	grenv1.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	grenv1.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	grenv1.rhythm->	x+	grenv1.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	grenv1.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if



end on

on ui_control(grenv2.time_signature)
if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
select	grenv2.time_signature
case	0
	grenv2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	8
case	1
	grenv2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	2
	grenv2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	6
case	3
	grenv2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	5
case	4
	grenv2.eight_notes_bar_amount :=	7
end select

elseif	grenv2.mode_menu=	1

for	i:=	0to	num_elements(	_rhythm_steps_list)-	1
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		0)
end for
	s :=	grenv2.time_signature
if	s>	2
if	grenv2.rate>	4
	grenv2.rate :=	grenv2.rate-	3
end if

for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rate), 		i, 		0)
end for
elseif	s<	3
for	i:=	5to	7
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rate), 		i, 		1)
end for
end if
	a :=	0
for	i:=	0to	4
if	grenv2.rate>	4
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	i]
else
	n :=	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	i]
end if
if	n#-	1
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_str(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
	set_menu_item_visibility(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		1)
	inc(		a)
else
	set_menu_item_value(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rhythm_steps), 		i, 		n)
end if
end for
if	grenv2.rhythm_steps=-	1
	grenv2.rhythm_steps->	value:=	a-	1
end if

if	NI_CALLBACK_ID#	preset.load_cb
	a :=(	get_control_par(	get_ui_id(	grenv2.rhythm_steps),	CONTROL_PAR_SELECTED_ITEM_IDX))
if	grenv2.rate>	4and	s<	3
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list_triplets[	s,	a]>	grenv2.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
elseif	grenv2.rate<	5
if	a>	0
while	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]=-	1or	rhythm_steps_list[	s,	a]>	grenv2.stepsand	a>	0
	dec(		a)
end while
end if
end if
	set_control_par(		get_ui_id(		grenv2.rhythm_steps), 		CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 		a)

end if
end if
if	grenv2.mode_menu=	0
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	100
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	100))/	int_to_real(	100)
	grenv2.steps :=	100
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		100)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		100)
if	grenv2.edit_active=	EDIT_A
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_A[	i]
end for
else
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	grenv2.rhythm_B[	i]
end for
end if
elseif	grenv2.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv2.rate>	4
	grenv2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths_triplets[	grenv2.time_signature]
else
	grenv2.h :=	signature_rhythm_lengths[	grenv2.time_signature]
end if
for	i:=	0to	99
	grenv2.rhythm[	i] :=	0
end for
	grenv2.steps :=	grenv2.rhythm_steps
if	grenv2.steps<=	grenv2.h
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		grenv2.h)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv2.h)
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=	real_to_int((((	int_to_real(	100*	5))/(	int_to_real(	grenv2.h)*	2.0))*(	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps)*	2.0))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps))
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv2.h))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.h)
else
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm, 		grenv2.steps)
	set_table_steps_shown(		grenv2.rhythm_indicator, 		grenv2.steps)
	grenv2.table_bar_width_dynamic :=(	100*	5+	6)/	grenv2.steps
	grenv2.label_width_dynamic :=(	int_to_real(	100*	5)-	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps))/	int_to_real(	grenv2.steps)
end if
end if

	grenv2.z :=	0
for	i:=	0to	100-	1

	grenv2.label_width_indicator :=	real_to_int((	grenv2.label_width_dynamic*	int_to_real(	i+	1))-(	floor(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)*	int_to_real(	i+	1)))

	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	2000

if	i<	grenv2.stepsor	grenv2.steps<	grenv2.hand	i<	grenv2.hand	grenv2.mode_menu=	1
if	grenv2.steps>	32
if	grenv2.label_width_indicator>	grenv2.z
	grenv2.z :=	grenv2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x
end if
else
if	grenv2.label_width_indicator>	grenv2.z
	grenv2.z :=	grenv2.label_width_indicator
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width :=	real_to_int(	grenv2.label_width_dynamic)
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	width :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	width-	8
end if

if	i=	0
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	grenv2.rhythm->	pos_x+	3
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
else
	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	pos_x+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i-	1]->	width+	1
	rhythm_morph_indicators[	i]->	pos_x :=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	pos_x+	4
end if
end if
end if
	tb_idx_borders[	i]:=	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	i]->	x
end for
if	grenv2.steps<	grenv2.h
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	tb_idx_borders[	grenv2.steps-	1]+	rhythm_morph_range_indicators[	grenv2.steps-	1]->	width+	1
	engine_grey_out->	width:=(	grenv2.rhythm->	x+	grenv2.rhythm->	width-	3)-	engine_grey_out->	x
else
	engine_grey_out->	x:=	2000
end if
	height_per_value :=	int_to_real((	grenv2.rhythm->	height-	6))/	127.00
if	see_page=	UIpage_MAINand	in_range(	see_main_subpage,	UIpage_ARP1,	UIpage_ENV4)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
elseif	in_range(	see_page,	UIpage_GRAIN1,	UIpage_GRAIN2)
call	update_arp_label_pos
call	update_mod_graphics
end if
