on ui_control(	sat_menu0)
	load_id :=	load_array_str(	sat_preset_array,	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&	sat_preset_names[	sat_menu0]&	".nka")
while	load_id>	0
	wait(		100)
end while
if	load_id=-	1
	preset.n :=	0
	message(		"Sat Load 01: "&		preset.n)
	sat_menu[	search(	sat_menu,	get_ui_id(	sat_menu0))]->	value :=	sat_preset_array[	preset.n]
	inc(		preset.n)

	visible_deny :=	1
call	update_sat_type



select	sat_menu[	search(	sat_menu,	get_ui_id(	sat_menu0))] ->	value
case	0
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	1
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DISTORTION_TYPE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	2
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PREGAINLEAD, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BASS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MID, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_TREBLE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_POSTGAIN, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_RESONANCE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PRESENCE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_LEADCHANNEL, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_HIGAIN, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BRIGHT, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_CRUNCH, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MONO, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	3
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	4
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	5
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu0)))
	inc(		preset.n)

end select
	message(		"Sat Load 02: "&		preset.n)
	visible_deny :=	0

end if
call	update_visibility
end on

on ui_control(	sat_menu1)
	load_id :=	load_array_str(	sat_preset_array,	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&	sat_preset_names[	sat_menu1]&	".nka")
while	load_id>	0
	wait(		100)
end while
if	load_id=-	1
	preset.n :=	0
	message(		"Sat Load 01: "&		preset.n)
	sat_menu[	search(	sat_menu,	get_ui_id(	sat_menu1))]->	value :=	sat_preset_array[	preset.n]
	inc(		preset.n)

	visible_deny :=	1
call	update_sat_type



select	sat_menu[	search(	sat_menu,	get_ui_id(	sat_menu1))] ->	value
case	0
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))

case	1
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DISTORTION_TYPE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))

case	2

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_RESONANCE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PRESENCE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_LEADCHANNEL, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_HIGAIN, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BRIGHT, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_CRUNCH, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MONO, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	3
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_FILTER, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BASS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_BALLS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_TREBLE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_MONO, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	4
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_VOLUME, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_BASS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MID, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_TREBLE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DS_MONO, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	5
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_NOISELEVEL, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_NOISECOLOR, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu1)))
	inc(		preset.n)

end select
	message(		"Sat Load 02: "&		preset.n)
	visible_deny :=	0

end if
call	update_visibility
end on

on ui_control(	sat_menu2)
	load_id :=	load_array_str(	sat_preset_array,	get_folder(	GET_FOLDER_LIBRARY_DIR)&	"Samples/<<<Nordic Spheres.nkr>>>/Resources/data/"&	sat_preset_names[	sat_menu2]&	".nka")
while	load_id>	0
	wait(		100)
end while
if	load_id=-	1
	preset.n :=	0
	message(		"Sat Load 01: "&		preset.n)
	sat_menu[	search(	sat_menu,	get_ui_id(	sat_menu2))]->	value :=	sat_preset_array[	preset.n]
	inc(		preset.n)

	visible_deny :=	1
call	update_sat_type



select	sat_menu[	search(	sat_menu,	get_ui_id(	sat_menu2))] ->	value
case	0
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE_TYPE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	1
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_DISTORTION_TYPE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))
	inc(		preset.n)

case	2
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_PREGAINLEAD, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_BASS, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_MID, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_TREBLE, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_V5_POSTGAIN, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))
	inc(		preset.n)

	inc(		preset.n)

	inc(		preset.n)

	inc(		preset.n)

case	3
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_CT_VOLUME, 		sat_preset_array[		preset.n], -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		search(		sat_menu,		get_ui_id(		sat_menu2)))

on ui_control(	attack_motion0)
if	attack_motion0=	1
	relink_control_to_ep(		attack[		0], 		ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, -		1, -		1, 		1)
	attack[	0]->	label :=	"Motion"
else
	relink_control_to_ep(		attack[		0], 		ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, -		1, -		1, 		0)
end if
call	update_fx_motion_values
if	attack_motion0=	0
if	search(	attack,	attack[	0])=-	1and	search(	decay,	attack[	0])=-	1
if	search(	trem_depth,	attack[	0])#-	1or	search(	trem_freq,	attack[	0])#-	1
	mod_lfo :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]]+	n,	"LFO_SINE_1")
	target_idx :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]]+	i,	mod_lfo,	"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
	attack[	0]->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]],	mod_lfo,	target_idx)
end if
elseif	search(	attack,	attack[	0])#-	1or	search(	decay,	attack[	0])#-	1
if	search(	attack,	attack[	0])#-	1
	n :=	search(	attack,	attack[	0])
else
	n :=	search(	decay,	attack[	0])
end if
	s :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	"ENV_AHDSR")
	i :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
	attack[	0]->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	i)&	" ms"
end if
end if
call	update_visibility
end on

on ui_control(	decay_motion0)
if	decay_motion0=	1
	relink_control_to_ep(		decay[		0], 		ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, -		1, -		1, 		1)
	decay[	0]->	label :=	"Motion"
else
	relink_control_to_ep(		decay[		0], 		ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, -		1, -		1, 		0)
end if
call	update_fx_motion_values
if	decay_motion0=	0
if	search(	attack,	decay[	0])=-	1and	search(	decay,	decay[	0])=-	1
if	search(	trem_depth,	decay[	0])#-	1or	search(	trem_freq,	decay[	0])#-	1
	mod_lfo :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]]+	n,	"LFO_SINE_1")
	target_idx :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]]+	i,	mod_lfo,	"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
	decay[	0]->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]],	mod_lfo,	target_idx)
end if
elseif	search(	attack,	decay[	0])#-	1or	search(	decay,	decay[	0])#-	1
if	search(	attack,	decay[	0])#-	1
	n :=	search(	attack,	decay[	0])
else
	n :=	search(	decay,	decay[	0])
end if
	s :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	"ENV_AHDSR")
	i :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
	decay[	0]->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	ENGINE_PAR_DECAY,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	i)&	" ms"
end if
end if
call	update_visibility
end on

	mixer.senddel[	1]->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	1]],	mod_lfo,	target_idx)
end if
elseif	search(	attack,	mixer.senddel[	1])#-	1or	search(	decay,	mixer.senddel[	1])#-	1

end if
	s :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	"ENV_AHDSR")
	i :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")

if	attack_motion3=	0
if	search(	attack,	attack[	3])=-	1and	search(	decay,	attack[	3])=-	1
if	search(	trem_depth,	attack[	3])#-	1or	search(	trem_freq,	attack[	3])#-	1
	mod_lfo :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]]+	n,	"LFO_SINE_1")
	target_idx :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]]+	i,	mod_lfo,	"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
	attack[	3]->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[-	1]],	mod_lfo,	target_idx)
end if
elseif	search(	attack,	attack[	3])#-	1or	search(	decay,	attack[	3])#-	1
if	search(	attack,	attack[	3])#-	1
	n :=	search(	attack,	attack[	3])
else
	n :=	search(	decay,	attack[	3])
end if
	s :=	find_mod(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	"ENV_AHDSR")
	i :=	find_target(	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
	attack[	3]->	label :=	get_engine_par_disp(	ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK,	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	n]],	s,	i)&	" ms"
end if
end if
call	update_visibility
end on

on ui_control(	attack_min0)
if	attack_min0>=	attack_max0
	attack_min0 :=	attack_max0-	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	attack_min0->	value)-	int_to_real(	0))/(	int_to_real(	1000000)-	int_to_real(	0)))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_min_value0, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_min_label0->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	decay_min0)
if	decay_min0>=	decay_max0
	decay_min0 :=	decay_max0-	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	decay_min0->	value)-	int_to_real(	0))/(	int_to_real(	1000000)-	int_to_real(	0)))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_min_value1, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_min_label1->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_depth_min0)
if	trem_depth_min0>=	trem_depth_max0
	trem_depth_min0 :=	trem_depth_max0-	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	trem_depth_min0->	value)-	int_to_real(	600000))/(	int_to_real(	1000000)-	int_to_real(	600000)))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_min_value0, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_min_label0->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_freq_min0)
if	trem_freq_min0>=	trem_freq_max0

end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	sli_lc_freq_max3->	value)-	0.0)/(	1000000.0-	0.0))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value0, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label0->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_bell_freq_max3)
if	sli_bell_freq_max3<=	sli_bell_freq_min3
	sli_bell_freq_max3 :=	sli_bell_freq_min3+	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	sli_bell_freq_max3->	value)-	0.0)/(	1000000.0-	0.0))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value1, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label1->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_hc_freq_max3)
if	sli_hc_freq_max3<=	sli_hc_freq_min3
	sli_hc_freq_max3 :=	sli_hc_freq_min3+	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	sli_hc_freq_max3->	value)-	0.0)/(	1000000.0-	0.0))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value2, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label2->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	mod_mix_max3)
if	mod_mix_max3<=	mod_mix_min3
	mod_mix_max3 :=	mod_mix_min3+	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	mod_mix_max3->	value)-	0.0)/(	1000000.0-	0.0))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value0, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label0->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sat_gain_max3)
if	sat_gain_max3<=	sat_gain_min3
	sat_gain_max3 :=	sat_gain_min3+	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	sat_gain_max3->	value)-	500000.0)/(	1000000.0-	500000.0))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value0, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label0->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	mod_freq_max3)
if	mod_freq_max3<=	mod_freq_min3
	mod_freq_max3 :=	mod_freq_min3+	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	mod_freq_max3->	value)-	0.0)/(	1000000.0-	0.0))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value1, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label1->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	mixer.senddel_max3)
if	mixer.senddel_max3<=	mixer.senddel_min3
	mixer.senddel_max3 :=	mixer.senddel_min3+	1
end if
	motion_value_hold :=	real_to_int(((	int_to_real(	mixer.senddel_max3->	value)-	0.0)/(	630000.0-	0.0))*	100.0)
	set_text(		motion_max_value3, 		motion_value_hold&		"%")
	motion_max_label3->	picture_state:=	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	motion_value_hold)*	1.26)

call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	attack_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	decay_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_depth_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_freq_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	sli_lc_freq_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_bell_freq_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_hc_freq_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	mod_mix_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sat_gain_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	mod_freq_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	mixer.senddel_motion_invert0)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	attack_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	decay_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_depth_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_freq_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	sli_lc_freq_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_bell_freq_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_hc_freq_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	mod_mix_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sat_gain_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	mod_freq_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	mixer.senddel_motion_invert1)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	attack_motion_invert2)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	decay_motion_invert2)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_depth_motion_invert2)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	trem_freq_motion_invert2)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on


on ui_control(	sli_lc_freq_motion_invert2)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_bell_freq_motion_invert2)
call	update_fx_motion_values
end on

on ui_control(	sli_hc_freq_motion_invert2)

end on



functionupdate_fx_controls
declarei
declaren
declares
declaremod_idx
declaretarget_idx
declarefx_sat_type
declarefx_sat_balancer

visible_deny :=	1

message(	"Update_FX_CONTROLS")

fori :=0to	4-1
relink_control_to_ep(	attack[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_ATTACK, -	1, -	1, 	attack_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	decay[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_DECAY, -	1, -	1, 	decay_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	trem_depth[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_INTENSITY, -	1, 	i, 	trem_depth_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	trem_freq[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_FREQUENCY, -	1, 	i, 	trem_freq_motion[	i]->	value)

relink_control_to_ep(	sli_lc_freq[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF, 	0, 	i, 	sli_lc_freq_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	sli_bell_freq[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_FREQ1, 	1, 	i, 	sli_bell_freq_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	sli_hc_freq[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_CUTOFF, 	2, 	i, 	sli_hc_freq_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	mod_mix[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 	4, 	i, 	mod_mix_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	sat_gain[	i], 	sat_type_links[	sat_menu[	i]->	value,	1], 	3, 	i, 	sat_gain_motion[	i]->	value)

relink_control_to_ep(	mod_freq[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_CH_SPEED, 	4, 	i, 	mod_freq_motion[	i]->	value)
relink_control_to_ep(	mixer.senddel[	i], 	ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_1, 	7, 	i, 	mixer.senddel_motion[	i]->	value)
end for


fori:=0to	4-1


ifloaded_instruments[i]>0
s:=search(core.control_ids,attack[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
attack[i]->label:="Motion"
else
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
mod_idx:=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"ENV_AHDSR")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_idx,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	attack[	i]->	value, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, 	mod_idx, 	target_idx)
end for
attack[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],mod_idx,target_idx)&" ms"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,decay[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
decay[i]->label:="Motion"
else
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
mod_idx:=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"ENV_AHDSR")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,mod_idx,"ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	decay[	i]->	value, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_RELEASE, 	decay[	i]->	value, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
end for
decay[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],mod_idx,target_idx)&" ms"
end if
else
attack[i]->label :="N/A"
decay[i]->label :="N/A"
end if





s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_bypass[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	mod_bypass[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_depth[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mod_depth[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
mod_depth[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_phase[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mod_phase[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
mod_phase[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
mod_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mod_freq[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
mod_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,mod_mix[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
mod_mix[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	real_to_int(	int_to_real(	mod_mix[	i]->	value)*	0.397), -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_DRY_LEVEL, 	397000-	real_to_int(	exp(	0.00003247277471*	int_to_real(	mod_mix[	i]->	value))), -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
mod_mix[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&""
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,trem_bypass[i])
iftrem_bypass[i]->value=	0
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]
forn:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS, 	1, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, 	mod_lfo, -	1)
end for
else
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]
forn :=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]]+n,"LFO_SINE_1")
set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INTMOD_BYPASS, 	0, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, 	mod_lfo, -	1)
end for
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,trem_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
trem_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
ifcore.slot[s]>-1andloaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]>0
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]
forii:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	trem_freq[	i], 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	core.slot[	s]]]+	ii, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
trem_freq_value_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,target_idx)&"kHz"
end for
end if
end if


s:=search(core.control_ids,trem_depth[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
trem_depth[i]->label :="Motion"
else
ifcore.slot[s]>-1andloaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]>0
rr :=rr_nums[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]
forii:=0torr-1
mod_lfo :=find_mod(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,"LFO_SINE_1")
target_idx :=find_target(first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,"LFO_SINE_1_VOLUME")
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	trem_depth[	i], 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	core.slot[	s]]]+	ii, 	mod_lfo, 	target_idx)
trem_depth_value_label->text :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[core.slot[s]]]+ii,mod_lfo,target_idx)&""

end for

end if
end if


s:=search(core.control_ids,sat_bypass[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	sat_bypass[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)

s:=search(core.control_ids,sat_gain[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
sat_gain[i]->label :="Motion"
else
if	sat_menu[	i] ->	value=	0
	set_engine_par(		core.engine_par[		s], 		sat_gain[		i]->		value, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		i)
	fx_sat_balancer :=(	get_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_SHAPE,-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)-	500000)/	3
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		i)
else
	set_engine_par(		core.engine_par[		s], (		sat_gain[		i]->		value-		500000)*		2, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		i)
if	sat_menu[	i] ->	value=	3
	fx_sat_balancer :=	get_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s],-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)/	6
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		i)
elseif	sat_menu[	i] ->	value=	5
	fx_sat_balancer :=	0
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		i)
else
	fx_sat_balancer :=	get_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s],-	1,	3,	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)/	10
	set_engine_par(		ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 		396850-		fx_sat_balancer, -		1, 		3, 		NI_BUS_OFFSET+		i)
end if
end if





end if

s :=search(core.control_ids,sat_tone[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sat_tone[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)


s:=search(core.control_ids,filter_bypass[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	filter_bypass[	i]->	value, -	1, 	0, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	filter_bypass[	i]->	value, -	1, 	1, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	filter_bypass[	i]->	value, -	1, 	2, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)


s:=search(core.control_ids,mnu_lc_order[i])
selectmnu_lc_order[i]->value
case0
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_SV_HP1, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
case1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_SV_HP2, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
case2
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_SV_HP4, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
end select

s:=search(core.control_ids,mnu_hc_order[i])
selectmnu_hc_order[i]->value
case0
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP1, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
case1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP2, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
case2
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	FILTER_TYPE_SV_LP4, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
end select

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_bell_q[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sli_bell_q[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
sli_bell_q[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&"Oc"



s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_lc_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
sli_lc_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sli_lc_freq[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
sli_lc_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" Hz"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_bell_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
sli_bell_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sli_bell_freq[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
sli_bell_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" Hz"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_hc_freq[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
sli_hc_freq[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sli_hc_freq[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
sli_hc_freq[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" Hz"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_lc_resonance[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sli_lc_resonance[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
sli_lc_resonance[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" %"

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_bell_gain[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sli_bell_gain[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
sli_bell_gain[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,sli_hc_resonance[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	sli_hc_resonance[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
sli_hc_resonance[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" %"


set_engine_par(	ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 	mixer.vol[	i]->	value*	mixer.solo_hold[	i], -	1, 	5, 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
mixer.vol[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(ENGINE_PAR_INSERT_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN,-1,5,NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,mixer.pan[i])
ifPanEn.btn_active0.or.PanEn.btn_active1=	1
ifPanEn.btn_active0*PanEn.btn_slot_active[0,i] ->value=0andPanEn.btn_active1*PanEn.btn_slot_active[1,i] ->value=0
forn:=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.pan[	i]->	value, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, -	1, -	1)
end for
mixer.pan[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],-1,-1)
else
mixer.pan[i]->label :="Engine"
end if
else
forn :=0torr_nums[loaded_instruments[i]]-1
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.pan[	i]->	value, 	first_groupID[	loaded_instruments[	i]]+	n, -	1, -	1)
end for
mixer.pan[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],first_groupID[loaded_instruments[i]],-1,-1)
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,mixer.senddel[i])
ifcore.motion[s]=	1
mixer.senddel[i]->label :="Motion"
else
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.senddel[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
mixer.senddel[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"
end if

s:=search(core.control_ids,mixer.sendrev[i])
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.sendrev[	i]->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	i)
mixer.sendrev[i]->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+i)&" dB"
end for

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.comp_threshold))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.comp_threshold->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
mixer.comp_threshold->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.comp_makeup))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.comp_makeup->	value, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	NI_BUS_OFFSET+	core.generic[	s])
mixer.comp_makeup->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],NI_BUS_OFFSET+core.generic[s])&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_bypass))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	mixer.delay_bypass, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])

update_delay_time()

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_feedback))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.delay_feedback, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])
mixer.delay_feedback->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" %"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_hicut))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.delay_hicut, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])
mixer.delay_hicut->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" Hz"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.delay_return))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.delay_return, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])
mixer.delay_return->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" dB"

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.rev_bypass))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	1-	mixer.rev_bypass, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])

s:=search(core.control_ids,get_ui_id(mixer.rev_return))
set_engine_par(	core.engine_par[	s], 	mixer.rev_return, -	1, 	core.slot[	s], 	core.generic[	s])
mixer.rev_return->label :=get_engine_par_disp(core.engine_par[s],-1,core.slot[s],core.generic[s])&" dB"

visible_deny :=	0
callupdate_fx_motion_values
callmotion_fx



end function

set_up_nks



set_nks_array

set_nks
